title: iPhone Free-Fall Multi-Dimensional Chase Video Prompt
description: A highly detailed, scene-by-scene prompt for Seedance 2.0 to create a 10-second continuous free-fall illusion. The core concept involves a character leaping after a dropped iPhone (which serves as the camera), with rapid match-cut transitions simulating travel through different dimensions (City, Ocean, Neon Night, Deep Space). It enforces strict rules regarding camera angle (worm's-eye view, camera IS the phone) and character continuity (same red-haired woman, empty hands during the fall).
content:
Core Concept: A continuous free-fall illusion where an iPhone 17 Pro Max "drops" facing upwards, and the character leaps after it. As they fall together, rapid match-cut background and wardrobe changes simulate passing through multiple dimensions.  

THE "UNREACHABLE" RULE: During the entire flight sequence (Scenes 2-5), the woman is strictly unable to catch the iPhone. She must be reaching out desperately with empty hands, but the camera (the phone) remains just inches out of her grasp, maintaining the tension of the chase.  

CRITICAL CAMERA ANGLE & PROP RULE: The falling scenes MUST be shot from an extreme low-angle / worm's-eye view. The camera lens IS the falling iPhone. Therefore, the woman’s hands must be completely EMPTY during the fall. Do NOT show her holding the phone.  

Universal Rule: A young woman with red hair must appear in all scenes for perfect visual continuity. Strictly use "The same Character" lock.  
Total Duration: 10.0 seconds.  

Timeline & Scene-by-Scene Breakdown:  
Scene 1: The Pigeon & The Vault (00:00 - 00:01.5 | Duration: 1.5 sec)  
Location: High-end hotel balcony, sunny day.  
Action: The same Character (casual chic attire, red hair loose) is leaning on the balcony railing, holding her iPhone 17 Pro Max. A pigeon flies aggressively close to her face. Startled, she drops the phone.  

Camera Sequence: 
1. Medium shot of the drop. 
2. Tracking the phone tumbling (showing back glass and screen clearly). 
3. Close-up of her shock. 
4. She vaults the railing like a parkour athlete, diving after it.  

Scene 2: The City Fall (00:01.5 - 00:03.0 | Duration: 1.5 sec)  
Location: Sunny blue sky/glass skyscrapers.  
Camera Angle: Worm's-eye view, looking UP at her.  
Action: The same Character is freefalling toward the camera. She reaches down with EMPTY hands, but the phone/camera stays just out of reach. Wind blows her red hair upward.  Transition: Hard match-cut.  

Scene 3: The Ocean Dive (00:03.0 - 00:04.5 | Duration: 1.5 sec)  Location: Underwater environment.  
Action: Maintaining the same pose. Hands reaching but failing to grab the camera. Tiny bubbles rush upward past her.  
Wardrobe Change: Sleek, high-tech WHITE aquatic wetsuit.  Transition: Hard match-cut.  

Scene 4: The Neon Night Fall (00:04.5 - 00:06.0 | Duration: 1.5 sec)  
Location: Neon-lit cyberpunk city.  
Action: Continuous downward reach with EMPTY hands. The phone remains uncaptured.  
Wardrobe Change: Glowing neon streetwear.  
Transition: Hard match-cut.  

Scene 5: The Deep Space Fall (00:06.0 - 00:07.5 | Duration: 1.5 sec)  
Location: Infinite starfield/nebula.  
Action: Slow-motion zero-gravity hair float. She is still reaching, hands open and EMPTY, unable to close her grip on the camera.  
Wardrobe Change: Sleek, PINK metallic spacesuit.  Transition: Hard match-cut.  

Scene 6: The Grav

title: Detailed Cinematic Prompt for Wuxia Film 'Duel on the Lake' (Two Segments)
description: An extremely detailed, multi-segment cinematic prompt generated by Claude, designed for Seedance 2.0 to create a Wuxia (martial heroes) short film. It specifies visual style, color palette, camera work, audio design, character descriptions, and scene-by-scene action for two 15-second segments: 'Lake Surface Initial Battle' and 'Bamboo Forest Decisive Battle'. This prompt is a comprehensive script for video generation.
content:
《湖上决剑》- 两段式结构（每段15秒）

第一段：湖面初战（0-15秒）
影片类型与形式
类型：武侠史诗 × 轻功决斗 × 东方美学
 风格：青蓝色调；江南水墨意境
 摄影方式：稳定镜头与手持结合；慢镜头强调关键动作
 音频：古琴声；竹笛；水声；剑刃破空声；棍击风声
场景设定（本段唯一有效）
地点：江南湖面；湖水呈青蓝色；远处有朦胧山峦与竹林；湖面漂浮荷叶
 时间：清晨
 光线：柔和自然光；薄雾弥漫；水面反射天光
 色彩基调：青色、蓝色、灰色为主；红色（女剑客）与白色（盲侠）为焦点
出场人物（本段锁定）

红衣女剑客：深红色绸缎武服；腰系多层金色链饰；发髻高束；金色手镯；细长直剑，剑身银白；骄傲、自信、不服输
盲侠：米白色长袍；黑色领带；戴墨镜；发型整齐；长棍（竹制）；沉稳、从容、精准
正文剧情（四幕 × 15秒）
【0-2秒】第一幕 | 对峙·湖面初见
剧情描述：清晨江南湖面，薄雾轻笼。红衣女剑客站立湖面荷叶上，右手持剑，剑尖指地，眼神锐利。对面盲侠身着米白色长袍，墨镜反射湖光，手握长棍，姿态静若止水。

镜头设计：中景女剑客正面；中景盲侠墨镜反射；远景两人对峙
音频：低沉古琴声；微弱水声；竹叶声
【2-4秒】第二幕 | 杀机·眼神交锋

剧情描述：女剑客眼中杀意凛然，抬起长剑，剑身折射银光。出鞘瞬间，剑刃破空。硬切至盲侠面部，墨镜反射波光，嘴角微扬。他转动长棍，发出低沉风声。
镜头设计：特写女剑客眼睛；特写长剑出鞘银光（慢镜头）；硬切；特写盲侠墨镜；近景转动长棍
音频：剑刃"铮"声；棍身"呼"声；古琴骤停
【4-10秒】第三幕 | 初交锋·水上激战
剧情描述：女剑客率先攻击，足尖点地，身形如箭，红衣飘扬。她轻功踏水，激起涟漪水花，剑招凌厉。盲侠侧移，轻功掠湖面，长棍轻巧格挡。两人快速交手，剑棍碰撞，水花四溅。
激斗中，盲侠棍法一变，长棍精准刺出，击中女剑客右肩。女剑客后退，捂肩，脸现痛苦震惊。

镜头设计：
4-6秒：中景女剑客飞跃；近景脚尖踏水（慢镜头）
6-8秒：中远景交手；特写剑棍碰撞
8-9秒：近景长棍刺出（慢镜头）；特写击中肩膀
9-10秒：近景后退捂肩

音频：踏水声；密集碰撞声；破风声；竹笛加入；棍击闷响；痛苦轻哼
【10-15秒】第四幕 | 怒而反击·冲向竹林（结尾/过渡）
剧情描述：短暂停顿后，女剑客眼中怒火燃起，低吼："看剑！"她不顾肩伤，再次飞身，剑招更凶猛。
盲侠长棍横扫，将女剑客击退。女剑客身形倒飞，借力在水面荷叶上轻点，向湖畔竹林方向飞掠。盲侠紧随其后。
两人身影一红一白，快速冲向远处的翠绿竹林。镜头拉远，展现湖面与竹林的过渡。

画面在两人冲入竹林的瞬间，突然切黑。
镜头设计：
10-11秒：特写眼睛转愤怒；对白字幕"看剑！"
11-12秒：中景女剑客飞身猛攻

12-13秒：盲侠长棍横扫，女剑客倒飞

13-14秒：远景，两人身影冲向竹林（红白对比青蓝）
14-15秒：超远景，两人冲入竹林边缘，突然切黑
音频：
愤怒喊声"看剑！"
古琴转激昂
棍击声
破空声

竹叶沙沙声渐强
在切黑瞬间，音效突然停止
结尾设计（引擎六：戛然而止）：
✅ 在冲入竹林的动作最高点切黑
✅ 制造悬念："竹林里会发生什么？"

✅ 驱动观众看第二段

制作建议（第一段）
视觉风格：青色、蓝灰色、薄雾白为主；深红与米白对比；后期降低饱和度，增强青蓝色调
摄影技术：稳定镜头（对峙）；手持跟拍（打斗）；慢镜头占30%
音效设计：古琴主旋律；竹笛辅助；高频剑刃声；低频棍击声；多层次水声
动作设计：女剑客"快狠准"；盲侠"稳柔精"；参考《卧虎藏龙》轻功
第二段：竹林决战（0-15秒）

影片类型与形式

类型：武侠史诗 × 轻功决斗 × 东方美学
 风格：翠绿竹林 + 青蓝湖面；江南水墨意境
 摄影方式：动态跟拍为主；大量仰拍俯拍；慢镜头强调竹子弯曲
 音频：竹笛主导；古琴辅助；竹子断裂声；风声；剑刃破空声；棍击风声
场景设定（本段唯一有效）
地点：湖畔密集竹林 + 湖面；翠绿竹海；晨光透过竹叶投下斑驳光影；竹林边缘可见青蓝色湖面
 时间：清晨
 光线：晨光透过竹叶，金色光斑；竹林内部半明半暗；湖面柔和自然光
 色彩基调：前半段翠绿色（竹林）+ 金色（晨光）为主；后半段青蓝色（湖面）；红白对比贯穿

出场人物（本段锁定）
红衣女剑客：深红色武服；腰系金色链饰；发髻高束；持剑；已受肩伤；愤怒、不甘
盲侠：米白色长袍；黑色领带；戴墨镜；持长棍；沉着、精准
正文剧情（四幕 × 15秒）
【0-4秒】第一幕 | 竹梢追逐

剧情描述：画面从黑色快速淡入，直接进入竹林。色调从青蓝突然转为翠绿。
女剑客轻功点在竹梢上，竹子在她脚下弯曲摇晃。她连续在多根竹子间跳跃，红衣在绿色竹海中格外显眼。每踏一根竹子，竹子都会弯曲颤动。
盲侠紧随其后，在竹梢间追击。他的长棍挥出，击断女剑客踩过的竹子，竹子"啪"地断裂翻飞。
镜头设计：
0-1秒：从黑淡入，晨光透过竹叶
1-2秒：仰拍，女剑客在竹梢间跳跃，竹子弯曲

2-3秒：跟拍，盲侠挥棍击断竹子（慢镜头），竹子断裂翻飞
3-4秒：侧面广角，两人在竹林上空追逐，多根竹子同时弯曲
音频：
竹子弯曲"嗖嗖"声
竹子断裂"啪啪"声

脚步点在竹梢的轻响
竹笛快速演奏（紧张）
【4-10秒】第二幕 | 弯竹对决

剧情描述：女剑客落在一根粗壮的弯曲竹子上。盲侠紧接着落在同一根竹子的另一端。
两人各站竹子一端，竹子因两人重量弯成巨大弧形，在空中摇晃。晨光透过竹叶，照在两人身上。
女剑客抢先出剑，剑光刺向盲侠。盲侠长棍横扫格挡。剑棍在弯曲的竹子上激烈碰撞3次，每次碰撞竹子都剧烈摇晃。
第3次碰撞后，盲侠棍法突然加速，一棍扫向女剑客持剑的手腕。
镜头设计：
4-5秒：中景，两人分别落在弯竹两端（对称构图）
5-6秒：近景，竹子在两人脚下弯曲晃动（慢镜头）

6-8秒：快速切换：剑刺出→棍格挡→碰撞（3次快切）
8-9秒：中景，竹子剧烈摇晃，两人身形起伏
9-10秒：盲侠棍法加速，长棍扫向女剑客手腕（慢镜头）
音频：

竹子弯曲"咯吱"声

剑棍碰撞"铛铛铛"（3次）
竹子摇晃"嗖嗖"声
竹笛与古琴合奏达到高潮
【10-12秒】第三幕 | 剑脱手·落回湖面

剧情描述：盲侠一棍扫中女剑客手腕。女剑客剑脱手，长剑在空中旋转飞出竹林，插入远处湖面。她失去平衡，从弯曲的竹子上坠落。
盲侠也跃下竹子。两人先后从竹林落回湖面。
镜头跟随两人从翠绿的竹林落回青蓝色的湖面——色调再次转换，从绿色回到青蓝色。
镜头设计：
10秒：特写，剑脱手旋转飞出（慢镜头）

11秒：女剑客从竹子坠落

11-12秒：镜头跟随两人从竹林落回湖面（色调从翠绿转青蓝）

title: Sorceress Sigil Battle
description: A highly detailed 12-shot action sequence prompt featuring a white-haired sorceress battling a shadow entity with magic sigils.
content: Shot 1 (00: 00–00:01) – MS, Dolly in + Whip Pan A white-haired sorceress stands in an ancient archive filled with hanging talismans and bells, painting a sigil. Dark mist erupts from the ground—she reacts instantly, dodging and countering with a sweeping brush strike. VFX: Distorted, pulsing shadow mist. SFX: Paper rustle, soft bells, low hum. Shot 2 (00: 01–00:02) – CU, Fast Push-in Her eyes glow. With a flick of her wrist, she draws sharp blue sigil strokes mid-air, forming blade-like trails. VFX: Intersecting cold-blue energy lines. SFX: Sharp air cuts, energy charge. Shot 3 (00: 02–00:03) – WS, Crane Up Talismans swirl violently. Layered circular sigils form beneath her feet. A shadow entity emerges but is blocked by the rotating barrier. VFX: Multi-layer rotating sigil rings, vortex of talismans. SFX: Deep resonance, swirling wind. Shot 4 (00: 03–00:04) – MFS, Orbit Tracking Scene shifts to a fractured sky. She steps on floating sigils; her brush extends into a glowing chain of runes that lashes toward the entity. VFX: Flickering rune-chain light. SFX: Air tearing, chain clinks. Shot 5 (00: 04–00:06) – LS, Chase Cam Amid storm clouds and a broken moon, she rides the rune chain through the air, pursuing the fleeing shadow. VFX: Rolling clouds, blue-white trails vs black mist. SFX: Roaring wind, distant thunder. Shot 6 (00: 06–00:07) – CU, Slide She taps nodes along the chain, activating hidden purple sigils that pulse with new energy. VFX: Sequential purple node illumination, pulse flow. SFX: Light clicks, energy hum. Shot 7 (00: 07–00:08) – MCU, Static She closes in and strikes the entity’s forehead. A burst of light—its body distorts, a complex seal appears on its chest. VFX: Purple-blue flash, rotating seal. SFX: Sharp burst, distorted screech. Shot 8 (00: 08–00:09) – WS, Dive Shot Both streak downward like meteors, piercing clouds toward an ancient stone altar. VFX: Comet-like light trails. SFX: Air screech, compression. Shot 9 (00: 09–00:10) – WS, Impact Static They crash. Dust erupts. She slams her hand down—radiating sigils crack across the ground. VFX: Glowing fractures spreading outward. SFX: Heavy impact, stone cracking. Shot 10 (00: 10–00:12) – LS, Pull Back A massive 3D sigil array rises, forming layered barriers that trap the entity at the center. She stands calmly outside. VFX: Expanding geometric barriers, drifting particles. SFX: Low steady resonance. Shot 11 (00: 12–00:13) – CU, Static She forms a hand seal and whispers: “Seal.” VFX: Light particles contract. SFX: Soft chant, energy tightening. Shot 12 (00: 13–00:15) – CU, Fade Out Eyes closed, she meditates as all light fades, leaving faint residual glow in silence. VFX: Light dissipates into darkness. SFX: Gentle wind, fading echo.

title: Prehistoric Dirt Bike POV: Racing Against Dinosaurs
description: A highly detailed, multi-shot prompt for Seedance 2.0 designed to generate a first-person perspective video of a dirt bike rider racing through a prehistoric canyon while being hunted by dinosaurs. The prompt specifies visual style, character details, stage setting, emotional arc, color logic, and a precise timeline with SFX for a cinematic, high-adrenaline sequence.
content:
VISUAL STYLE: Use live-action feature film realism with crisp action-camera sharpness and prehistoric atmospheric haze. Subtle motion blur from vibration, micro-jitters from suspension stress.

CHARACTERS: Define a strict POV with mud-slick gloved hands gripping a dirt bike handlebar. Right hand aggressively feathering a sticking throttle, left hand riding a loose clutch lever. Boots locked onto vibrating foot pegs. Multiple massive prehistoric predators crossing and reacting to the path.

STAGE: A vast prehistoric canyon descending into dense fern canopy, a narrow river corridor, and a churned mud clearing under harsh daylight haze.

EMOTIONAL TARGET: Escalate from adrenaline control → mechanical failure → irreversible hunted panic.

COLOR LOGIC: Naturalistic Film Print Emulation with dust diffusion and sun-baked highlights.

⏱️ TIMELINE

00:00.0
Open on a hard POV at the canyon edge. Ultra-wide 14mm action lens. Engine already screaming too high — throttle is partially stuck. The bike lurches forward violently without full control. Hands fight the bar as the front wheel drops over the edge into a steep descent.
 SFX: Engine over-revving, chain rattle, gravel spray, wind blast.
00:03.2
Maintain uninterrupted POV. Bomb through dense treetop gaps and uneven terrain. A massive long-neck herbivore crosses ahead — the rider jerks the bar, barely missing its swinging neck. Throttle spikes unpredictably mid-turn.
 SFX: Engine surge spikes, deep animal bellow, branches snapping.
00:06.5
Dive into a narrow river corridor. Wet rock and mud reduce traction — rear tire fishtails violently. A flock of pterosaurs erupts across the path. The rider slips the clutch desperately to regain control, but revs surge again.
 SFX: Tire slipping, water spray, frantic wingbeats, engine scream.

00:09.8
Blast out of the river bend into thick mud. The throttle sticks wide open. The rider tries braking — response is weak. Speed becomes uncontrollable. The bike bucks hard, suspension slamming.
 SFX: Engine maxed out, brake squeal fading, mud tearing under tire.
00:12.4
Lose stability — partial wipeout. The bike skids sideways, camera dips violently but stays POV. Boots slam into mud, hands still gripping as momentum drags forward.
00:13.6
At ground level, stagger forward two steps after release. Breathing heavy. Look up—

A charging Spinosaurus bursts through river mist, jaws wide, closing distance instantly until teeth fill the frame.
SFX: Ground-shaking impacts, guttural roar, snapping jaws, abrupt cut.
🚫 EXCLUDE

Avoid third-person cuts, clean/stable riding, perfect control, teleporting terrain, frozen creatures, modern polished bike aesthetics, impossible recovery from skids, unrealistic suspension behavior.

title: Detailed multi-scene action prompt for Seedance 2.0
description: A detailed multi-scene prompt for Seedance 2.0, describing an action sequence involving a white-haired girl in mechanical angel armor within a dark fortress, including high-speed flight, close-ups, weapon firing, and an explosive kick.
content:
Setting: Dark fortress interior with towering metal structures. Teal/cyan illumination leaks through gaps between massive pillars. Metallic reflective floor.

Character: White-haired girl with red eyes. Mechanical angel in white armor plating. Wings on her back emit blue energy.

[1: HIGH-SPEED FLIGHT WITH BOOST TRAILS]

Extreme top-down angle. A tiny white light point zigzags across the fortress trailing blue energy lines. Concentric sonic-boom rings expand at each turning point. Wind-pressure particles scatter off the metal floor below.

[2: CHARACTER CLOSE-UP → WEAPON AIM → FIRE → EXTREME FACE CLOSE-UP]

Hard cut to low-angle close-up — the angel with wings spread, energy blades aimed forward in firing stance. She fires. Then the camera begins an agonizingly slow, deliberate zoom toward her face. It continues until only her glowing red eyes fill the entire frame. Pure intimidation.

[3: BOOSTER ADJUSTMENT → CHARGE → ENERGY MAX → BOOST]

From the red-eye extreme close-up, blue energy vents intensify in stages — blue → bright white. The entire screen whites out. An explosive flash of energy release.

[4: HIGH-SPEED FLIGHT WITH BOOST TRAILS]

Immediately after whiteout she streaks across the fortress at extreme speed. Blue beam trails cut diagonally across the frame. A targeting reticle flickers for an instant.

[5: KICK TOWARD CAMERA]

She dives from above and drives a kick straight at the camera — extreme low-angle POV from the target's perspective. Her armored leg fills the frame. Wing jets fire for added impact.

[6: SAME KICK FROM DIFFERENT ANGLE → EXPLOSION]

The same kick replayed from a different camera angle. On contact: cyan/white explosion → thick energy dust cloud → the dust lights up from inside as a secondary blast erupts.

[7: CLOSE-UP → WEAPON AIM → AUTO-TARGETING → FULL BARRAGE]

Dust clears to reveal the angel with all wings fully deployed. Each blue energy blade independently auto-adjusts its aim — blue/purple electrical arcs crackle as targeting locks on. Then every blade fires at once — continuous rapid-fire barrage, the entire screen consumed by cyan/white explosions.

[8: BOOSTER ADJUSTMENT → CHARGE → MAX BOOST → HIGH-SPEED FLIGHT]

Energy vents charge up again in stages. Blue → white → whiteout → explosive jet blast. She rockets away trailing blue energy across the fortress.

[9: WEAPON READY POSE]

Against the teal fortress backdrop she holds a static pose, energy blades aimed forward, wings fully spread. A faint blue aura shimmers around her.

title: Detailed Cinematic Prompt for Seedance 2.0
description: A highly detailed, time-coded cinematic prompt used with Seedance 2.0, incorporating three reference images (a girl, monsters, and a fantasy forest) to create a horror chase sequence.
content: [00:00–00:02] Wide establishing shot of the bizarre fantasy forest @image3 . Towering flesh-like tree trunks packed with blinking embedded eyes rise on both sides, glowing blue liquid runs down roots into occult circular markings on the ground, red storm sky beyond. The corridor feels alive and watching. CAM: slow low push forward, ominous and quiet. [00:02–00:04] The girl @image1 runs into frame through the center path, sprinting hard toward camera, red coat flaring, glowing eyes wide with fear and focus. Her shoes splash through glowing blue runoff, hair bouncing violently. CAM: handheld-style backward chase shot, low and fast. [00:04–00:06] Whip-pan reveal behind her: multiple grotesque monsters @image2 skitter and bound into the corridor, drooling blue slime, eyes rolling wildly, teeth bared. They move with jerky inhuman speed, legs scraping over the slick ground. CAM: snap whip-pan, then brief forward rush with the pack. [00:06–00:08] Sakuga cut barrage: close-up of her @image1 pounding feet through glowing symbols; coat sleeve whipping past lens; monster claws stabbing into the wet soil; embedded eyes in the trees blinking open; blue fluid splashing; one monster lunges just short of her back. Fast, sharp, chaotic cuts. [00:08–00:10] @image1 cuts hard left around a root mass, nearly slipping, catches herself, then vaults over a stream of glowing liquid. One monster @image2 crashes into the roots and another leaps across the frame with jaws wide. CAM: side tracking shot matching her sprint, aggressive parallax through the living trunks. [00:10–00:12] @image1 reaches a circular sigil clearing and skids to a stop at center. The monsters @image2 spread out around her at the edge of the frame, surrounding but not yet striking. The forest eyes all seem to stare inward. CAM: overhead-descending angle into a dramatic low angle on her bracing herself. [00:12–00:14] Horror standoff beat. @image1 slowly raises her head, glowing eyes intensifying, red coat settling in the blue-lit air. The nearest monster @image2 creeps forward, drool stretching, others twitching in anticipation. Blue runoff pulses brighter through the ground symbols. CAM: slow push-in, trembling atmosphere. [00:14–00:15] Final impact image: one monster @image2 explodes forward into frame as @image1 snaps into motion to counter, freezing on the instant before collision—glowing eyes, claws, teeth, flaring coat, occult light reflecting across the flesh-trees. Hard cut ending.

title: Porsche 911 GT3 RS Night Street Race
description: A comprehensive cinematic video prompt for Seedance 2.0 that generates a high-speed racing sequence. It includes detailed instructions for character consistency, environment lighting, and a shot-by-shot sequence breakdown for a professional cinematic look.
content:
Cinematic night street racing sequence featuring a Porsche 911 GT3 RS with a focused female driver (use Image1 as the face reference). Maintain exact facial identity from the reference image throughout the entire video.

Ultra-realistic visuals with smooth transitions between interior and exterior shots.

Driver
Young female driver whose face matches Image1 exactly. Face must remain consistent across every frame with no morphing or identity drift. Sharp eyes, composed yet aggressive expression. Subtle confidence. Dashboard lights and passing street neon naturally illuminate her face inside the dark cabin.

Environment
Dense neon-lit city at night. Wet asphalt reflecting pink, blue, and purple lights. Narrow high-end urban streets, tunnels, and glass buildings reflecting the speeding car. Atmospheric mist and light road spray enhance realism.

Camera Flow
Dynamic cinematic movement with seamless transitions between shots:
face close-up → over-shoulder → macro detail → exterior tracking → low ground perspective.
Use controlled whip pans, speed ramps, and natural motion blur to emphasize speed while keeping the subject sharp.

Sequence
0–2s
Extreme close-up of the female driver’s face. Eyes focused forward. One hand tightens on the steering wheel. Dashboard glow softly lights her face.
2–4s
Over-shoulder interior shot showing the road ahead. Neon reflections sweep across the windshield and her face as the car accelerates.
4–6s
Macro detail: her finger presses the drive mode selector. Quick cut back to her eyes reacting. Engine RPM rises.
6–8s
Exterior side tracking shot. Porsche 911 GT3 RS launches forward aggressively, tires gripping wet asphalt.
8–10s
Low ground shot near the wheels. Tires spin rapidly, reflections stretch across the wet road.
10–12s
High-speed run through tight neon streets. Rapid cinematic cuts between exterior chase shots and interior close-ups of her focused face.

Visual Style
Ultra-realistic cinematic lighting. Strong neon reflections on the car and wet pavement. Realistic vehicle physics, detailed Porsche design, natural motion blur to convey speed.

Final Requirements
Maintain consistent Porsche 911 GT3 RS appearance and stable facial identity matching Image1 across all frames. Smooth continuous motion, no distortion, no face morphing, and no design changes to the vehicle.

title: Complex Action Sequence with Transformations
description: A highly detailed multi-phase video prompt for Seedance 2.0 that orchestrates character introductions, special effects, and cosmic transitions.
content:
## Phase C (0.20s): 灯籠起動・爆発・全景提示

(0.07s) 瞬時カットで暗転へ。固定カメラ。人型シルエットのみ見える暗転（必殺技発動前の静寂）。画面中央に花形紋章（5弁、赤+灰色、幅40%）が出現し、中心から黄金色の爆発光が8方向に放射。紋章下部から縦の黄金エネルギービームが下方に伸びる。エネルギーが上方に拡散し始める。

(0.13s) 固定カメラ（煽りローアングル）。灯籠型オブジェクトの全体像が画面中央に表示（縦長六角形の提灯型、赤い本体に白い5弁花紋章、石造り台座付き）。背後から赤い光柱が天空へ伸びる。黄色・ターコイズの星パーティクルが浮遊。画面下部30%にピンク〜マゼンタの雲。3フレームで約2%の微ズームイン。

---

## Phase D (0.17s): ティルトダウン・キャラクター顕現

(0.17s) ティルトダウン（約60–80px/fの下方向パン）。5フレームで灯籠の上部アングルからキャラクター顔のミディアムクローズアップまで移動。灯籠が画面上方に退くにつれ、その下に隠れていた3人ユニットが順次画面に現れる（腰部→上半身→顔の順に顕現）。灯籠の赤い発光が上方に退いていく。霧エフェクトがキャラクター腰付近に漂う。ズーム変化なし（純粋なティルトダウン）。

---

## Phase E (0.73s): 3人ユニット紹介・溜め演出

(0.27s) 固定煽りローアングル。緩やかなズームイン（1–2px/f）。冷色主体（紺色ベース）。3人が正面を向いた紹介ポーズ。各キャラが腕・手・首などを小さく動かし（手を上げる・傾ける等のポーズ変化）、画面下部の金色盾型台座が徐々に画面外へ退く。

(0.20s) ズームイン継続。紺+紫混合へ色調遷移。台座縁に沿って黄色い電撃エフェクトが蛇行（3→6本に増加）。3人の表情が徐々に戦闘的に変化（目を見開く・唇の端が上がる）。

(0.26s) 紫→オレンジ→赤へ急速な色調遷移（「溜め→臨界」の視覚化）。3人の顔がフレームの70%を占めるクローズアップ. 中央キャラが叫ぶような表情に、左右キャラが攻撃準備ポーズへ。色調がほぼ赤/オレンジに転換完了し、次カットの瞬時カットに備える。

---

## Phase F (0.44s): 降下攻撃・着地インパクト

(0.24s) 瞬時カットで遠景に切り替わり。超高速ズームイン（8フレームで約10倍の拡大）。キャラクターが黄金色のエネルギーリング（2–3重の同心円）に包まれた状態で画面中央上部に小さく見える。放射状の赤いスピードラインが画面全体に走る。光球が急速に接近。灯籠底面が縦方向モーションブラーと共に画面の60%を覆い、黄金色の炎が底部から噴出開始（幅300px→500pxへ拡大）。灯籠底面の花紋章が画面幅80%の超接写に。着地直前、巨大な炎が画面下部40%を埋め、虹色レンズフレアが出現。

(0.20s) 着地インパクト。固定カメラ（衝撃による5–10pxの微振動）。黄金色の炎が画面下部50%を占め、虹色レンズフレアと色収差（RGB分離）が発生。炎が70%に拡大。90%以上のホワイトアウト（黄金色系ウォームホワイト、1フレーム持続）。炎柱（幅200→150px）が画面中央を縦貫し、背景が紫〜藍色へ転換し始める。

---

## Phase G (0.56s): 光柱上昇・雲海突破・宇宙到達

(0.16s) ティルトアップ＋微ズームアウト。画面中央を縦貫する光柱（幅100→60px）が細くなりながら上昇し、両側に虹色ストライプが出現。画面下部30–40%にピンク〜マゼンタの雲海が広がる。光柱が虹色のトレイル（弧状の軌跡、レインボーグラデーション、下方が太く上方が細い）に変化。画面全体が紫にフェードし、場面転換のトランジション。

(0.10s) 固定カメラ。紫フェードが解消し、暗紫色の宇宙的空間が安定。画面下部にピンク〜マゼンタの雲海（立体的なボリューメトリック表現）。虹色トレイルが明確に出現し、先端に白〜黄色の光球（直径40px）を伴いながら下部中央から上方へ弧状に伸びる。

(0.30s) ティルトアップ＋微ズームアウト。虹色トレイルの先端光球が画面上部へ上昇（雲海→宇宙）。光球から短い放射光条（30px）が四方に出現。光十字（クロスフレア）の形成開始（水平100px・垂直80px）。光十字が完全形成。最大サイズ（水平300px・垂直200px）に到達し、中心に純白の光核（略楕円形）。黄金色の星パーティクルが周囲に4–5個浮遊。

---

## Phase H (0.50s): 宇宙飛翔・惑星衝突

(0.27s) 瞬時カットで宇宙空間のワイドショットへ. 固定カメラ。暗紫〜紺色の宇宙空間に恒星が10–15個散在。画面左下に赤い巨大惑星（大気のリム光あり）、画面右下に青い小惑星。画面中央やや左に太陽状の大フレア（赤い水平光条が左右500px）。フレアが縮小。彗星形状（白〜黄色の光核＋オレンジ〜赤の炎尾）が赤い惑星方向へ加速移動（炎尾100px→200pxへ伸長、移動速度30–60px/f）。

(0.23s) 微ズームイン。光核の中にキャラクターの人型シルエットが確認可能（高さ30px）。彗星が赤い惑星の大気圏に接近。ターコイズ色の六角形フレーム内にチェックマークUIが出現（グリッチ風色収差エフェクト付き）。惑星リム光に接触し、接触点からオレンジ色のフレアが放射状（6–8本）に広がり始める。

title: Hyper-Realistic Parkour POV Sequence Prompt
description: A highly detailed, multi-stage prompt for Seedance 2.0 designed to generate a hyper-realistic, single-take, first-person perspective (POV) action sequence of a man performing extreme parkour, including a terrifying freefall, rhythmic jumps, and a near-fatal slip, with specific audio and visual details.
content:
A hyper-realistic, 8K resolution, adrenaline-fueled single-take POV action sequence. The camera is chest-mounted on a man wearing camouflage joggers and worn-out black-and-white sneakers. He stands on the dizzying edge of a rusted skyscraper, 1000 feet above a crystalline turquoise ocean. No clouds, no haze—just a sheer, terrifying vertical drop into the deep blue.

[The Initial Freefall]
The sequence begins with a sudden, heart-stopping leap into a 20-meter vertical freefall. The camera points directly at his feet as the sea surface rushes toward the lens. A deafening, high-pitched whistling 'Hyuo' wind screams past the microphone. Just before the impact, he catches a lower rusted horizontal bar with both hands—white wristband visible—and swings his body forward to land on a tiny vertical pole.

[The Rhythmic Jumps & The Near-Death Slip]
He immediately begins a rhythmic series of high-speed jumps:

Jump 1: A clean, agile spring to a second vertical pole 2 meters away.

Jump 2: A rapid leap to a thin, rusted horizontal pipe.

Jump 3 (The Slip): As he jumps toward the third vertical pole, his right sneaker completely misses the mark and slides off the rusted metal. The camera tilts violently over the edge, staring straight down at the 1000-foot abyss. He lets out a sharp, panicked gasp. For a terrifying second, his body leans into the void, but he desperately claws at the pole with his fingers, his boots scrambling against the side until he manages to hook his leg and haul himself back up.

Jump 4: Still trembling, he forces a frantic, heavy-breathing leap to the next bar to keep the momentum.

Jump 5: A final, explosive long-distance jump to a swaying metal platform. He lands with a heavy, jarring metallic 'Clang', his body hunching low, gripping the vibrating metal for dear life.

[The Ending]
The camera remains in a low, fetal position on the final bar, shaking from the adrenaline. No dialogue. The audio is a visceral layer of the aggressive 'Hyuo' wind, his intense, ragged, and rapid gasping for air, and a loud, thumping heartbeat that resonates as if inside his chest. The harsh midday sun glints off the ocean waves far below, creating a blinding, beautiful, yet lethal glare. Cinematic materials, fluid 120fps motion, hyper-detailed rust and skin textures.

title: Photorealistic Sandworm Hunt Short Film
description: An extremely detailed, multi-stage cinematic prompt for a desert chase sequence between a sail-skiff and a massive sandworm.
content:
Cinematic short film, photorealistic VFX. 15-second desert hunt at high noon. Blinding light, zero shade, heat shimmer on everything.

[0–2s] Overhead drone — red desert canyon system. Sandstone towers, wind-carved arches, dry riverbeds. One figure: a woman on a sand-skiff — a flat wooden board with a triangular sail, gliding across compacted sand on bone runners. She wears wrapped linen armor, copper goggles, a weighted net coiled at her waist. She watches the sand.

[2–4s] ECU the sand surface — it's BREATHING. Rippling outward from a point 200 yards ahead. The sand rises like a slow dome. The sail-woman cuts the skiff hard right. The dome ERUPTS — a sandworm. 40 feet, segmented, chitinous plates the color of rust. Its mouth is a vertical iris lined with grinding teeth like a rock crusher. Sand cascades off its body. It roars — the sound is DEEP, below human hearing, but you feel it shake the frame.

[4–7s] Chase through the canyon — the skiff banks between sandstone pillars. The worm follows UNDERGROUND — you see its path as a moving ridge of sand, smashing through the earth, pillars cracking as it passes beneath their foundations. She throws the weighted net — it wraps around a sandstone tower, rope trailing to her skiff.

[7–10s] The worm surfaces directly in the skiff's path. She leans the board, catches wind, and the skiff JUMPS — airborne over the worm's back. In mid-air she drives a barbed stake into the top of its head plate. Lands the skiff on the other side. Rope connects stake to the sandstone tower.

[10–13s] The worm charges away — the rope goes taut against the tower. The tower HOLDS. The worm's momentum whiplashes it sideways. It crashes into a canyon wall. Sandstone debris cascades. Dust cloud erupts like a bomb. Silence inside the cloud.

[13–15s] Dust settles. The worm lies against the canyon wall, breathing but pinned. She brings the skiff alongside, pulls her goggles up. Beneath the goggles — calm, focused eyes. She draws a curved knife and begins cutting a single iridescent scale from the worm's flank — the harvest. That's all she came for. One scale. The worm hisses but doesn't fight. She pats its flank once, takes the scale, pushes off. The skiff catches wind. She vanishes between the sandstone towers. Cut to black. Ultra-realistic.

title: Cyberpunk Tokyo Kung Fu Chase
description: An extremely detailed, cinematic prompt for Seedance 2.0, originally intended for text-to-video but used for image-to-video, describing a high-speed night chase in cyberpunk Tokyo featuring a character named Cherry Blackcloud performing kung fu and slicing a drone with a katana.
content: She does the most amazing kung fu. She yells with a Macedonian accent: "This is See dance 2.0, using only a first frame." Cinematic night chase in cyberpunk Tokyo rain: matte-black Nissan GT-R Nismo screams down wet neon street at 200 km/h, tires spraying water, headlights cutting through heavy rain. Cherry Blackcloud (20, Macedonian features, jet-black high ponytail whipping, sharp fringe, cybernetic ice-cyan right eye glowing) drives aggressively—fully zipped black McQueen leather jacket on bare skin, short black leather skirt with silver zipper visible, bare legs, chunky black platform boots on pedals, katana strapped to passenger seat. Camera starts wide tracking shot beside the GT-R, then quick push-in through rain-streaked windshield to tight close-up on Cherry’s intense face (left eye dark brown burning, right eye glowing cyan). She glances at rear-view mirror—pursuing drones closing in with red lasers.Cherry (thick Macedonian accent, low & commanding, over engine roar): “They think they can box me in.”She downshifts hard, GT-R fishtails, then launches into a perfect 180° drift—tires screeching, water exploding in arcs. Katana handle glints in cyan dashboard glow. She reaches over, grabs katana mid-drift, opens driver door while sliding sideways, leans out into rain, and slashes a precise arc—katana blade glowing cyan, slicing the lead drone in half in a shower of sparks and molten metal.Cherry (smirking, voice cutting through wind & rain): “Not today.”She snaps the door shut, floors the accelerator—GT-R rockets forward, neon reflections streaking across wet black paint. Camera pulls back fast to wide shot: car vanishing into rainy night, drones exploding behind in orange fireballs. Final frame: Cherry’s cyber-eye flares once as she disappears around a corner. Fade to black. Style & Technical Notes for Seedance 2.0 Photorealistic Hollywood action blockbuster style, ARRI Alexa cinematic look, teal-orange color grade, realistic heavy rain with water droplets and wet reflections on black car and leather, high dynamic range, 60fps, dramatic anamorphic lens flares from neon and explosions, subtle film grain, no artifacts, intense practical stunt choreography, dynamic camera work (tracking, push-in, 180° drift reveal, fast pull-back).

title: Warrior's Devastating Strike
description: A detailed, multi-shot prompt for Seedance 2.0 generating an intense cinematic action sequence where a warrior unleashes an ultimate technique, creating a massive red energy vortex that collapses into light particles.
content:
Subject/Character:
A warrior wearing a sleek black combat outfit with subtle crimson accents, gripping an elegant black katana that emits a faint red energy glow.

Environment/Setting:
A wide stone courtyard at dusk with drifting fog, scattered debris, and loose objects such as leaves, dust, and small fragments across the ground. The atmosphere feels tense and charged with energy.

Action:
The warrior unleashes an ultimate technique with intense and fast cinematic motion. The katana rises upward as powerful red energy rapidly forms a spinning tornado-like vortex. The vortex grows stronger and pulls surrounding debris into a violent spiral of energy and wind. With a swift and powerful motion, the warrior swings the katana directly toward the camera, causing the massive vortex to collapse instantly into explosive red light particles that fade into the air. No graphic violence, no blood, no injury detail.

Shot Breakdown:
Shot 1 (5s): Wide cinematic establishing shot. Wind begins to surge across the courtyard as dust and debris lift from the ground. Red energy starts gathering around the black katana, crackling with intensity.

Shot 2 (6s): Fast dynamic rotating tracking shot. The katana is raised high as a massive red energy tornado erupts around the warrior. Leaves, stones, and fragments spiral upward while the vortex grows larger and more chaotic with powerful CGI energy streams.

Shot 3 (4s): Aggressive forward camera push as the katana is swung toward the camera in a decisive motion. The giant vortex instantly collapses into a burst of glowing red particles and fading shockwave ripples, leaving the environment suddenly calm.

Lighting:
Strong crimson energy lighting from the vortex combined with dark cinematic dusk tones, glowing particles, energy trails, and dramatic highlights on the blade.

Style:
cinematic, ultra high detail, intense pacing, fast motion, dynamic composition, film-like motion, high-end CGI energy effects, atmospheric particles

Duration:
15 seconds

Audio Note:
Deep cinematic bass buildup, powerful wind vortex sounds, rising energy pulses, followed by a sharp energy release and fading ambient wind. No spoken dialogue.

title: Detailed Seedance 2.0 prompt for a dancing fox girl
description: A highly detailed, multi-section prompt used with LitVideo's Seedance 2.0 to generate a video of a blue-haired fox girl performing an energetic, bouncy dance in a Japanese shrine setting.
content:
Use @Image1 as the character reference. Keep character design, hairstyle, ears, tail, outfit, and colors perfectly consistent.

【主体 / Subject】

A blue-haired fox girl with long flowing hair, large fluffy fox ears, and a huge fluffy tail.
She wears a shrine-maiden inspired outfit with loose sleeves and a short skirt.
She stands in a Japanese shrine setting with a red torii gate, autumn leaves falling around her.
Her expression is playful, energetic, slightly teasing.

【アクション / Action】

She performs an energetic, bouncy dance with frequent jumping motions.

Repeated light jumps in rhythm (ぴょんぴょん)
Knees bend deeply before each jump for natural motion
Hair, sleeves, and tail bounce dynamically with physics
Tail sways with exaggerated follow-through motion
Spins mid-jump once (360° quick spin)
Lands softly and immediately transitions into next jump
Arms swing wide, then pull inward for momentum
Ends with a high jump and playful pose on landing

👉 重要安定化指示

Clear leg bending and landing weight control
Natural gravity and smooth jump arcs
No body distortion during airtime
Tail follows delayed secondary motion
【カメラ / Camera】
Landscape 16:9, 15 seconds
Start: full-body wide shot (全身見せてジャンプ確認)
Slight low-angle to emphasize jump height
Gentle tracking to follow vertical movement
Subtle handheld bounce synced with jumps
Mid-section zoom during spin jump
End: slight push-in as she lands final pose
【スタイル / Style】
High quality 2D anime animation
Smooth, high frame consistency
Bright autumn color palette (red, orange, gold leaves)
Soft sunlight filtering through trees
Motion emphasis on cloth physics and tail volume
Clean linework, slightly soft shading
Light bloom and depth of field
【サウンド / Sound】

Upbeat, hyper-energetic J-pop / electro dance track (~170 BPM)

Bouncy bass and punchy kick drum
Bright synth melodies
Clap and snare accents on jumps
Cute but energetic female vocal (short phrases / chants)
Fox-like playful “hey!” or “yo!” vocal accents
Subtle ambient shrine atmosphere (wind + leaves)

title: Cinematic Mecha Warrior in Wuxia Style Video Prompt
description: A highly detailed, multi-section prompt designed to generate a cinematic video of a mecha warrior performing Wuxia-style martial arts in a mossy waterfall setting, emphasizing 1980s VHS quality, specific camera movements, and sound effects across a 15-second sequence. This prompt is extremely specific about character appearance, scene, style, and motion.
content:
机甲武士·瀑布仙境独演·1980年代武侠剧照 VHS录像带·胶片颗粒·苔藓瀑布场景 角色锁定： 图1机甲武士
图片2
——短发，机械双臂暗灰合金，粉色光泽战裤，白色球鞋，武士刀，赤膊腹肌清晰。外层叠加青碧色广袖长袍、玉带腰系、发髻簪冠，面容冷峻英挺。全程外观不变。 场景锁定
图片1
： 图2苔藓瀑布仙境，多层瀑布从苔藓巨岩倾泻，水雾弥漫，深绿苔藓湿润，蕨类植物环绕，冷蓝绿色调为底。全程场景不突变。 1980年代香港武侠电影质感，VHS扫描线叠加，重度胶片颗粒高噪点，色彩褪色偏黄绿，四角暗角压重，镜头边缘轻微变形失真，昏暗诡异侧光，电影式中景镜头。全程风格不漂移。禁止角色变脸换人，禁止服装突变，禁止出现文字字幕LOGO水印。 0-1秒：超广角低空俯冲推进 超广角低空俯冲推进，强透视感，镜头高速前推轻微旋转，动态模糊拉满，VHS运动区雪花噪点爆发。机甲武士从瀑布水雾深处跃入近景，青碧广袖剧烈翻飞，玉带随跃动甩出弧线，武士刀刀身反射冷白刀光。气场扑面，镜头持续运动不静止，瀑布水雾被高速运动形成放射状残影。 音效：水雾低频轰鸣，布料破风声，武士刀出鞘金属清鸣，VHS电子底噪。 1-4秒：低角仰拍·纵跃连劈 低角仰拍从苔藓地面仰视。机甲武士蹬踏湿石跃起，青碧广袖展开如双翼，武士刀连续横劈竖斩，每式干净利落无停顿，刀身拖出淡蓝色刀光残影。瀑布水帘在背景形成白色幕布，剪影张力满格。 水珠从苔藓岩石被刀气震落，在仰视镜头中形成密集水珠雨幕从上方坠落。环形环绕跟拍启动，以机甲武士为轴绕行180度，粉色战裤在冷蓝绿水雾中形成极端冷暖色彩对撞，白色球鞋踩踏湿苔藓留下水印。 音效：武士刀劈风声，水珠震落声，水雾轰鸣，长袍翻飞布料声。 4-8秒：侧跟平拍·升格慢镜顶点 镜头侧向平拍高速跟随。机甲武士在苔藓巨岩间纵跃腾挪，步伐迅疾如风，每落点精准踩在岩石边缘，水花从踩踏点四散飞溅，刀法连绵不断。 【升格慢镜·0.3秒顶点】 机甲武士执刀横扫最大幅度顶点——速度骤降升格慢镜。青碧广袖每根织物纹路清晰，水珠从袖尾飞出在空中形成完整弧形轨迹，武士刀刀刃反射瀑布水光形成细腻光谱，淡蓝色刀气残影凝固悬停，苔藓石面水膜震动纹路清晰可见。0.3秒后立即恢复高速，VHS画面在速度切换瞬间出现帧率跳跃噪点。 大幅度甩镜切换至高位俯拍，苔藓湿地留下连续跳跃水印轨迹，刀光残影从俯视角度形成螺旋流光图案。 音效：慢镜顶点水珠飞散的极慢水声，恢复高速时骤然爆发冲击音效，瀑布轰鸣频率随速度切换突变。 8-12秒：高能变焦推拉·多视角切换 镜头高能变焦，先极速拉远——机甲武士粉色战裤在绿白色瀑布背景中成为唯一暖色视觉锚点——再猛推近至武士刀刀尖特写，刀尖淡蓝色粒子持续流动，水雾在刀光中折射冷蓝微光。 连续三次快速视角切换： ①低角仰拍——武士刀从头顶劈下，刀刃与瀑布水帘在同一垂直画面中双重白光对撞 ②侧跟平拍——广袖与瀑布水流方向形成横竖交叉力量线 ③高位俯拍——身影在苔藓水面倒影中同步出现双重残影 每次切换伴随VHS横向扫描线撕裂短暂失真，高速运动区域密集雪花噪点。刀光残影三次叠加，最终在画面中形成淡蓝色光网覆盖瀑布场景。 音效：多视角切换帧跳跃噪音，武士刀连续劈击密集金属鸣声，瀑布轰鸣随视角切换急推急收。 12-15秒：凌空收势·剑气扩散·壮阔全景 机甲武士蹬踏最高处苔藓巨岩凌空跃起至最高点，青碧广袖完全展开，玉带甩出最大弧度，粉色战裤逆光色彩最为饱和，白色球鞋悬于瀑布水雾之上。双手握持武士刀向下施展收势—— 【终章炸裂三连】 ①武士刀接触水面瞬间：淡蓝色刀气向四周扩散同心圆光波涟漪，光波将瀑布水帘整体向外推开形成弧形水墙 ②光波触及苔藓岩壁：整面苔藓水珠同时起飞，密集水珠幕帘向外飞散，在昏暗光线中折射冷蓝光谱 ③刀气向上爆发：淡蓝色光柱从刀尖冲天，贯穿瀑布水雾层形成蓝白光柱，水雾大幅翻涌飞散，蕨类植物被气浪压弯 【终章升格慢镜·3秒全程】 光波涟漪在苔藓水面的扩散纹路，水珠幕帘在刀光中的折射光谱，广袖在气浪中的织物纹路流动，白色球鞋最后踩踏水花定格，每个细节清晰震撼。 镜头缓缓拉远，壮阔全景收尾——多层瀑布全貌重新呈现，机甲武士立于最高处苔藓巨岩，淡蓝色刀光余晖在水雾中缓慢消散，粉色战裤在绿白色瀑布背景中最后定格。 VHS四角暗角完全压黑，胶片颗粒在光柱高光区域爆发为银白噪点，镜头边缘轻微变形失真收尾，画面张力满格。 音效：刀气扩散低频共振爆鸣，光波触及水帘厚重水声，水珠幕帘起飞密集细碎声，光柱冲天高频能量声，升格慢镜中所有声音降频呈现空灵质感，镜头拉远后只剩瀑布轰鸣与水雾风声。 技术规格： VHS扫描线全程叠加，重度胶片颗粒，色彩褪色偏黄绿，四角暗角压重，升格慢镜0.3秒动作顶点+终章3秒全程，高能变焦推拉，多视角急切换，淡蓝色刀光粒子全程流动，苔藓水雾物理粒子运动轨迹自然真实。

title: Dramatic Character Gacha Reveal Sequence
description: A detailed, multi-phase prompt for generating a dramatic character reveal sequence, mimicking the style of a high-production gacha game. It includes specific instructions for visual effects, camera work, typography, and action choreography across five distinct phases, culminating in a final character composition.
content:
ガチャ演出

A dramatic character gacha reveal sequence. Phase 1: Against a dark backdrop featuring a large calligraphic emblem and halftone dot pattern decorations matching the character's aesthetic, golden cross-shaped stars fly in from off-screen with lens flare light spikes, landing into a horizontal row with pulsating flash impacts. Multiple waves of white-gold explosions confirm the 5-star rarity. Phase 2: Hard cut to black, then the character fades in from darkness at center-right. Bold white text of their signature catchphrase appears center-frame with kinetic typography and cyan glow effects, glitch-frame borders in magenta and green flicker at screen edges. The character performs confident action poses while lightning effects arc from their weapons. Phase 3: Dynamic action sequence with extreme camera angles — low angle looking up at the character mid-leap, debris flying, motion blur conveying speed. The character unleashes their signature attack with yellow energy blasts. Camera orbits around them showing multiple dramatic angles with shallow depth of field. Phase 4: Explosive rapid-fire montage — the entire screen shifts to the character's theme color as a duotone filter. Hard cuts every 2-5 frames cycle through close-ups, silhouettes, and action poses. Bold typography of the character name animates in fragments between cuts. Diagonal stripe overlays, hazard tape motifs, and 1-frame flash impacts punctuate every transition. Phase 5: The montage instantly resolves into a clean final composition — character's full standing illustration on the left, calligraphic emblem upper-right, name plate lower-right, large golden rank letter lower-left, theme-colored digital particle accents floating around the character.

title: Cinematic Martial Arts Sequence for Seedance 2
description: A detailed, multi-stage prompt designed for Seedance 2.0 to generate a complex, cinematic martial arts video sequence. The prompt specifies choreography, camera movements (dolly-ins, whip pans, orbit moves), timing for specific actions (0-2s, 2-4s, etc.), environment details (traditional Japanese setting), and overall style (ultra realistic, high-end martial arts film).
content:
cinematic martial arts confrontation in broad daylight, a blind shaolin monk wearing a dark, stylized combat outfit inspired by legendary fighters stands calm and centered, eyes closed, surrounded by multiple hostile creatures emerging from a traditional Japanese landscape

Ultra cinematic choreography coverage, mix of slow dolly-ins + orbit moves + whip pans, transitions masked by body motion and impacts, alternating real-time and slow motion, continuous fluid sequence

(0-2s) wide establishing shot, monk standing still in center, wind moving fabric, creatures circling, tension builds
(2-4s) slow push-in close-up on monk’s face, eyes closed, subtle head tilt sensing movement
(4-6s) sudden attack from first creature, monk reacts instantly, precise sidestep + redirection, fluid motion
(6-8s) chained combat sequence, monk engages multiple opponents, spinning strikes, controlled movements, each impact sending creatures flying backward with stylized motion
(8-10s) slow motion highlight: mid-air dodge + counter sequence, cloth movement and body rotation emphasized, creatures suspended briefly before being thrown away
(10-12s) final burst of speed, monk flows through remaining opponents in one continuous movement, camera orbiting rapidly, enemies collapsing or being thrown aside

Traditional Japanese environment, open landscape with temples, wooden structures, distant mountains, clear daylight, subtle wind movement, dust and debris reacting to motion

Ultra realistic, high-end martial arts film choreography, precise body mechanics, cinematic slow motion, strong contrast lighting, volumetric atmosphere, fluid transitions, intense but controlled physical interaction, no distortion, no stretching

description: A highly detailed, four-part storyboard prompt for Seedance 2.0, generating a high-tension Cyber Wuxia duel in the style of 'Fog Hill of Five Elements'. The scene features a female character in a white suit with mechanical parts and a male character with Hello Kitty tattoos and pink metal pants, fighting near a giant mossy waterfall using extreme slow-motion, rapid cuts, and cinematic camera work.
content: 【镜头1 · 3s · 建立/爆发】 主体一：赛博女性 图片1 ，白色西装，机械颈骨，金齿轮耳环，红唇冷漠，黑发马尾，玄铁长刀 主体二：赛博男性 图片2 ，裸腹六块腹肌，Hello Kitty纹身，黑色机械甲肩臂，粉色金属货裤，白色AJ，武士刀 场景：参考图 图片3 巨型苔藓瀑布崖壁，白色水雾铺天，翠绿蕨类丛生，湿滑苔石 动作：男性从瀑布顶端纵身跃下，武士刀倒握反插，在水雾中高速坠落——子弹时间介入，镜头360度环绕静止身体，水珠悬浮，机械甲齿轮咬合细节锐利可见；时间恢复，男性砸落苔石台炸出十米裂缝，女性横向瞬移闪避，刀锋擦过发丝，黑发寸断飘散 风格：雾山五行国漫画风，硬边水墨线条，青银赤金高对比，电影级光影 镜头：跟随俯冲高速下降，子弹时间360度环绕，相机位于下坠轨迹平行高度(thats where the camera is) 构图：纵向引导线，瀑布与坠落轨迹重合，冲击点为焦点 氛围：极度压迫，生死一线，水雾爆散 音频：风声撕裂；子弹时间静默低频；落地轰鸣；配乐：单鼓重击起 【镜头2 · 4s · 转折/游斗】 主体一：白衣女性，长刀低扫连劈，动作凌厉 主体二：粉裤男性，机械臂格挡，赤金电弧炸裂 场景：瀑布中段苔藓岩壁平台，苔石踩碎，蕨类横飞，水雾被气劲切成丝状 动作：女性贴地滑步突进低扫脚踝——子弹时间介入，极近距特写刀锋与AJ鞋底仅差两毫米，鞋底被刀气削出焦痕，机械关节指节泛白细节定格；时间恢复，男性踏地弹身，燃焰武士刀劈向女性机械颈部，刀锋擦过颈部零件削飞旋转；二人蹬墙互踹，双腿空中碰撞爆发蓝金冲击波，双双震飞后空翻落地 风格：快切与子弹时间交替，打击感极强，细节残酷真实 镜头：贴地低速跟随切极端近距特写，相机位于地面贴近高度(thats where the camera is) 构图：极端近景景深，危险细节锐利，背景瀑布大虚化 氛围：千钧一发，窒息感 音频：刀锋擦骨金属尖啸；鞋底焦痕嗞嗞声；冲击波爆响；配乐：急促弦乐 【镜头3 · 4s · 高潮/环境缠斗】 主体一：白衣女性，长刀反握插地腾空旋踢 主体二：粉裤男性，抓蕨类藤蔓借力甩身，机械臂过载爆红 场景：瀑布底部水潭区，水面踩出巨型凹陷，苔石崩裂，蕨类连根拔起 动作：男性抓整棵蕨类横扫，女性长刀拦腰斩断——子弹时间介入，极近特写断面纤维纹理、刀锋残留绿色汁液、机械关节泛白细节定格；时间恢复，女性借反震旋身斜劈冰蓝刀气，男性机械臂过载硬接握碎，掌心蒸汽焦烟；二人扑摔入水潭缠斗翻滚，激起十米水柱折射金蓝彩虹 风格：慢动作细节特写与暴力冲击并行，环境破坏极致 镜头：子弹时间断面特写切回水柱爆发全景，相机位于水面平行高度(thats where the camera is) 构图：水面倒影与真实动作上下对称，冲击点居中 氛围：野蛮爆裂，生死相搏 音频：树干断裂声；机械过载嗡鸣；水柱爆发轰响；配乐：低频战鼓爆点 【镜头4 · 4s · 终结/大招对轰】 主体一：白衣女性，长刀举顶，银冰光芒过载爆发，西装边缘被能量撕裂 主体二：粉裤男性，武士刀横胸，机械甲赤金全功率过载，粉裤猎猎飞扬 场景：瀑布正前方制高苔石台，百米瀑布为背景，水雾与光芒交融 动作：双方同时蓄力爆发，冰火双色能量柱冲天——子弹时间介入，极近特写女性瞳孔，倒映赤金火焰与男性全影，睫毛水雾微珠清晰，眼神由冷漠转决死；切至男性Hello Kitty纹身特写，纹身在赤金光下线条流动发光；时间恢复，双方全力冲刺对劈，两刀瀑布正中央对撞，炸出五十米冰火双色球形爆炸，瀑布从中间炸裂撕成两半；双方各自倒飞十米重砸苔石，烟尘渐散，二人喘息对望，画面定格 风格：子弹时间微距细节与终极爆炸超广角极致反差，震撼收束 镜头：眼部极端微距切超广角大爆炸全景，相机位于爆炸正面平行高度(thats where the camera is) 构图：爆炸中心点，冰火双色向四方放射，双角色对称分列 氛围：天崩地裂，毁灭级收束 音频：子弹时间静默心跳；双刀碰撞共鸣；爆炸巨响；配乐：单鼓定格，低频余震渐弱 无水印、无字幕、无文字叠加。
author: {"name":"Changning Liu","link":"https://x.com/ChangningL29508"}

title: Video Prompt: Cyber Wuxia Fight Sequence (Detailed Storyboard)
description: An extremely detailed, four-scene storyboard prompt for Seedance 2.0 to generate a Cyber Wuxia action video. title: Mecha High-Speed Movement Cinematic Prompt (RAY-G)
description: A detailed, multi-segment prompt for Seedance 2.0 to generate a 15-second video showcasing the high-speed movement of a giant mecha named RAY-G (Image 1). The style is minimalist, hardcore mecha, and high-frame-rate, focusing on 'instant burst power' and 'streamlined trajectory,' inspired by Gundam and Metal Gear. The prompt uses two reference images and specifies five distinct shots with detailed camera work and effects.
content:
针对您提供的巨大机甲 <<<Image1>>>   (RAY-G)，我为您设计了一份时长 15秒、风格极其干练、时髦（Stylish）且充满重力无视感的高速移动视频脚本。

这份提示词融合了《机动战士高达：水星的魔女》的灵动感与《金属装备》的机械冷硬风，重点在于**“瞬间爆发力”与“流线型轨迹”**。

视频生成脚本：【RAY-G: 极速切点 (Point Break)】
总时长： 15秒

风格标签： 极简主义、硬核机甲、高帧率动作、流体动力学、赛璐璐高级感。

(00:00 - 03:00) 序幕：静止的动量 (Static Potential)
镜头： 极近景（Extreme Close-up），斜角构图。

画面： 画面中心是 <<<Image1>>>   漆黑磨砂装甲上的橙色线条。线条开始像血管一样有节奏地剧烈闪烁，发出高频的嗡鸣声。

特效： 空气因高温产生剧烈扭曲（Heat Haze），背景的海面保持极度的静谧，形成动静反差。

[Prompt / 提示词]:

极近景，斜角构图。聚焦于机甲 <<<Image1>>>   的黑色磨砂装甲。鲜艳的橙色线条像呼吸灯一样高频闪烁。装甲缝隙喷射出极细的白色高压蒸汽。环境背景模糊。极简主义色彩，电影级质感，金属冷硬风格。

(03:00 - 06:00) 瞬发：突破音障 (Instant Acceleration)
镜头： 侧面追踪镜头（Side Tracking Shot），伴随强烈的拉伸感（FOV Shift）。

动作： 机甲 @image2 的鸟脚状后肢猛地一踏，脚踝处的滑轮（Land Spinner）高速旋转。瞬间从静止变为超音速，海面被切开一道笔直的白浪。

特效： 产生圆锥形的音爆云（Sonic Boom），橙色残影在空中拉出一道锋利的直线。

[Prompt / 提示词]:

侧面动态追踪。机甲 @image2 瞬间爆发起跑。足部滑轮高速旋转，在海面上切开巨大的V形浪花。超音速冲击波云。极速运动模糊，机甲拉出长长的橙色轨迹残影。空间拉伸感，震撼的加速度视觉。

(06:00 - 10:00) 垂直机动：重力反转 (Vertical Evasion)
镜头： 动态环绕升降镜头（Crane & Orbit）。

动作： 机甲奔向一座半毁的沿海巨塔，完全不减速，直接顺着垂直的墙面向上冲刺。它在垂直墙面上进行了一个华丽的180度螺旋转身，避开假想的攻击。

特效： 碎裂的玻璃碎片在空中飞舞，折射出夕阳的橙光。

[Prompt / 提示词]:

动态环绕镜头。机甲 <<<Image1>>>   在垂直建筑物表面高速冲刺，无视重力。身体进行优雅的螺旋旋转（Barrel Roll）。碎片飞溅，反射夕阳橙光。高对比度阴影，赛璐璐动画风格，极具张力的动作设计。

(10:00 - 13:00) 高光：战术滑行 (Tactical Slide)
镜头： 极低角度（Low Angle）对准足部。

动作： 机甲从高处跃下，足部在海面上进行长距离的漂移滑行。身体压低至极限，呈现掠食者般的姿态。

特效： 巨量的水雾被激起，在阳光下形成彩虹。

[Prompt / 提示词]:

极低角度。机甲 <<<Image1>>>   在海面上低重心漂移滑行。巨大的白色浪花与水雾。掠食者姿态，机械关节细致运作。夕阳余晖，金属反光，色彩饱和度极高，极致的画面纯净感。

(13:00 - 15:00) 尾声：单眼凝视 (The Glare)
镜头： 正面近景，逐渐变焦。

动作： 机甲滑行停止，身体由于惯性轻微晃动。头部导向板打开，中心那颗发光的青绿色单眼（Monocular）猛地看向镜头。

特效： 画面最后瞬间闪过一个“LOCK ON”的橙色UI界面，随即切黑。

[Prompt / 提示词]:

正面近景。机甲 @image2 停止滑行，蒸汽散去。头部青绿色单眼亮起，锐利冷酷。屏幕中心出现橙色锁定UI。电影级运镜，画面骤然切黑。
author: {"name":"MiraMusic","link":"https://x.com/MiraMusic_AI"}

title: Seedance 2.0 Video Prompt: Aerial Dogfight over Thai Temple
description: A highly detailed, multi-scene video generation prompt for Seedance 2.0, describing an aerial dogfight between a black-gold heavy mech fighter and a silver streamlined fighter piloted by a female cyborg, set over a grand Thai temple complex at dawn. The prompt specifies camera angles, composition, atmosphere, and audio for each of the seven clips.
content:
镜头1·2s·建立】 主体: 黑金重型机甲战机
图片1
，浮雕纹路装甲，球形深色座舱，关节外展 场景: 泰国宏大寺庙群上空，晨雾，金塔若隐若现，山地铺展远方 动作: 从云雾中俯冲而出，压低机头直扑寺庙上空，展开武器挂架 风格: 70年代纪录片胶片质感，暖金色调，轻微颗粒感 镜头: 全景俯视缓慢推进，相机位于云层下方(thats where the camera is) 构图: 引导线构图，机甲指向远处佛塔群 氛围: 晨光漫射，史诗压迫感 音频: 山风声；低频定音鼓；重型引擎低鸣 【镜头2·2s·转折】 主体: 白银流线型战机@图片2，座舱内仿生女驾驶员@图片3

title: Nature Reclaiming Megacity Prompt
description: An extensive, multi-stage prompt for Seedance 2.0 (made in Dreamina AI) describing a woman who accelerates vegetation growth to violently reclaim a concrete megacity, detailing camera movements, color logic, and particle effects.
content:
A woman in her mid-30s with dark braided hair entwined with living vines, wearing layered organic armor of bark and woven leaves, skin traced with glowing emerald root veins — opening frame is a medium close-up of her standing barefoot in the center of an abandoned concrete megacity plaza, completely still as small plants begin sprouting through cracks in the pavement.

At second two she presses both palms downward — roots explode outward beneath the ground, instantly splitting asphalt and concrete as vegetation accelerates beyond natural growth speed.

The city becomes a living organism: trees burst through buildings mid-rise, vines consume steel beams, and entire structures collapse under rapid organic expansion.

She moves minimally — each gesture redirects the growth patterns: right hand sends explosive root pillars upward, left hand spreads creeping vine networks that engulf entire streets.

Camera orbits tightly as green growth overtakes grey infrastructure, snap zooming into root eruptions and cutting to building collapses.

Color logic: vivid bioluminescent green dominates new growth, contrasting against cold desaturated urban decay.

Escalation builds as entire blocks are overtaken — skyscrapers crack and fall under root pressure.

Final beat: hard POV shift — camera becomes the root network surging underground, racing through soil and concrete before bursting upward beneath a final collapsing tower.

Particle detail on soil displacement, bark texture, and debris fragmentation; diegetic green glow illuminates dust clouds.

Epic nature-reclaiming urban collapse, cinematic organic physics, 4K ultra-detail.

title: Epic Fantasy Action Battle Storyboard Prompt
description: A detailed, multi-shot storyboard prompt for Seedance 2.0 describing an epic fantasy action sequence where a warrior battles a giant desert scorpion in ancient ruins, specifying camera movements, atmosphere, and technical parameters.
content: 【Film Style】 Epic fantasy action, cinematic monster battle, dramatic desert ruins setting, heroic warrior atmosphere, intense combat energy, dynamic camera motion. 【Duration】 12 seconds 【Character】 A battle-hardened female warrior holding a heavy axe, covered in dust and blood from combat. 【Creature】 A massive giant desert scorpion towering behind her with enormous claws and a raised venomous tail. 【Scene】 Ancient desert ruins surrounded by burning torches and drifting dust. Broken stone walls and sand cover the ground. 【Storyboard Script】 [00:00–00:04] Shot 1: The Moment Scene: The warrior stands in the foreground with the giant scorpion behind her. Action: She pauses and looks directly toward the viewer with a determined expression. Camera: Slow cinematic push toward her face. Atmosphere: Wind moves her hair while flames flicker and dust drifts through the air. [00:04–00:08] Shot 2: The Threat Action: The giant scorpion shifts and raises its massive tail. The warrior turns quickly toward the creature, gripping her axe with both hands. Camera: Slight camera pan revealing the full size of the scorpion. [00:08–00:12] Shot 3: The Attack Action: With a burst of energy, the warrior sprints forward and leaps onto the giant scorpion. Impact: She swings the axe downward toward the creature as it rears up. Camera: Dramatic low-angle action shot following her leap. Atmosphere: Dust explodes from the ground as she launches into the attack. 【Technical Parameters】 Cinematic lighting, dust particle effects, firelight reflections, dynamic action motion, subtle camera shake during impact.

title: Ultimate Tropical Escape Video Prompt for Seedance 2.0
description: An extremely detailed, multi-section prompt designed for Seedance 2.0 to generate a seamless, hyper-dynamic, one-cut video of a woman's tropical escape. The prompt specifies character appearance, setting (wooden pier, overwater villa), action sequence (running, room tour, diving into the sea), camera work (Hyper-dynamic follow shot, one-cut style), lighting (crystal clear tropical daylight), and color palette (cyan, turquoise, cobalt blue).
content:
【コア・コンセプト：Ultimate Tropical Escape】

1. シーン構成とアクション (Scene & Action)
冒頭:

視点は、茶髪の日本人の20歳のかわいい女性の背後を追う三人称視点のトラッキングショット。
彼女は南国風のへそ出しキャミソールと、タイトなジーンズのホットパンツを合わせた洗練されたリゾートスタイルを着用し、ピンクのリモワ風アルミキャリーバッグを軽快に引いている。少し焼けた肌。
場所は、エメラルドグリーンの海の上に浮かぶ木製の桟橋（ウッドデッキ）。
彼女は期待を抑えきれないように、最初からかなり勢いよく前のめりに走り出す。
歩幅は大きく、足運びは非常に軽快で、キャリーバッグの車輪もスピードに合わせて小気味よく滑る。
髪とトップスの裾が風を受けてなびき、到着を待ちきれない高揚感が全身から伝わる。

中盤（ルームツアー）:

彼女がモダンな水上ヴィラの木製の扉を開けると、そこには広大なオーシャンビューが広がる。
カメラは彼女の動きに同期し、リビング、円形の通路、そしてバスルームへと途切れず高速で流れるように移動する。
彼女は室内に入ってからもスピードをほとんど落とさず、弾むような足取りで駆け抜ける。
まるで目的地へ一直線に吸い込まれていくような、期待感に満ちた動き。
部屋の途中で、彼女は走る勢いのままキャリーバッグのハンドルから自然にサッと手を離し、バッグは慣性で壁際へ滑るように流れ、静かに止まる。彼女は一切ためらわず、そのままさらに加速してテラスへ向かう。

クライマックス:

彼女はヴィラのテラスから外へ飛び出し、そのままほとんど減速せずに階段を駆け下り、迷うことなくターコイズブルーの海へとダイブする。
この時、彼女はすでに手ぶらで、両手を自由に広げながらジャンプする。
助走の勢いがそのまま空中へ抜けるような、大胆で伸びのあるジャンプ。
空中で手足を大きく広げ、水しぶき（スプラッシュ）が美しく舞い上がる瞬間を捉える。

2. 視覚的・技術的ディテール (Visual & Technical Details)
カメラワーク:
Hyper-dynamic follow shot: 被写体との距離を一定に保ちながら、ジンバルを使用したような揺れの少ない、しかし圧倒的なスピード感のあるトラッキング。
One-cut style: まるでワンカットで撮影されたかのようなシームレスなトランジション。
カメラは彼女のランニングスピードにぴったり追従し、疾走感・没入感・爽快感を最大限に強調する。
キャリーバッグを手放す瞬間も滑らかにつなぎ、アクションの連続性が崩れない自然な導線を重視する。
ライティングと色彩:
Crystal clear tropical daylight: 雲ひとつない快晴。太陽光は真上から降り注ぎ、海面はキラキラとダイヤモンドのように反射している。
Color Palette:
海の「シアン」「ターコイズ」「コバルトブルー」のグラデーション
空の「スカイブルー」
ヴィラの「ナチュラルウッド」「ホワイト」
彼女の衣装の「ピュアホワイト」
髪色の「ライトブラウン」
これらが彩度高めに設定され、視覚的な満足度を最大化する。
テクスチャと質感:
Water: 水は極めて透明度が高く、底の砂紋が見えるほど。飛び込んだ際の水しぶきは、一粒一粒がクリスタルのように細かく描写される。
Architecture: ヴィラの外壁は白い縦格子のモダンなデザイン。床のウッドデッキは、日光で乾燥した木の質感が伝わるようなディテール。
Wardrobe & Hair: 茶髪は南国の風を強く受けて自然になびき、白いへそ出しキャミソールとホットパンツは、開放的でヘルシーな夏らしさを強調する。

title: Golden Nunchaku Action Sequence Prompt for Seedance 2.0
description: A detailed, multi-shot prompt for Seedance 2.0 generating an action sequence focused on a glowing golden nunchaku, featuring rapid spinning, luminous trails, an overhead camera orbit, and a final dramatic explosion and character reveal.
content: A glowing golden nunchaku spins rapidly in both hands, carving bright arcs against the dark background. Each swing leaves luminous gold trails that linger in the air. The nunchaku swings widen — golden arc trails stretch across the entire screen, overlapping and crisscrossing in every direction. The trails glow brighter with each pass, filling the dark space with streaking gold light. The nunchaku is hurled straight upward toward the camera. It grows larger as it approaches — the golden glow overwhelms the screen — total whiteout. The nunchaku reappears spinning midair, trailing golden arc-shaped afterimages. Orange sparks scatter around it. Low angle — a gloved hand reaches up to catch the descending chain. The camera orbits from overhead, sweeping past the back of the head, golden rim light tracing the hair's silhouette, then swings around to the front revealing the face with a confident expression. The character poses with the nunchaku held at shoulder height. Behind them, an orange explosion ignites and rapidly expands — god rays pour from above. The blast overwhelms the frame into blinding white. The camera slowly pulls back as the explosion subsides. The fireball fades from white-hot to orange to dark smoke forming a mushroom cloud shape. The character stands still, weapon at side — diamond-shaped sparkles appear around them. Debris and embers drift through the air. New scene. Extreme close-up of the character's face — a soft, satisfied smile. Golden bokeh particles float in the dark background.

title: Detailed WWII aerial dogfight scene prompt
description: An extremely detailed, multi-paragraph prompt for generating a 5-second video of a dramatic World War II aerial dogfight between RAF Spitfires and German Messerschmitt fighters over England, focusing on motion, action, camera work, and atmosphere.
content:
Three RAF Spitfires fly forward rapidly in tight formation through cloudy skies over England,
their propellers spin furiously creating motion blur.
Suddenly German Messerschmitt fighters dive aggressively from above through cloud cover,
descend at steep angles with engines screaming.
The Spitfire formation breaks apart instantly,
each aircraft banks sharply in different directions.
A Spitfire rolls violently to evade,
performs a tight barrel roll,
machine guns fire continuously,
tracer rounds stream brilliantly across the sky.
A Messerschmitt takes hits directly on the wing,
smoke trails begin immediately,
the aircraft spirals downward uncontrollably,
spins faster and faster,
flames erupt from the engine cowling intensely,
the plane plummets toward the ground rapidly.
Another Spitfire pursues a Messerschmitt aggressively,
both aircraft weave dramatically through clouds,
emerge suddenly into clear sky,
dive steeply together locked in pursuit.
Clouds drift majestically throughout the battle,
aircraft appear and disappear through the vapor continuously.
Contrails streak beautifully across the blue sky marking flight paths.
The camera starts inside a Spitfire cockpit looking forward through the canopy,
follows one aircraft's acrobatic maneuvers closely,
then transitions smoothly to an external chase position behind the dogfighting planes,
the camera matches their rolls and turns dynamically,
finally pulls back rapidly to a wide aerial view,
reveals multiple aircraft engaged across a vast sky dramatically.

content:
Cinematic epic battle between Spider-Man and Sun Wukong the Monkey King on ancient Chinese temple rooftops at golden sunset. 

Spider-Man in classic red-and-blue suit swings in with webs, flips mid-air and lands in a crouch. Sun Wukong, muscular monkey warrior wearing tiger-skin skirt and golden headband, twirls massive Ruyi Jingu Bang staff that extends and retracts fluidly.

Intense close-quarters fight: Spider-Man dodges super-fast staff swings, uses web-shooters to wrap around the extending pole, gets yanked forward but backflips free. Sun Wukong leaps enormous distances, somersaults cloud-style, creates afterimages with 72 transformations (brief clone split into 3 versions attacking from different angles).

Spider-Man counters with agile parkour across tiles, shoots web nets to trap clones, then webs the real Wukong's staff mid-swing causing huge shockwave that cracks roof tiles and sends golden sparks flying everywhere.

Dramatic camera: fast dolly zooms, dynamic orbiting shots around fighters, slow-motion on key impacts (web clash vs golden staff, fists meeting with energy burst), quick cuts between wide epic vista and extreme close-ups of determined faces / gritted teeth.

Hyper-realistic motion, perfect physics, detailed fabric ripple on Spider-Man's suit and fur movement on Wukong, dramatic rim lighting from sunset, flying debris and golden energy trails, intense orchestral + traditional Chinese percussion soundtrack vibe. 16:9 cinematic aspect ratio, ultra-detailed, no text, no watermark.

title: Ultra-Realistic Continuous Tiger Chase Shot Prompt
description: A highly detailed prompt for an ultra-realistic 15-second continuous chase shot featuring a tiger pursuing a deer. The prompt specifies camera POV (gripping the tiger's tail), biomechanics, environmental interaction, motion parallax, lighting, and the final lunge and takedown.
content:
"Use the uploaded image as the exact first frame.
Create a 15-second ultra-realistic continuous chase shot. The camera is physically gripping the tiger’s tail, locked in a rigid trailing POV. The tail fills the foreground, muscles flexing, skin rippling, fur vibrating from speed and airflow.
Ahead, a deer sprints across the grassy field in panic. Its movement is erratic and unbalanced, fear-driven stride changes and sharp direction shifts clearly visible as the distance rapidly closes.
The tiger accelerates into a full sprint with precise biomechanics: explosive hind-leg extension, visible spine compression and release, tail counterbalancing each stride. Grass flattens under impact, dirt and debris kick up naturally. The horizon trembles subtly from ground force, not artificial camera shake.
Extreme forward velocity creates strong motion parallax in the environment while the tail remains relatively stable due to the physical grip. Micro-oscillations sync perfectly with each stride cycle. Wind roars; fur streams backward consistently.
Lighting stays natural and continuous, shadows strobing beneath the body as legs cycle. No slow motion, no cuts, no stylization.
In the final moments, the tiger lunges, collides with the deer, pins it to the ground, and secures a decisive neck hold. The shot ends mid-action with full weight, tension, and momentum still present."

title: Seedance 2.0 Detailed Combat Video Prompt: Maid Blade Dance
description: A highly detailed, structured prompt for generating a 15-second combat video titled 'Maid Blade Dance - Mei vs Coco' using Seedance 2.0. The prompt specifies characters, weapons, movement cores, environment, lighting, atmosphere, camera work, and a sequence of 10 detailed cuts with timing and action descriptions.
content:
タイトル：「メイドブレードダンス - メイ vs ココ」
所要時間：「15秒」
入力：
A: "<<<画像1>>>"
B: "<<<画像2>>>"
キャラクター:
A:
名前：「霧島メイ」
武器：「迷いの刀（黒紫）」
B:
名前：「桜庭ココ」
武器：「リボン槍（銀色＋赤リボン）」
ムーブメントコア:
A: ["高速多段斬り"、"黒紫オーラ"、"多重ブラー残像"]
B: [「槍による高速回転」、「白銀オーラ」、「リボン螺旋状」]
環境：
場所：「和風屋敷廊下（月夜・障子背景）」
照明：「月光青＋障子オレンジ」
雰囲気：「黒と白の塵」
カメラ：「24mm〜70mm。高速追従＋急停止。激突スロー時（0.3倍速）」
カット:
- カット: 1
所要時間：「1.5秒」
アクション：「メイ（左）ココ（右）が10m離れて対峙。メイが刀を半分抜く」
カメラ：「ゆっくり水平パン（24mm）」
- カット: 2
所要時間：「1.5秒」
アクション：「メイが刀を完全に抜ける。黒紫のオーラ一瞬閃。メイがココに直線的に移動（残像あり）」
カメラ：「メイへ超高速ドリーイン（50mm）」
- カット: 3
所要時間：「2秒」
アクション：「ココが槍を軸に高速回転。メイの連続斬撃が槍に触れる。白青色の火花。リボンが遠心力で広がる」
カメラ：「ココ中心に回転（45mm）」
- カット: 4
所要時間：「1.5秒」
アクション：「メイが刀を胸の高さに構える。ココが槍を横に構える。対応の動きを測り合う」
カメラ：「ワクワク。横トラッキング（35mm）」
- カット: 5
所要時間：「2秒」
アクション: "メイが連続7回の斬撃。各斬撃が黒い光の軌跡。ココがリボンを薙ぎ払い迎撃。リボンが黒い軌跡を白くかき消す"
カメラ：「メイへの高速追従パン（50mm）」
- カット: 6
所要時間：「1.5秒」
アクション：「メイが袈裟懸けで巨大な斬撃。黒紫のオーラが画面を半分横切り。ココが槍を斜めに見て見て」
カメラ：「斜めからメイの軌跡を辿る（50mm）」
- カット: 7
所要時間：「2秒」
アクション: 「ココが身体を回転させながら槍を構え変える。連続3回の高速突き。メイが刀で払い落とし」
カメラ：「ココへフラッシュドリーイン＋回転（40mm）」
- カット: 8
所要時間：「2.5秒」
アクション：「刀と槍が正面から激突。火花が爆発的に飛び散る（黒紫×白青）。二人の髪が波打ち。ダスト放射状に拡散」
カメラ: 「固定。突出部を中心（70mm）」
効果: "スローモーション 0.3倍"
- カット: 9
所要時間：「1.5秒」
アクション: 「メイとココがずっと数メートル後ろに吹き飛ぶ。膝をついて相手を見つめる」
カメラ：「二人から同時に後ろへ向い（35mm）」
- カット: 10
期間: "1秒"
アクション: "メイが刀を振る。ココが槍を立て直す。次の開始姿勢へ"
カメラ：「ゆっくり引き（24mm）」
ループ：「黒と白の塵が分かれて渦巻く。戦いは永遠に続く」
注：
- "メイ：直線的・鋭い動き。ココ：曲線的・流動的な動き"
- 「黒紫 vs 白青の火花が個性を表現」
- 「月光と障子が和風決闘の世界観を強調」

title: Stylized Library Combat Scene
description: A dynamic cinematic prompt featuring a young woman in an abandoned library combat sequence with specific visual hooks and environmental physics.
content: A 19-year-old woman with micro braids dyed deep indigo, warm brown skin, wearing a shredded athletic wrap top and cargo trousers - hook: extreme snap zoom to her eyes, pupils dilate, she exhales smoke in cold air, then launches a dynamic surge directly into frame. Combat takes place in an abandoned symmetrical library - towering bookshelves as leading lines, books exploding outward with every forceful impact, paper filling the air as environmental debris. Her movement vocabulary: rhythmic loops of continuous forward momentum, never retreating, each strike building on the last with no recovery given. Recoil and recovery mechanics exaggerated on every block - shelves bend, spines crack, the architecture deforms around the exchange. Velocity ramp on the mid-fight escalation peak: dual simultaneous strikes slow to crystal clarity then detonate at full speed. Vertical stakes: shelves begin falling like dominoes, the fighters ascending the collapsing structure. Unexpected ending: she wins the exchange, opponent is down - she looks around at the total destruction, reaches into the rubble, pulls out a specific undamaged book, tucks it under her arm, and walks out through a hole in the wall. Texture duality of leather and paper against brutalist stone, practical debris physics, warm amber library light shifting to cold daylight, cinematic 4K.

title: Silhouetted Swordsman Combat Prompt
description: A highly technical and detailed prompt for Seedance 2.0 focusing on generating a hyper-kinetic, high-contrast combat sequence. It specifies camera motion (tracking, micro-pans, whip-pans, violent shake), actions (silhouetted swordsman fighting monstrous enemies), and the use of 1-frame white light flashes upon impact, maintaining a deep red cinematic void.
content:
SHOT:
  camera_motion: tracking shot
  movement_dynamics: The camera stays anchored on the central silhouetted swordsman, executing fast micro-pans and sudden whip-pans to frame each incoming enemy from the darkness. The camera shakes violently on each high-impact flash to emphasize the kinetic energy and aggressive strobing rhythm of the scene.
ACTIONS:
  core_action: A heavily silhouetted man in a deep red cinematic void stands in a martial arts combat stance holding a katana. A sequence of massive, monstrous silhouetted enemies rushes him sequentially from the shadows: a hulking bipedal reptile, a giant mutated arachnid, a shadowy wraith with elongated claws, a towering armored brute wielding a heavy mace, and a ferocious winged gargoyle. The swordsman executes blazing, precise katana strikes with authentic momentum conservation. Exactly upon blade contact with each target, a powerful 1-frame white light flash explodes, momentarily overexposing the entire scene and freezing the exact point of impact. Between the strobing flashes, the environment instantly plunges back into deep red darkness, while the defeated monsters immediately dissolve into black smoke or drop out of frame. The sequence maintains a relentless, high-contrast, hyper-kinetic rhythm of shadows, precise physical strikes, and sudden blinding light.

title: Seedance 2.0 Video Prompt: First-Person Knight vs. Giant
description: An extremely detailed, multi-scene prompt for Seedance 2.0 to generate a continuous first-person perspective video showing a knight fighting a giant monster in a chaotic, muddy battlefield at dusk. The prompt specifies camera movements (shaking, rolling), visual constraints (view through a helmet slit), sound effects (metal impact, ringing ears, heavy breathing), lighting, and technical rendering details (24mm lens, 35mm film look, 8k resolution), structured with precise time stamps for each action sequence.
content: 场景：第一人称视角战场 - 黄昏 / 阴天 单镜头（第一人称视角） 氛围：混乱、幽闭和紧张。泥泞、烟灰和潮湿铁金属的气味充斥着空气，被骑士沉重的头盔狭窄的开口所限制。巨大的巨人怪物的庞大身躯和不可阻挡的力量与被困在沉重盔甲中的人类视角形成鲜明对比。 镜头描述： 从骑士头盔内部持续不断的、无间断的第一人称视角拍摄，通过坚硬的金属面罩狭缝（没有玻璃）框取剧烈的身体互动。摄像机模拟出身体遭受巨大动能打击时的沉重、剧烈的物理效果，被向后抛飞，在泥泞中快速翻滚以躲避斧头，并用手持宽剑抵地拦截巨人的冲力。 时间轴 / 分镜头： 0:00-0:03 - [第一人称视角 / 24 毫米广角 / 手持晃动镜头]。透过黑暗、刮花的金属面罩狭缝，一个巨大的巨人向前猛扑并直拳攻击骑士，将主体击飞。 音效：刺耳的金属撞击声，突然响起的高频耳鸣声开始。 光照：刺骨的、散射的灰色黄昏光线笼罩着泥泞的战场。 0:03-0:06 - [突然的空中翻滚/猛烈撞击]。动能冲击将装甲骑士远远地抛向空中。地平线通过狭窄的面罩狭缝快速旋转和翻滚，在令人迷失方向的失重弧线中，突然重重地坠入泥地。刺耳的、震耳欲聋的耳鸣声瞬间掩盖了所有背景噪音。 音效：尖锐的耳鸣声，随后是装甲重重砸在泥地上的沉闷声响。 0:06-0:10 - [低角度视角/快速侧身翻滚]。巨人迅速缩短距离，高耸在上空，挥舞着一把巨大的生锈战斧。摄像机模拟在泥泞土地上快速进行全身桶滚；天空、泥地和巨人一起在令人头晕目眩的水平旋转中模糊在一起，巨大的斧刃猛烈地砸向附近的软泥，撞击时剧烈地晃动了摄像机。 音效：沉重的钢铁切割空气的呼啸声，震耳欲聋的轰鸣声。 0:10-0:15 - [低角度主观镜头/重型地面锚定]. 在翻滚中，一个泥泞覆盖的钢铁手套疯狂地从泥泞中抓起一把被丢弃的宽剑。当巨人再次冲锋时，骑士坚定地将剑柄牢牢地锚定在地面上，将剑尖向上瞄准。咆哮的巨人纯粹向下的动量使其猛烈地撞击在锚定的刀刃上，在紧张的、残酷的动能碰撞中停止了冲锋。装甲手套在画面中剧烈摇晃，努力抵抗着推动下压的巨大生物的沉重压力。 音效：沉重的物理撞击声，巨人挣扎时深沉的低音咆哮声。 技术及渲染： - 相机：狂乱、沉重的第一人称主观视角，模拟人类身处铁甲内的重量感，通过头盔面罩限制视野范围。 - 光线：弥散、阴沉的黄昏，冷色调且带有刺眼的金属反射。 - 镜头：24mm（模拟人眼视野但被头盔外壳扭曲）。 - 修饰：使用 35mm 胶片拍摄，照片级真实感，电影氛围照明，高度细节，原始素材，电影画面，8k 分辨率，体积渲染。 细节与纹理： - 头盔的开放式面罩缝隙处，厚重铁质框架上凝固着凹痕和厚泥，确保视野完全不受任何非自然玻璃反光的阻碍。 - 巨人食人魔粗糙、崎岖的灰绿色皮革皮肤，沾满汗水和污垢。 - 摇晃的钢铁护手甲上，有深深的、参差不齐的刮痕和生锈的凹陷。 音效层： 0:00-0:04: 激烈的战场环境音突然被震耳欲聋的金属撞击声切断。 0:04-0:10: 刺耳的持续耳鸣声完全掩盖了外部声音，头盔内急促、吃力的呼吸声。 0:10-0:15: 沉重的金属碰撞声，深沉的咆哮声逐渐穿透逐渐减弱的耳鸣声。

title: Spirit Tiger vs Void Panther Combat Video Prompt
description: A detailed prompt for generating a 15-second sequence in Seedance 2.0 depicting a combat scene between a luminous white tiger and a colossal black panther in a mist-covered bamboo forest, emphasizing photorealistic fur, volumetric rain, and cinematic camera work with velocity ramping.
content:
A mist-covered bamboo forest at dusk with deep jade-green ambient light and silver moonlight filtering through dense leaves. Rain falling steadily onto moss-covered rocks and shallow pools, creating reflective surfaces for diegetic lighting. Wind pushes the bamboo stalks in rhythmic waves.

**Action:**

15.0s sequence. A massive white tiger with luminous blue markings along its fur stalks through the bamboo forest while a colossal black panther with glowing amber eyes circles in the shadows. They engage in rapid, low-to-the-ground combat across wet forest terrain. Every leap sends arcs of water spraying from the ground while claws carve glowing trails through the rain.

Velocity Ramp choreography: the tiger’s mid-air pounce slows to ultra-slow motion as both animals collide, fur and water droplets suspended in the air before snapping back to full speed as they crash through bamboo stalks.

**Camera:**

Handheld ground-level tracking through the bamboo forest, occasionally catching the fight reflected in rain puddles before snapping focus back to the animals as they burst through the foliage.

**Style & Constraints:**

Photorealistic fur simulation, volumetric rain particles, ray-traced reflections on wet ground, cinematic moonlight, 35mm film grain, stable geometry, 8K.

title: Crimson Relic-War Transformation and Angel Fight
description: An ultra-cinematic, 15-second live-action prompt requiring three reference images for character design. It describes a woman transforming into a crimson relic-war form in an abandoned financial district and immediately engaging in a fast, violent fight with a radiant angelic war-saint.
content:
Use the provided images as exact references for the woman, her transformed crimson relic-war form, and the radiant angelic war-saint. 15-second ultra-cinematic live-action sequence in an abandoned financial district boulevard by day, overcast sky, cracked pavement, wrecked cars, broken glass, drifting dust, damaged towers, grounded realism.

A woman walks alone down the center of the street holding a black crystalline relic shard. She stops and crushes it in her fist. Crimson-violet light bursts through her fingers and a shockwave throws dust and debris outward. In fast clean stages, black obsidian and pale ivory armor grows over her body, deep crimson fissures ignite, her face remains partly recognizable, and a crimson blade forms in her hand. Back arc-blades match the reference but stay rigid and attached-looking. Dust settles. A radiant angelic war-saint appears down the boulevard with white ceramic armor, gold seams, pale-gold eyes, rigid back fins, and a long execution spear. The angel attacks first with a fast spear rush. She blocks, reverses instantly, closes distance unnaturally fast, and slashes through the angel’s torso. White-gold armor fractures with blinding light. End on impact. No extra limbs, no duplicate parts, no logos, no text, no watermark.

title: White Tiger Hunter in Glacial Canyon
description: A highly detailed prompt for a 15-second photorealistic sequence generated by Seedance 2, depicting a massive glacier tiger stalking prey in a vast frozen valley under pale twilight. The prompt includes specific camera angles (predator-eye POV), action choreography (sprint, massive leap), and a velocity ramp effect.
content:
A vast frozen valley under pale twilight. Towering glacier walls reflect soft blue light across the snowfield while wind sweeps fine snow particles across the surface. The frozen ground glitters with crystalline frost.

**Action:**

15.0s sequence from the first-person perspective of a massive glacier tiger stalking prey. The viewer sees white fur edges at the bottom of frame and faint icy vapor in each breath. The tiger moves silently through deep snow while distant footsteps echo across the frozen valley.

At the 2-second mark the tiger breaks into a sprint. Snow explodes outward beneath its paws as the camera races low across the terrain.

A herd of elk appears ahead near a frozen river.

Velocity Ramp choreography: the tiger launches into a massive leap as the moment slows — snow crystals and frost particles suspended in the air before snapping back to real-time speed as the tiger lands across the ice.

The frozen river cracks violently beneath the impact.

**Camera:**

Low predator-eye POV racing just above the snow surface, with occasional head tilts revealing the immense glacier walls surrounding the hunt.

**Style & Constraints:**

Photorealistic fur edges, volumetric snow particles, cinematic cold lighting, realistic animal motion physics, 8K.

title: Cinematic Long Take Action Sequence
description: A complex, multi-part prompt for Seedance 2.0 requesting a cinematic long take action sequence featuring a Chinese youth flying a kite through city streets, performing parkour, and landing with a dramatic drumbeat. The prompt includes detailed instructions for fluid movement, specific style transitions (Makoto Shinkai to ink wash), camera work, and even contradictory elements (American military band on campus) to test the model's adherence.
content: "Generate a cinematic, large-scale action long take animation. Theme: A Chinese youth flies a kite through crowded streets, leaps up steps, flips and lands, dashes toward a high platform, and executes a difficult jump. The drumbeat erupts the moment he lands. One single continuous shot throughout, no cuts, fluid movements, clear weight, inertia, and landing cushioning. Style transition: 0–5s: Clear, highly saturated yet controlled Makoto Shinkai style, with moist reflections. 6–10s: Ink wash explosion; background buildings simplified with ink strokes, speed lines in dry-brush splatter style, drumbeats visualized as ink shockwaves. The protagonist and kite must remain clearly defined. 4K video, American military marching band with over 50 members parading on campus, sunny weather. Band in formal dark blue military uniforms with golden epaulets, marching in neat formation. Brass players perform classic military marches, drummers play steady rhythms, conductor leads with a baton. Background: cheering students, American flags, ancient red-brick campus buildings. Camera: dynamic tracking, alternating wide and medium shots, smooth movement. Audio: stereo brass melodies, drumbeats, crowd cheers. Atmosphere: bright, energetic, patriotic, warm sunlight tones."

title: Sand-punk Desert Pursuit
description: A high-octane action prompt involving a scavenger girl and a colossal mechanical sandworm in a steampunk desert setting.
content:
A rugged scavenger girl with wind-sail wings, sand goggles, and scrap-metal armor drops into frame in the first two seconds, surfing down a massive dune at insane speed as the sand ERUPTS behind her—
a colossal sandworm engine beast with rotating drill jaws and steam exhaust bursts from beneath the desert, instantly creating the hook.
The animation becomes a high-speed sand punk pursuit—racing across dunes, launching off broken airship wreckage, grinding along rusted rail tracks, and weaving through abandoned desert cities half-buried in sand.
She fights back using:
– explosive scrap mines
– grappling hooks attached to wind sails
– spinning blade traps
– sand-smoke flares for stealth
The worm grows more aggressive—its mechanical segments splitting open, engines overheating, الرمال turning into shockwaves as it tunnels and leaps across the surface.
Visual style: dusty cinematic steampunk desert—golden sunlight, heat haze distortion, blowing الرمال, rust textures, dramatic silhouettes.
Final moment: she launches high using her wind sails, dives down with a final strike—
The worm collapses.
Its core opens.
Inside…
a small trapped desert creature, weak and trembling, unknowingly powering the beast.

title: Urban Time-Shift Martial Arts Epic: Cat Ninja vs. Tiger Warrior
description: A highly detailed, action-packed prompt for Seedance 2.0 generating an 'Urban Time-Shift Martial Arts Epic' video. It features a fight between a Cat Ninja and a White Tiger Warrior, transitioning the battle scene from 16th-century Rome's Trevi Fountain to 21st-century Venice's canals, emphasizing cinematic effects, speed, and a clash of dark shadow energy versus white martial aura.
content:
都市時空穿越武道大片(Urban Time-Shift Martial Arts Epic)。頂級電影特效，極速剪輯節奏，強調力量、速度與守護意志的極限碰撞。視覺風格強烈對比：一方是暗影凝聚的東方巨龍能量，另一方是純白剛勁的武道氣場屏障。時空在戰鬥中撕裂重組。

【場景】
戰場從16世紀羅馬的特雷維噴泉開始——石雕神像、流動水池、燭光與月色交織；隨著戰鬥升級，空間逐漸扭曲破碎，最終延伸至21世紀的威尼斯運河——霓虹燈倒映水面，水氣與現代燈光交錯，歷史與現代重疊。

【角色】

橘貓忍者：穿黑色忍者裝束，身形敏捷，橘色毛髮在夜色中若隱若現，雙眼銳利發光，周身環繞暗影氣流。
白老虎武者：壯碩白虎，身穿跆拳道服與黑帶，肌肉線條分明，氣勢沉穩，周身環繞白色氣浪與震動波紋。

【分鏡腳本】

[00:00–00:03] 鏡頭1：古城開戰·速度試探
機位：高速滑軌＋手持混合運鏡(Dynamic Tracking + Handheld)。
畫面：特雷維噴泉前，水花飛濺。橘貓忍者瞬間消失又出現，殘影連續閃現；白老虎穩站原地，以最小動作格擋攻擊。拳腳碰撞間激起水柱與碎石，雕像表面出現裂痕。

[00:03–00:06] 鏡頭2：時空撕裂·場景轉換
機位：旋轉升空鏡頭(Spiral Rise Shot)。
畫面：兩者一次猛烈對撞，能量爆開——空間如玻璃碎裂。背景從古羅馬石雕快速扭曲，轉為威尼斯運河。水面翻湧，貢多拉劇烈晃動，霓虹燈在水中扭曲反射。
特寫：橘貓低吼，黑影氣流如煙翻騰；白虎踏水而立，腳下水面出現同心圓氣紋。

[00:06–00:11] 鏡頭3：絕技對轟·龍與氣場
機位：史詩級廣角全景(Epic Wide Shot)。
動作（同步爆發）：
橘貓忍者：雙爪結印猛然推出，暗影能量凝聚成一條巨大東方巨龍(Eastern Shadow Dragon)，龍鱗細節清晰，盤旋升空，張口咆哮，帶動水氣與霓虹光流席捲前方。
白老虎武者：雙掌前推，白色氣場屏障瞬間展開(White Martial Aura Barrier)，氣流層層擴散，如水波與震動波交織，穩定而厚重。
特效碰撞：巨龍猛烈撞擊氣場，爆發巨大衝擊波，水面炸裂升空，運河兩側建築玻璃震碎，霓虹燈閃爍失控。

[00:11–00:13] 鏡頭4：壓制與反擊
機位：快速推進鏡頭(Rapid Push-in)。
畫面：白色氣場出現裂紋，但白虎怒吼發力，肌肉繃緊，氣場瞬間反震。巨龍被撕裂一部分，黑影能量四散如煙。橘貓被震退，在水面滑行數米，濺起高牆般水浪。

[00:13–00:15] 鏡頭5：終局定格·對峙未完
機位：慢動作定格＋環繞(Freeze + Slow Orbit)。
畫面：威尼斯夜色中，水氣瀰漫。白老虎穩站水面中央，氣場緩緩收斂；橘貓半蹲於漂浮木板上，黑影氣流再次凝聚。兩者對視——戰意未熄。背景霓虹在水霧中閃爍，時空裂縫仍隱約可見，能量光點緩緩飄散。

title: Epic Cyberpunk Aerial Combat Sequence
description: An extremely detailed, multi-stage prompt for Seedance 2.0 that defines protagonist details, environmental atmosphere, combat choreography, and specific camera techniques for an aerial battle.
content: 日本人女性が主人公。舞台は崩壊した近未来都市の超高層ビル群の上空。壊れた高架通路、崩れた外壁、空中に突き出した鉄骨、割れたガラス、煙、粉塵、青白い逆光、点滅するネオン、火花が漂う夜の空間。地上は遠く、常に落下の危険がある高所。相手は人型の重装甲ファイター。武器は使わず、素手のみの高速格闘戦。主人公は小柄で俊敏な日本人女性。クローキングを使いながら空中機動、壁走り、飛び移り、急降下を駆使して戦う。映像はシネマティックで、スピード感と重力感を強く出す。テキスト・字幕なし。冒頭は、崩壊した高層ビル群の上空を見せるワイドショットから始まる。壊れた空中通路の先で主人公が低く構え、向かい側には人型の重装甲ファイターが立っている。遠くの都市の灯り、漂う煙、強い高低差があり、静かな緊張感が流れている。敵が一気に踏み込み、足場を砕きながら突進する。主人公はクローキングを発動し、残像のような歪みを残して高速回避。そのまま崩れた壁面へ飛びつき、壁走りや飛び移りを使って立体的に移動する。敵も大きく跳躍しながら追撃し、両者は高層ビルの谷間を横断するように空中で交錯する。戦闘は、空中移動と素手格闘が連続する激しい展開。すれ違いざまの打撃、回避、急接近、空中での姿勢制御、壁や足場を使った再加速などを組み合わせる。衝突のたびに火花、粉塵、衝撃波が発生し、常に落下の危険がある危うさを見せる。中盤では、主人公がクローキングで敵の視界を外し、位置をずらしながら背後や上方へ回り込む。敵は重い一撃で外壁や足場を破壊しながら押し込み、周囲の構造物が崩れ始める。主人公は崩れる瓦礫や壁面を利用して軌道を変え、落下しながらも空中戦を継続する。後半では、足場がさらに崩壊し、両者は高所から落下しながら肉弾戦を続ける。主人公はクローキングを解除しつつ至近距離へ飛び込み、素手の連撃を叩き込む。敵も反撃し、互いの拳と体がぶつかるたびに重い衝突感を見せる。背景のビル群が高速で流れ、空中での位置関係が激しく変化していく。ラストでは、一瞬の静けさのあと、主人公が崩れた構造物を利用して最後の加速を得る。壁面を駆け上がるように移動し、その反動で大きく跳躍。空中でクローキングを解除しながら急降下し、全体重を乗せた決定的な素手の一撃を敵へ叩き込む。衝突の瞬間はスローモーションになり、衝撃波とともにガラスや瓦礫が飛び散り、敵は下方へ吹き飛ばされる。主人公は崩れた鉄骨の上に着地し、煙と風、遠くで点滅するネオンの中で静かに立つ。カメラ演出は、ワイドショット、空中追従、低空アングル、回転カメラ、急接近のズーム、落下を見せる俯瞰ショットを使用。スピードランプ、モーションブラー、ヒットストップ、ニアミス演出を入れ、重力感、高低差、空中での位置変化をわかりやすく見せる。映像スタイルはリアル寄りのシネマティック、またはリアルとアニメのハイブリッド。
