title: Seedance 2.0 Video Prompt: Vehicle-to-Mech Transformation
description: A detailed, multi-part prompt for Seedance 2.0 to create a continuous shot video of a matte red endurance race car transforming into a road-mech while moving along a stormy coastal highway. The prompt includes both English and Chinese versions for the motion sequence, emphasizing cinematic realism and mechanical articulation.
content:
Seedance 2.0  motion prompt: One-take transformation action. A matte red endurance race car races along a stormy coastal highway at twilight, tires spraying water. The camera pushes close to the front quarter panel and tracks alongside as the car swerves around wreckage. Without slowing, the hood splits, wheels rotate, suspension arms extend, and body panels unfold into limbs while the chassis remains in forward motion. The transforming machine vaults over a collapsed barrier, lands as a fully formed road-mech still sprinting down the highway, then punches through crashing debris as lightning flashes over the sea cliffs. Rain, sparks, realistic mechanical articulation, dark metallic palette, full speed transformation with no cut.

If english prompt is rejected use the chinese one
一. 载具变形类：救援穿越车 图片提示词： 暴雨黄昏，一辆暗红色未来救援车高速行驶在海边断裂公路上，路面湿滑反光，远处风暴云压城，车身线条硬朗，带有应急警示灯和工程结构感，无驾驶员特写，原创设计，电影级工业写实风格。 Seedance2.0运镜词： 一镜到底，暴雨黄昏，一辆暗红色未来救援车在海边高架公路上高速疾驰，轮胎卷起大片水雾，镜头贴近车身前侧低角度跟拍，闪烁的应急灯在湿漉漉的路面上拉出红色反光。前方公路突然出现巨大断裂缺口，车辆在不断前进中开始重构变形：四个车轮向内收折，底盘升高，车身两侧展开为多段机械支撑臂，尾部伸出稳定平衡装置，顶部感应模块升起，前脸与底盘重组为一台非人形的多足跨越式救援机械载具。整个变形过程保持高速推进，机械关节咬合清晰，金属结构富有重量感。最终它稳稳跨过断桥缺口，落在对岸闪烁着求救信号的平台前，暴雨、火花、水雾与机械细节交织，电影级写实，紧张感强，无武器，无人形机甲感。

title: Underwater Coral Mech Chase
description: A detailed cinematic video prompt for an aquatic fantasy scene involving a pearl diver child escaping a mechanical coral leviathan with specific action cues and visual style notes.
content: A young pearl diver kid with glowing coral armor, fluid hair drifting in water, and a shell-powered jet pack rockets into frame in the first two seconds, spiraling through a reef tunnel as a massive coral mech leviathan crashes through the ocean floor behind him, instantly creating the hook. The chase unfolds through a breathtaking underwater kingdom— swimming through glowing reefs, weaving between ancient submerged temples, diving into abyss trenches, and bursting through schools of bioluminescent fish. He fights back using: – pressure pulse blasts – spinning shell shields – ink decoys that distort vision – coral spike projectiles The leviathan constantly escalates—its विशाल body reshaping, tentacles splitting into mechanical arms, crushing ruins, and generating whirlpool currents that drag everything inward. Visual style: dreamlike aquatic fantasy—neon blues, glowing coral pinks, drifting particles, slow-motion water physics, cinematic light rays. Final moment: inside a sacred sunken pearl shrine, he launches a final charged strike— The leviathan fractures. Inside… a tiny lost sea creature is revealed, tangled in coral circuitry, glowing softly, frightened.

title: Seedance 2.0 Chinese Ink Style Cat vs Dog Battle Prompt
description: A comprehensive Seedance 2.0 prompt for generating a high-energy, Chinese ink-style (Wushan Wuxing/Fog Hill of Five Elements) battle video between a 'Knife-Shield Dog' and a 'Banana Cat'. The prompt details the characters, their elemental attributes (Fire/Metal/Earth vs. Water/Wood/Ice), the high-contrast red/black/gold color palette, and four distinct, action-packed camera sequences leading to a massive elemental clash climax.
content:
雾山五行正统国漫画风，锐利硬边水墨线条，高对比红黑与青金主色调，电影级光影，国风奇幻战斗美学，强打击感，强能量碰撞感，16:9，时长15秒，画面流畅丝滑，动作连贯清晰，动态张力拉满，整体质感高级，特效炸裂但画面不乱。

角色设定：
角色一：刀盾狗，手持菜刀与盾牌，近战压迫感极强，火、金、土属性为主，战斗风格刚猛霸道，爆发力强，冲击感十足。战斗中高喊：“我的刀盾！”
角色二：香蕉猫，身法灵动诡谲，水、木、冰属性为主，动作轻巧迅疾，带水墨妖异感与东方灵气。战斗中高喊：“比比拉布！”

镜头1（开场爆发）：
断崖古林之巅，狂风卷动，雾气翻涌，刀盾狗与香蕉猫隔空对峙后瞬间出手。刀盾狗掌心爆发赤红烈焰罡气，火浪席卷前冲；香蕉猫周身凝聚幽蓝水墨漩涡，水龙咆哮冲出。火浪与水龙在空中正面碰撞，瞬间炸开大片蒸腾雾气与墨色冲击波，林木折断，山石崩裂，碎石与火星四散。低角度高速推进，镜头微震，穿插气劲对撞特写，节奏凌厉，刀盾狗嘶吼：“我的刀盾！”

镜头2（高速游斗）：
双方瞬间贴身，高速移动残影交错，展开极致流畅的近中距离连续打斗。刀盾狗挥盾冲撞、挥刀斩击，烈焰化作火蛇狂噬，金属性刃雨倾泻压制，攻势如洪流碾压；香蕉猫则以水墨长鞭抽击，木藤疾速缠绕，借身法腾挪闪避，反击刁钻迅猛。两者元素互克，火与水、金与木不断碰撞爆闪。镜头环绕急速运转，快速切镜与丝滑跟焦结合，动作清晰不糊，强光影爆闪中，香蕉猫高喊：“比比拉布！”

镜头3（环境缠斗）：
战斗升级到环境破坏层面。刀盾狗猛踏地面，引动地脉，大片土石隆起轰砸；香蕉猫借水汽凝成锋利冰棱，从侧面高速反刺。火焰焚烧古林，却被水墨瀑布强行扑灭；金属利刃飞旋突进，又被暴长木藤缠绕绞碎。地面不断龟裂，断木横飞，山壁崩口，焚毁的林木又在水木之力下诡异重生。镜头加入慢动作特写突出元素交锋细节，再切回超广角展现战场全貌，伴随明显震动反馈。刀盾狗再次咆哮：“我的刀盾！”

镜头4（大招对轰，高潮终结）：
双方同时开启最强领域。刀盾狗展开赤红黑金火焰战域，烈焰升腾，金刃盘旋，土石升空，形成毁灭性压迫场；香蕉猫开启幽蓝青金水墨灵域，水龙盘绕，木藤遮天，冰棱如雨，墨浪翻卷。双领域在断崖古林中央正面碰撞，天地失色，能量疯狂挤压后轰然爆裂，形成巨型火水墨三重冲击波，整片山林被瞬间掀翻。最终刀盾狗顶着冲击正面突进，盾牌破浪，菜刀燃起极致烈焰，一刀斩穿核心能量；香蕉猫也裹挟水墨龙影迎面冲杀，双方在最强一击中定格对撞。最后以超强爆炸收尾，雾气、火星、墨流、碎石同时炸开，画面震撼收束。

成片要求：
整体节奏参考《雾山五行》式高燃国漫战斗演出，运镜凌厉，动作必须清晰流畅，打击感强，能量碰撞炸裂，环境破坏明显，角色个性鲜明，四个镜头层层递进，最终高潮爆发，保证15秒内完成一场极具观赏性的顶级国风元素大战。

title: Seedance 2.0 Prompt for 'Card Check' Transition Video
description: An extremely detailed, time-coded, and technically specific prompt for Seedance 2.0 to generate a 10-second video transition sequence, starting with a character manipulating a single card and ending in a dramatic reveal of a new, alluring identity (cat-eared figure). The prompt specifies camera angles, movement dynamics, lighting, and visual effects, strictly prohibiting certain artifacts like extra card particles.
content:
为首帧锁定初始形象，比例 16:9，总时长 10s。画面以 Diagonal Low-angle Medium Close-up（对角线低仰角近景） 开场。

上半身侧探入画面，头部位于左侧。右手食指与中指仅夹住一张单牌侧面横跨画面中心，眼神 Stoic（坚忍冷静），面部呈现 Laser-focused（激光般专注）的 Minimalist（极简）神态。

0s - 2s (开场动能：冷静的物理操纵)： 1.6s 时手腕轻微转动，使这张孤立的牌面翻转展示出红色背面，以此动能为锚点触发镜头回正并执行平滑 Dolly Out 展示中景走廊的冷白矩阵光与高光泽地板。

2s - 4s (空间拉伸与单牌弧线轨迹)：主角双手旋转该（唯一单牌1.5）后向两侧平稳移开（Hands move apart without any throwing motion），该单张扑克牌像被磁力吸引般，以其中心点为轴心，执行平行于地面的高速水平自旋（High-speed horizontal axis-spin），并沿平肩高度执行从右向左的水平半圆弧形轨迹。严禁出现粒子喷射感，严禁牌向镜头方向（Z轴）飞行，空间中绝对禁止出现第二张牌的像素残影（Absolutely zero extra card particles）。与此同时，镜头快速拉远至全景，将视角中心完全留给这张孤立旋转的单牌轨迹。  

4s - 6s (运镜反弹与接牌蓄力)： 镜头借由单牌惯性极速推进（Dolly In），锁回主体。伸左手精准接住这张唯一的单牌并回收手关节蓄力。此时整个物理空间仍保持“单牌真空”状态。

6s - 7s (遮挡转场：从现实到舞台的临界点)： 向镜头正面展示牌面，镜头以牌面为聚焦锚点执行指数级加速冲刺，在 5.5s 时牌面完全占据画面 100% 形成物理遮挡锚点，实现空间阻断。

7s - 10s (身份变异与魅惑定格)： 牌面划开瞬间，丝滑转场至红裙猫耳形象，画面瞬切为 Ultra-wide angle 14mm 强透视构图。位于画面中心，面部表情转变为 Alluring（魅惑）与 Authoritative gaze（权威凝视），带着 Sultry smirk（性感的冷笑）和 Dominant elegance（掌控的优雅）。

主角左手五指张开呈直指镜头的贯穿式动态，手掌由于透视极其巨大，形成破屏感，身体微微后仰。此时背景已切换为深色幕布与金色雕花画框，顶部强逆光在主体猫耳及银发边缘勾勒出锐利的轮廓光边线，红裙材质在侧光下呈现深邃的明暗梯度。

多枚扑克牌作为前景失焦元素慢速旋转，产生撕裂般的空间深度。主体右手食指轻触下颌，目光锁定镜头，画面最终定格在电影级纵深感极强的华丽姿态。

title: Earth's Eye Cinematic Video Prompt
description: A detailed, multi-stage cinematic video prompt for Seedance 2.0, describing a hyper-realistic yet surreal journey from space, free-falling towards Earth, bouncing off landmarks across continents, and forming a giant 'Eye of the Earth' with light arcs.
content:
核心创意：从太空俯瞰地球，镜头以自由落体坠入地球表面，每次撞击地面弹起后落在不同大洲的地标上，弹跳轨迹连成地球上的光弧航线，最终所有光弧构成一只巨大的眼睛。

实拍质感结合超现实视觉奇观，8K超清晰度，太空场景冷蓝色调与地面场景各地特征光影自然切换，真实大气散射光，体积云与粒子特效。

0-2秒：太空视角，地球缓慢自转占据画面右侧三分之二，大气层边缘泛着金色光弧，寂静无声，镜头突然失去控制开始加速坠向地球：第一人称视角自由落体穿入大气层，空气摩擦产生橙红色等离子火焰包裹镜头边缘，画面剧烈震动，音障突破的音爆声炸响，云层以极速向两侧撕裂。

2-4秒：镜头穿破云层，下方是夜晚的巴黎全景，埃菲尔铁塔的灯光急速放大逼近，镜头在即将撞上铁塔尖顶的最后一帧急停：时间冻结，埃菲尔铁塔顶部的灯光如心跳般脉动一次，释放出一圈金色冲击波，冲击波将镜头以弹弓效应弹射向东方，镜头化为一颗流星划过欧洲大陆的夜空，地面的城市灯火如电路板般快速后退，流星尾迹在地球表面留下第一道发光弧线。

4-6秒：流星镜头坠入中国西北上空，穿过一片星轨延时的夜空，砸向长城：镜头贴着长城城墙做超低空飞行，城墙上的砖石被气流掀起悬浮又落下形成波浪，跟拍飞越烽火台时每个烽火台依次点燃烽火，火光照亮周围山脉，镜头从最后一个烽火台的火焰中穿过火焰：火焰的橙色渐变为日出的橙色，镜头已经来到清晨的印度泰姬陵上空，俯拍泰姬陵完美对称的倒影在水池中如曼陀罗图案旋转展开，镜头螺旋下降被倒影吸入水面。

6-8秒：穿入水面后镜头在水下翻转，浮出水面时已是正午的里约热内卢，镜头从海面仰拍基督像张开双臂的剪影逆光画面，镜头以环绕上升的螺旋运镜围绕基督像攀升到与其平齐的高度，基督像的手指尖端开始凝聚闪电球，闪电球弹射镜头跨越大西洋：镜头化为闪电链在云层间跳跃，每次闪电照亮下方不同地标的瞬间定格：自由女神、金字塔、悉尼歌剧院、富士山，如同上帝视角的高速闪光灯。

8-10秒：最后一道闪电将镜头弹回太空，镜头旋转减速稳定后重新面向地球：此时地球表面所有镜头经过的弹跳轨迹已连成发光弧线，从太空俯瞰这些弧线构成了一只巨大的人类眼睛的形状覆盖在地球表面，眼睛的虹膜由各地标的微缩光点组成，瞳孔位置恰好是地球的蓝色海洋，这只地球之眼缓缓眨动一次，眨眼的瞬间所有地标的光点同时闪烁如呼吸，镜头缓缓后拉地球缩小至画面中央，四周是浩瀚星空，余音为一声悠长的大地之声低鸣混合远处各地标回响的混响叠加渐弱至寂静。

title: The Sewing Master - Seedance 2.0 Video Prompt
description: A highly detailed, multi-section prompt for Seedance 2.0 to generate a cinematic video featuring a 'Sewing Master.' The prompt specifies the subject's appearance, attire, action style (blending Wing Chun and Tai Chi), environment, mood, and a detailed 15-second timeline with specific camera angles and visual effects, emphasizing precision, tension, and ritualistic elegance.
content:
SUBJECTS (主体):
人物： 一位身形极度干练、手臂肌肉线条如钢丝般的女性高定裁缝，眼神冷冽如针尖。
着装： 融合了旗袍元素的深色战术马甲，双臂裸露，前臂缠绕着暗红色的丝绸护腕（用于增加摩擦力）；手指修长且指尖带有金属护具。 
动作风格： 融合了“咏春”的寸劲与“太极”的圆转。动作遵循（蓄力 → 极速出击 → 瞬间静止）的节奏，强调手指的爆发力和丝绸在空中的张力。

ENVIRONMENT (环境):
昏暗的高级私人工作室。背景是整面墙的红木线轴架，成千上万个色块形成几何美感；中心是一张巨大的黑色大理石裁剪台，表面光可鉴人。上方悬挂着单点聚焦的工业冷光灯，空气中漂浮着细微的纤维微粒。

MOOD (氛围):
极度专注、肃杀、带有仪式感的华丽；动作如外科医生般精确，视觉感官上极具压迫性。

TIMELINE (时间线):
0:00-0:02: 特写/广角POV。 裁缝双手撑在黑色大理石台面，低头静止。镜头极速推进，她猛然抬头，双眼锁定镜头（眼神杀）。右手虚空一抓，一匹暗紫色的重磅真丝像长蛇一样从台面滑过，被她单手“锁”住。

0:02-0:05: 剪辑切换/手持感。 裁缝将绸缎抛向空中。她身形如残影，右手持银色长剪，在绸缎下落的瞬间进行“盲剪”。不是普通的裁剪，而是伴随着武术出拳的劲道，剪刀划过空气发出“嗤”的破空声，布料断口极其平整，丝毫不乱。
0:05-0:07: 移动镜头。 她一个侧跨步滑到工作台另一端。单手横扫，数枚钢针从针垫上震起，悬浮在半空。她运劲一推，钢针像暗器一样精准没入远处的衣架样版中，针尾震颤，发出金属鸣音。

0:07-0:10: 连续镜头。 裁缝开始“控线”。她扯出一条金丝，通过手指指缝的缠绕，像操纵傀儡线一样控制绸缎在空中自动折叠、成型。每一次手指的弹拨都伴随着火花般的静电。她用肘部撞击台面，压脚弹起，她瞬间接住并锁死在面料上。

0:10-0:12: 匹配剪辑。 裁缝原地一个急转，外衣下摆如圆阵散开。她双手合拢，将成型的西装领口猛地一拉，最后一道金线在空中划出完美的弧线自动缝合。动作从极快（残影）瞬间切入极慢（定格）。

0:12-0:15: 稳定POV。 尘埃落定。她单手拎起成品礼服，用力一振，礼服在镜头前展开。镜头聚焦在领口的精美刺绣上。她用指甲轻弹纽扣——纽扣颤动。随后她转身走向阴影，留下一道背影，画面被升起的昂贵香水雾气完全覆盖，干净利落地淡出。

title: Surreal Ronin Action Scene
description: A highly detailed, cinematic prompt for Seedance 2.0 describing a complex action sequence: a masked ronin fighting a colossal winged beast on floating rock islands during a thunderstorm, with specific camera movements and a dramatic finale.
content:
A surreal battlefield in the sky: floating rock islands drifting through a thunderstorm, clouds swirling below like an ocean. The masked ronin dashes across the drifting platforms, pursued by a colossal winged beast whose chest is a swirling vortex of storm clouds and lightning. The camera hurtles from island to island, struggling to keep up as rocks tilt, spin, and crumble away beneath them. Every wingbeat sends shockwaves through the air, shaking the frame and blowing debris and rain straight into the viewer’s face. Rapid handheld cuts capture the ronin leaping impossible gaps, sword carving arcs of light that briefly cut through the darkness. The finale shows the camera diving behind him as he jumps off the last crumbling rock, riding a bolt of lightning directly into the monster’s chest vortex with a final, all-or-nothing slash that explodes the storm from within and clears the sky in a blinding flash.

720p
16:9

title: Equestrian Charge in Vancouver Luxury District
description: A detailed, multi-scene prompt for a video depicting a figure in a dark suit riding a white horse through a high-end Vancouver neighborhood in winter, followed by supporters waving flags. The prompt specifies locations, actions, camera work (low angle, close-up tracking), and atmosphere.
content:
场景1：豪宅大门前策马狂奔（0:00-0:05，5秒）
• 地点：温哥华西区顶级豪宅正门前（大型庄园式别墅，石材/木结构大门，宽阔车道入口，常绿树篱环绕）
• 主体：身穿深色西装的人物策马从豪宅大门疾驰而出
• 马匹动作：白马四蹄腾空，鬃毛飞扬，以快步或小跑姿态猛冲而出
• 环境：冬季，轻雪被马蹄溅起飞扬，豪宅建筑清晰可见（大落地窗、木石结合、多层露台），远处北岸山脉或海洋轮廓隐现，常绿松树覆盖薄雪
• 人群：两侧支持者闪避让路同时挥舞黄色龙旗（蓝色龙图案+日之丸元素）欢呼，举“Nothing”白色标牌
• 镜头：正面拍摄，白马直冲镜头，动感强烈（轻微低角度强化冲击力）
• 氛围：凌厉出场，势不可挡，高端私密社区的震撼登场

场景2：群众追赶特写（0:05-0:09，4秒）
• 地点：豪宅区林荫私家弯曲道路旁
• 主体：支持者群体追着马匹奔跑（年轻人为主，穿冬季羽绒服/大衣）
• 动作：边跑边高举双手、呐喊、挥拳，试图跟上马速，有些人差点跌倒但仍兴奋追逐
• 标识：黄色龙旗 + “Nothing”白色标牌被人举着奔跑（标牌晃动）
• 背景：豪宅外墙与常绿松树快速掠过，轻雪雾气或树影模糊晃动，远处山峦掠过
• 镜头：跟拍特写，镜头轻微晃动营造紧迫感与速度（手持式或快速推拉）
• 氛围：追逐狂热，急促激动，社区居民的狂热响应
场景3：豪宅侧面飞驰横穿（0:09-0:15，6秒）
• 地点：豪宅侧面景观车道或草坪延伸区域（侧面可见大露台、泳池边或花园，常绿树篱）
• 主体：人物骑白马以疾驰状态横穿画面
• 马匹动作：全速奔跑，四蹄离地瞬间清晰可见，马尾如旗帜飘扬，雪花被溅起

title: Flower Goddess Descent Cinematic Prompt (Epic Fantasy)
description: An extremely detailed, multi-scene cinematic prompt for Seedance 2.0 to generate an epic fantasy video of an Eastern Flower Goddess descending. The prompt specifies character design (ethereal, cold beauty, divine aura, elaborate gown with flowing ribbons and light effects), scene setting (giant flower pistil throne, divine light), visual quality (8K, extreme detail, dynamic camera work), and a seven-step sequence of divine actions and cosmic effects (flower blooming, light streams, creation dance, explosion of petals).
content:
人物设定 
东方花仙少女，鹅蛋脸、冷白皮、柳叶眉、桃花眼，神情清冷空灵，自带上古花神神性气场。
 
身着粉白极光鎏金仙神礼裙：
 
主体珠光粉→月光白→极光银三层渐变流光仙纱，层叠如云海花瓣，裙摆绣满活态永生花灵纹，自带微光流转
双肩繁花镂空银晶肩饰，镶嵌粉钻与流光碎晶，垂落多层半透圣光长纱
双臂纯白流光广袖，延伸出上百条粉白渐变繁花飘带、蝶翼纱带、银蕊光带，缀满发光粉晶花、灵蝶碎饰，一动即漫天流光
腰束繁花鎏金仙封腰饰，垂落多层花瓣裙摆，行走间如花海翻涌
配饰：银底粉晶繁花垂坠耳饰、多层珍珠花神颈链、花神戒指、流光花镯，周身环绕粉紫柔光神霭
 
场景与画质
 少女端坐于万丈巨型粉白渐变仙花蕊王座，花蕊层层绽放泛着神性柔光；整体粉白+紫调冷色，梦幻空灵。
浅景深、极致丁达尔圣光、朦胧泛光虚化、超写实8K电影级画质，发丝级细节、光影层次炸裂、明暗对比强烈、动态模糊运镜、色彩浓郁高级。
 
全程震撼分镜（视频/AI直接可用）
 
全程空灵神性史诗BGM，弦乐+圣咏+花灵轻响。
 
1. 少女端坐花蕊中央，清冷抬眸，指尖凝出一点粉紫金花神灵光。
2. 屈指轻弹向天一点，镜头冲天——横贯天际的万丈巨型创世神花轰然绽放，遮天蔽日，霞光炸裂。
3. 镜头极速拉回，少女清冷浅笑，抬手轻挥，数十道粉白光流直冲九霄。
4. 整片苍穹亿万朵巨型神花瞬间铺满，接连爆炸式绽放，粉紫神光倾泻天地。
5. 少女化作贯穿天地的粉色极光流光直冲天际，镜头极限高速推进。
6. 她在云端花海踏出上古花神创世神舞，旋身、踏空、扬袖，飘带舒展如神翼。
7. 高速运镜、环绕、俯冲、特写切换，亿万神花同步爆绽，花瓣狂舞、光粒炸裂，与神舞梦幻交织。
8. 终极特写：清冷含笑眉眼，指尖流淌花神灵力，天地被花海吞没，神性定格。
 
音效与特效
 
音效：史诗BGM+巨型花绽轰鸣+花灵清响+空间震颤+流光破空声
特效：创世级花海、花瓣爆炸、神光倾泻、空间涟漪、灵蝶流光
运镜：极速推拉、环绕俯冲、高空俯拍、贴脸特写、高光慢动作

title: Cat Emperor Micro-Drama
description: A detailed narrative prompt for a fast-paced, absurd comedic video short. It describes a cat dressed as an ancient Chinese emperor dealing with mouse ministers, culminating in a high-energy, exaggerated action sequence with specific camera instructions (fast cuts, whip pans, motion blur).
content:
A fast-paced comedic parody Seedance 2 short set in an ancient imperial study. An orange cat dressed as Qin Shi Huang in Han-style golden dragon robes sits behind a large desk. Gray mice in minister outfits line up, each stepping forward with scrolls. The cat barely looks and scribbles messy, meaningless brush strokes, moving faster and faster.

Dialogue (overlapping): Mice: “Your Majesty, urgent matter!” “National crisis!” Cat: “Approved. Next. Whatever.”

Suddenly, the cat slams the desk and shouts, “ENOUGH!!” He stands up and kicks the mice one by one, sending them flying like rockets. Final shot: he smugly adjusts his robe and strides out, saying, “This empire runs perfectly.”

Camera: fast cuts, whip pans, strong motion blur, 0.6–1.2s pacing, ending in slow motion. Tone: absurd, exaggerated, high-energy comedy.

title: Seedance 2.0 Video Prompt: News Report and Action Scene
description: A highly detailed and complex prompt designed for Seedance 2.0 to generate a video with two distinct parts: a professional news report segment and a gritty, found-footage style action sequence featuring a female protagonist fighting zombies. The prompt specifies detailed visual aesthetics, camera work (handheld shake, motion blur), sound design (sirens, radio static, rough field audio), and a specific narrative structure, aiming for a low-fidelity, old-school CRT monitor look with VHS noise and artifacts.
content:
｛专业的新闻质感：画面左上角“即梦新闻”台标（参考央视新闻频道的感觉），右上角时间码，穿西装领带的主持人在直播间（参考央视新闻直播间的感觉，视野放宽一点，不要怼脸拍）里说（播音腔）：“近日，美国科罗拉多州某工业城市突发严重的公共卫生事件，请看前方记者发回的报道。”
纪实画面：台标、时间码保持不变，台标下有红色REC时间戳，时间码下叠加半透明白色字体“资料画面”；底部字幕：“科罗拉多州突发公共卫生事件，相关企业涉嫌非法生物实验”；滚动新闻条：“负责调查郊外列车遇袭事件的STARTS小队遭重创，UBCS也未能控制局面，目前联邦政府已紧急封锁该市，不排除采取极端措施杜绝病毒扩散的可能”。
大噪点、杂色、低像素、低饱和度、强烈光影反差，画面倾斜+手持抖动+运动模糊，闪烁光效+镜头眩光，严重偏色褪色，呈现老式CRT显示器惨绿色调，伴有明显VHS噪点、扫描线，镜头表面有灰尘、污渍和划痕，画面四周有光圈暗角、取景框，时不时出现短暂花屏。现场持续的消防车、救护车鸣笛声，杂音较大、听不清晰的无线电通讯声，全程保留粗糙现场收音感，伴随短暂花屏杂音。
剧情：身穿蓝色露肩无袖上衣，黑色短裙，腰系白色短薄毛衣，黑色长靴，肩背黑色警用背带，脸型消瘦的欧美女子，留着干练的棕褐色齐肩短发（直发，不要太蓬），身材高挑修长，大长腿，左手反持手电筒，手电筒射出一束冷白色的光（同射击方向），右手持手枪，规范的哈里斯持枪式，且战且退，战术动作专业娴熟，具有极高的战术素养，若干丧尸从多个方向缓慢靠近（丧尸身体中枪后仍继续前行，只有被爆头后才倒下），短暂花屏收尾。
背景播报：“据内部知情人士透露，涉事企业高层因内部权力纷争，致其核心研究员意外身亡，病毒容器遭毁，并通过下水道啮齿目动物扩散。”，使用普通话作为视频语言，使用写实风的画面风格生成素材，使用专业权威风格的数字人形象，使用专业权威风格的音色，使用紧张的视频情绪生成素材｝

title: Hollywood Haute Couture Fantasy Video Prompt
description: A detailed, multi-scene video generation prompt for Seedance 2.0, designed to create a Hollywood Haute Couture Fantasy film. The prompt specifies style, resolution (8K), rendering engine (Unreal Engine 5), duration (15 seconds), and three distinct camera/action sequences involving a model in liquid blue-and-white porcelain that shatters into ink-wash swallows, culminating in a 3D fluid ink vortex.
content: 【风格】好莱坞奇幻高定大片(Hollywood Haute Couture Fantasy)，8K超清，真实摄影(Photorealistic)，顶级时尚杂志摄影感(High-fashion Editorial Style)，虚幻引擎5流体渲染，视觉错觉。 【时长】15秒 【场景】一面一望无际的真实天空之镜盐湖。天空是极具压迫感的乌云，地面像镜子一样完美倒映着一切，画面呈现极简的冷色调。 [00:00-00:05] 镜头1：高定登场与瓷器皮肤 机位：极低角度仰拍，超长焦镜头拉近。 动作：一名拥有极具辨识度的高级脸亚洲女模，迈着清冷的台步走在水面上。 特效：她身上穿的不是布料，而是一件由流动的真实青花瓷(Liquid Blue-and-White Porcelain)构成的长裙。随着她的步伐，裙摆像真实的陶瓷一样发出清脆的碰撞声，表面流光溢彩，青蓝色的传统花纹在白瓷质感的裙身上如同活物般游走。 [00:05-00:10] 镜头2：物理碎裂与水墨降临 机位：面部微距特写，跟焦极速拉远。 动作：女模突然停下脚步，冷冷地注视着镜头，打了一个清脆的响指。 特效：响指打响的瞬间，她身上的青花瓷长裙并没有掉落，而是瞬间炸裂成成千上万只极其逼真的水墨燕子(Photorealistic Ink-wash Swallows)。这些燕子带着真实的水滴和墨迹，在空气中拖拽出黑色的流体残影，疯狂地围绕着她旋转。 [00:10-00:15] 镜头3：维度溶解与深渊倒影 机位：高空俯拍，镜头极速旋转下降。 动作：水墨燕子群猛地扎入女模脚下的镜面湖水中。 特效：原本坚硬的盐湖水面瞬间失去了表面张力，整个极其写实的真实世界开始像滴入清水中的浓墨一样剧烈晕染、溶解。真实的乌云和女模的身影全部化作极其宏大的3D流体水墨漩涡(3D Fluid Ink Vortex)，将镜头彻底吞噬进一个黑白交织的深渊。

title: Demon Slayer Live-Action Blockbuster Video Prompt
description: A detailed, three-shot prompt for Seedance 2.0 to generate a hyper-realistic, Hollywood-style live-action adaptation of Demon Slayer (Kimetsu no Yaiba). The prompt specifies the style (IMAX, 8K, Photorealistic, Dark Fantasy, Unreal Engine 5), the setting (misty forest), and three distinct action scenes focusing on realistic physics and effects: Hyper-realistic Fluid Simulation for Water Breathing, Real Plasma Arcs for Thunderclap and Flash, and a Physics Clash with massive particle explosion.
content:
【风格】好莱坞真人特效大片(Hollywood Live-Action Blockbuster)，IMAX电影画质，8K超清，真实摄影(Photorealistic)，暗黑奇幻(Dark Fantasy)，虚幻引擎5写实渲染，无动漫感。
【时长】15秒
【场景】月光下真实的迷雾森林，地面是湿润的泥土和真实的落叶。

[00:00-00:05] 镜头1：真人演绎·水之呼吸(Realistic Water FX)。
【特写】一名亚洲少年剑客(真实演员脸部毛孔可见)，身穿绿黑格纹的粗布羽织(布料纹理清晰)。
动作：他在月光下双手握刀，压低重心。
特效：随着他呼吸，刀刃上并未出现卡通水流，而是凝聚出**高度写实的、透明且发光的加压高压水流(Hyper-realistic Fluid Simulation)**。水流像一条活龙一样缠绕着真实的刀身，水滴飞溅在镜头上，折射出月光。

[00:05-00:10] 镜头2：雷霆一闪·极致速度(Lightning Plasma)。
【中景/高速摄影】对面是一名染着金发的青年剑客(真实发丝飘动)，身穿黄色三角纹理的织物外套。
动作：他做出居合斩的起手式，脚下的泥土因为用力过猛而炸裂。
特效：空气中爆发出**真实的刺眼蓝白色电流(Real Plasma Arcs)**，而不是黄色卡通闪电。电流击穿了周围的真实树木，留下烧焦的痕迹。

[00:10-00:15] 镜头3：宿命对决·物理碰撞(Physics Clash)。
【慢动作/大爆炸】两人在画面中心极速对撞。
动作：实体水流巨剑与雷电光刃狠狠撞击在一起。
特效：没有漫画线条，只有**真实的物理粒子爆炸**。大量的水蒸气、泥浆、被震断的树枝和耀眼的电火花在空中四散飞溅。冲击波将两人脚下的积水震起一圈圈真实的涟漪。画面极具重量感和破坏力。

title: Peach Blossom Sword Dance Performance
description: A comprehensive prompt for Seedance 2.0 to generate a 15-second high-speed Wuxia video featuring a character performing continuous, aggressive sword movements in a peach blossom fairy realm. The prompt details the character's appearance, the fantasy setting, the requirement for high-speed, fluid action without pauses, specific camera work (low-angle push-in, synchronized tracking, rapid cuts, slow-motion highlights), and strong visual effects like glowing swords and scattering petals.
content:
总时长15秒，参考角色
图片1
形象，身着青碧色广袖长袍，腰系玉带，发髻簪冠，衣袂轻扬，面容冷峻英挺，气质凌厉沉静。 【场景基调】 古风奇幻仙境，高山之巅，云雾翻涌如瀑，漫山落英飘散，粉白花瓣如雪席卷；光影对比强烈，暗调打底搭配桃花漫射柔光；画质极细腻，电影级宽画幅构图，高对比度HDR色调，2K超清分辨率。 【角色动作 · 全程】 角色单手持细长古剑，施展高速武术身法，纵跃腾挪，步伐迅疾如风，剑法连绵不断，招式之间无停顿，每一式干净利落、气势凌厉；剑身流动着淡蓝色光晕，剑气轨迹在空中留下流光残影；衣袂随动势剧烈翻飞，发丝、发带随风舞动；全程动作高速流畅，无空档无停顿，节奏紧密酣畅。 【分镜运镜 · 三段式】 0-1秒：超广角低空俯冲推进镜头，强透视感，镜头高速前推并轻微旋转，动态模糊感强，角色从远景跃入近景，气场扑面而来，镜头持续运动不静止。 1-12秒：镜头紧随剑势高速同步移动，急停急启交替；环形环绕跟拍加大幅度甩镜切换视角加高能变焦推拉加极限升格慢镜（仅在关键动作顶点慢放约0.3秒后立即恢复高速），镜头始终以古剑为视觉核心，贴剑追随不偏移；多次快速切换，视角交替（低角仰拍、侧跟平拍、高位俯拍），节奏紧凑。 12-15秒：角色凌空跃起至最高点，双手持剑向下施展收势，剑气能量向四周扩散形成光波涟漪，漫天花瓣与云雾随气流翻涌飞散，花瓣水珠随动势四溅，光柱冲天，镜头缓缓拉远，壮阔全景收尾。 【特效细节】 剑身光晕粒子持续流动，花瓣碎片随招式飞散，云雾随剑气扰动翻涌；动作顶点有真实物理质感，花瓣和水雾颗粒运动轨迹自然；剑鸣声与动作节奏同步共鸣；动作顶点打击质感强烈，慢放瞬间细节清晰震撼，画面张力满格。 【风格标签】 古风奇幻武术表演，写实物理引擎，高速运镜，强动作质感，高对比暗调光影，桃花仙境场景，2K电影级画质。

title: Seedance 2.0 Video Prompt: Seamless Seasonal Transition Skate/Snowboard
description: An extremely detailed, multi-scene, 100% one-shot video prompt for Seedance 2.0, depicting a continuous action sequence of a 2D COS girl skateboarding and snowboarding, featuring seamless seasonal transitions (Spring to Winter) achieved through slow-motion camera movements and costume/scene changes, all synchronized with background music and sound effects.
content: 背景音乐节奏与滑板/滑雪动作速度完全匹配，背景音乐音量低于实景音效，不掩盖滑板与滑雪音效 第一人称滑板后仰视视角，超广角强透视，镜头微晃模拟跟滑体感，一镜到底无切镜、无转场、无断切，人物动作标准流畅，无动作畸变，无多余360度转身，人体结构正常 。 春季：二次元COS小姐姐，穿春季轻薄运动衣，低速入弯快速提速，豚跳压弯，路边嫩绿草木鲜花，海面波光，车轮轻微残影 。 春转夏：小姐姐做出高难度豚跳，瞬间慢镜头，镜头缓慢环绕人物一圈，服装自然渐变夏季短袖，场景顺滑变为盛夏浓绿，季节过渡柔和无突变 。 夏季：二次元COS小姐姐高速S弯滑行，内转180豚跳加脚尖翻板，动作干净标准，强动态模糊与速度线 。 夏转秋：小姐姐做出高难度空中转体，瞬间慢镜头，镜头缓慢环绕人物一圈，服装自然渐变秋季长袖外套，场景渐变秋日枫树林，天空飘金黄落叶，过渡自然无突变 。 秋季：二次元COS小姐姐简短高速滑行衔接，落叶飞舞，画面简洁流畅，动作标准无畸变 。 秋转冬：小姐姐做出高难度腾空动作，瞬间慢镜头，镜头缓慢环绕人物一圈，服装自然渐变冬季专业滑雪服，滑板顺滑变为滑雪板，场景渐变冬日雪山雪景，天空飘雪，地面变为雪道，无突变无畸变 。 冬季：时长大幅加长，二次元COS小姐姐在雪道流畅高速滑行，连续流畅转弯，姿态帅气舒展，雪雾飞扬，雪景大气开阔，无多余旋转、无360转身、无动作畸变；滑行一段后，最后做出一个超帅强力滑雪刹车定格动作，身体重心压低，背影帅气，滑雪板在雪地划出清晰帅气刹车痕迹，以雪山雪景完美收尾 。 音效：滑板滚动、豚跳、摩擦声，自然过渡为滑雪板滑行声、雪地制动声，风声随速度变化；全程一镜到底，季节过渡柔和连贯，动作稳定不畸变，无多余旋转 二次元画风，精致五官，高清画质，光影自然，动作稳定不崩坏

title: Seedance 2.0 Chinese Fantasy CG Prompt: Painter Immortal
description: A detailed Seedance 2.0 prompt for generating a top-tier Chinese fantasy CG video. The scene features a 'Painter Immortal' in a massive underground rock cave. The immortal uses a glowing jade brush to paint, transforming the dark cave into a vibrant, deadly fairy realm of rapidly growing plants and attacking creatures, which then collapses and is collected back into a single scroll painting.
content:
顶级国风动漫奇幻CG，电影级东方幻想大片质感，超高饱和度，色彩爆炸，超现实主义视觉体验。地下巨大岩洞场景，瑰丽、妖异、梦幻又危险。16:9，15秒，镜头流畅丝滑，特效宏大，画面高级，主体清晰。

角色：
画仙，绝美空灵，眼波灵动，红唇轻启，气质高贵神秘。手持耀目玉笔，展开七彩流光的空白卷轴，拥有将画意化为真实、将美景化为杀阵的能力。

第一镜：
微距特写画仙绝美面庞与双手动作，眼神灵动含笑，玉笔旋转发光。画仙展开七彩空白卷轴，挥笔泼洒出漫天流体颜料，颜料如星河般在空中飞舞流淌。伴随清脆水滴声、银铃轻笑声，画面极致唯美梦幻。

第二镜：
镜头拉至广角，颜料撞击岩壁与地面后瞬间爆炸式疯长。死寂幽暗的巨大岩洞被强行上色，石绿、藤黄、黛蓝、朱砂等高亮色彩迅速蔓延，化作参天巨树、发光藤蔓、妖艳奇花与灵性植物，整座岩洞数秒内被重塑为绚烂仙境。植物高速拔节生长，根系撕裂岩层，气势如同改天换地。

第三镜：
仙境成型后杀机爆发。彩光凝成的巨型飞鸟与猛虎从藤蔓和花海中扑杀而出，地面奇花张开利刃花嘴疯狂撕咬，藤蔓高速缠绕绞杀。绝美空间瞬间化作致命猎场，目标被多重攻击撕碎，最终崩解为无数发光颜料粒子。伴随百兽嘶吼、植物破空、光束穿透的原生音效，毁灭感极强。

第四镜：
镜头极速拉远，整座岩洞与其中所有绚烂景象开始向中心收缩吸入，最终凝聚成一卷悬浮半空的精美青绿山水画卷。画仙玉手轻招，画卷飞回掌中，伴随清脆合轴声，所有创世与毁灭尽数收拢。最后画仙轻摇团扇，转身离去，只留下绝艳残影与未散尽的流彩光辉，震撼收尾。

要求：
重点突出“挥笔泼彩、改写岩洞、仙境绞杀、收画离场”四段主线。画面要兼具绝美与危险，前半段梦幻创世，后半段致命反杀，结尾高级收束。整体必须有顶级国风动漫奇幻CG大片感。

description: A high-detail, cinematic action sequence prompt for Seedance 2.0 depicting a brutal fight between Wolverine (resembling Hugh Jackman) and the Hulk in a misty pine forest. The prompt specifies character details (photorealistic CGI, detailed skin/veins), atmosphere (moody, desaturated), camera work (handheld shaky-cam, low-angle, slow-motion), and specific actions (claw slash, throat grab).
content:
High-budget cinematic action sequence. A battle-worn Wolverine with sharp, reflective metal claws engages in a brutal fight against a massive, muscular Hulk in a misty pine forest. Wolverine has realistic facial features resembling Hugh Jackman, with visible sweat and bloodstains. The Hulk is a towering green behemoth with hyper-detailed skin pores and bulging veins.

title: Stone Colossus Action Sequence
description: A high-energy, 15-second cinematic action prompt for Seedance 2.0 featuring a desert chase and a giant stone colossus.
content: A 15-second cinematic action sequence that starts instantly with an epic ultra-wide shot of a gigantic stone colossus striding through a storm-covered desert while tiny riders race across the dunes below at full speed. The camera is already moving fast from the first frame, sweeping low and aggressive past shattered pillars and exploding sand. At 7 seconds enter dramatic slow motion as one rider launches off a dune and rides vertically across the colossus arm while pieces of ancient armor crack open and golden fire spills out from inside. Then snap back to full speed as the camera dives toward the monster’s face, where its eyes open to reveal an entire glowing city hidden within its skull.

content: @Image1's character Kai attacks @Image2's character Master Tanaka in the @Image3 dojo. anime with motion blur on Kai's kicks and crisp movement for Tanaka. Choreography: Shot 1 (0.0-2.0s): Medium shot. Kai attacks with a high roundhouse kick. Tanaka blocks with his forearm, barely shifting. Shot 2 (2.0-3.5s): CU. Kai throws a mid-level side kick. The cars are racing and chasing each other aggressively, drifting through sharp turns, overtaking, bumping slightly, and competing for position. The FPV camera flies low behind them, swinging left and right, diving and rising with the steep up-down road. Dust clouds explode from the tires. title: Live-Action Anime Adaptation: Water vs. Thunder Breathing Duel
description: A highly detailed, 15-second prompt for generating a live-action adaptation of an anime-style duel, featuring 'Water Breathing' (blue water dragon) versus 'Thunder Breathing' (golden lightning). The prompt specifies the style (Hollywood live-action, dark samurai, 4K, fast cuts), scene setting (misty forest under moonlight), and three distinct, action-packed shots detailing character actions, special effects, and the final collision of powers.
content:
真人漫改·呼吸法决战（15秒·超燃特效版）
【核心看点】：水之呼吸（蓝色水龙） VS 雷之呼吸（金色闪电），真人极速对决。

【风格】：好莱坞真人漫改电影质感，暗黑武士风，4K超清，极速快剪，粒子光效炸裂，无血腥。
【时长】：15秒
【场景】：月光下的迷雾森林，地面泥泞，落叶纷飞。

[00:00-00:05] 镜头1：水调歌头·起式（蓄力感）
画面：一名身穿绿黑格子羽织（外套）的少年武士，在月光下压低重心，双手握刀。
动作：他深吸一口气，周围的空气瞬间凝固。随着他拔刀出鞘，一条巨大的、由高压水流凝聚而成的蓝色水龙凭空出现，环绕着他的身体和刀刃高速旋转，发出流水的轰鸣声。
特效细节：水流具有真实的水花飞溅感，照亮了黑暗的森林。

[00:05-00:10] 镜头2：雷霆一闪·突进（极速感）
画面：对面的对手，一名披着黄色三角纹羽织的金发剑客，身体压得极低，做出了居合斩（拔刀术）的姿势。
动作：地面突然炸裂，他整个人瞬间化作一道刺眼的金色雷电残影，以肉眼无法捕捉的速度在树林间呈“之”字形极速折射突进。
特效细节：经过的地方，空气中残留着金色的电弧和被烧焦的落叶。

[00:10-00:15] 镜头3：水雷交轰·绝响（大招对撞）
画面：极速对冲。少年武士挥舞着巨大的蓝色水龙迎面斩下，金发剑客化身雷电迎面撞上。
动作：两把刀在画面中心猛烈碰撞。
特效奇观：蓝色的水龙与金色的雷电瞬间炸开，形成一个巨大的水雷能量风暴向四周扩散。周围的大树被能量波拦腰震断，泥水和光芒遮蔽了镜头。画面在极致炫目的蓝黄白光中结束。

title: Arctic Glacier Collapse and Snowmobile Escape
description: A detailed, multi-shot cinematic prompt for Seedance 2.0, depicting a woman's dramatic escape on a snowmobile from a massive, collapsing glacier in the Arctic. The prompt specifies character, setting, action sequence, camera movement (drone), and high-quality cinematic realism.
content:
A woman in her mid-30s wearing a heavy arctic survival suit races across the deck of a massive icebreaker ship cutting through frozen seas.

Behind her a towering wall of collapsing glacier ice crashes into the ocean.

At the 2-second mark she jumps onto a snowmobile and accelerates toward the bow ramp as the ship tilts from the impact.

The snowmobile launches off the ramp and lands on a drifting iceberg.

Camera drone captures the small vehicle racing across floating ice fragments while the glacier collapses behind.

Arctic ocean chaos, snowmobile iceberg landing, collapsing glacier wall, icy debris explosions, cinematic realism, 4K.

title: Childhood Dream to Reality Transition Video Prompt
description: A detailed multi-segment prompt for Seedance 2.0 to generate a 12-second video with a seamless transition from a childhood memory of playing with a toy car to the adult reality of driving a real Porsche 911 GT3, featuring cinematic quality and intense speed and emotion.
content:
1人出镜，@，12秒，顶级汽车广告质感，电影级镜头，真实速度压迫感，丝滑时空转场，前后人物一致，画面稳定，情绪层层递进。

0.0-4.0秒：
超低机位贴地微距，午后暖金阳光照亮米色毛绒地毯，尘埃粒子漂浮，复古柯达胶片暖黄调。
小时候的@只露出稚嫩小手，猛地推动一辆红色保时捷玩具跑车向前冲刺。
镜头紧贴玩具车车头高速滑行跟拍，模拟真实赛车第一视角，速度越来越快，童年想象力被彻底点燃。

4.0-5.5秒：
玩具车径直冲入沙发底部黑暗阴影，光线骤灭，地毯纹理拉成放射状速度残影，整个画面被黑暗吞没。
利用冲入阴影的遮挡动作完成无缝转场，形成从童年到现实的时空跃迁。

5.5-9.0秒：
黑场中引擎轰鸣炸开，真实红色保时捷911 GT3从黑暗中咆哮冲出，赛道冷灰，天光锐利，车漆反光凌厉，轮胎卷起热浪与轻微烟尘。
镜头保持与前一镜完全一致的贴地高速跟拍，像同一辆车从玩具尺寸直接变成真实赛车，视觉震撼强烈，物理速度感真实凶猛。

9.0-12.0秒：
切入车内极限特写，成年@戴赛车手套的手狠狠攥住翻毛皮方向盘并暴力换挡，机械震动、汗水、摩擦细节清晰可见。
镜头猛然上摇推近，定格头盔下@灼热坚定的双眼，额头汗水滑落，眼神像把童年的幻想彻底开进现实。
车内空间快速摇摄，震动强烈，压迫感拉满，最后以眼神高潮定格收尾。

负面：
模糊，低清，人物变形，多人，手部错误，车型错误，跳切，转场生硬，卡顿，掉帧，塑料质感，假车感，过度特效，动漫感，廉价滤镜，脸部不稳定，年龄衔接混乱。

Lightning flashes — the camera whip-pans as enemies collide with him. The shot becomes chaotic, handheld energy as he spins, cleaves, and roars, each strike sending blood into the rain.

全程跟锁【@图1】主体，【@图1】左右连续重心切换、身体大幅摇晃下坡，衣物与头发完全被疾风扯成流线型；车轮高速旋转拉出长残影，路面标线化作密集速度线，路边花草树木压缩成彩色模糊色带；

The bike lands across the top of a container car while sandstorms swirl around the convoy.

The scene involves a miniature girl skateboarding through a child's room, navigating massive obstacles like Lego structures, rolling balls, and closing toy boxes, emphasizing continuous motion, low camera tracking, and intense speed changes.
content: 子ども部屋の床の上で、ミニチュアサイズの少女が小さなスケートボードに乗り、床すれすれを高速で走り抜ける。人間サイズのおもちゃや家具が巨大に見えるスケール感。カメラは主人公のすぐ背後から低い位置で追尾し、常に奥へ進み続けるワンカット風の映像。超広角レンズ、モーションブラー、被写界深度、シネマティックライティング。スピードは3段階で徐々に上がっていく。第1段階では、レゴの街のビルの谷間のような狭い通路を高速で抜け、積み木の間をスラロームしながら前進する。第2段階では、前方から巨大なボールが転がってきて壁とのわずかな隙間へ滑り込み、倒れてくる積み木の下を紙一重でくぐり抜け、走るミニカーのタイヤの間をギリギリで通過する。第3段階では、風で閉じかける絵本のページとページの隙間を突き抜け、揺れるぬいぐるみの腕の下をすり抜け、最後は閉まりかけるおもちゃ箱のフタのわずかな隙間へ飛び込み、最大速度のまま暗い奥へ消えていく。危機一髪の回避が連続する、スリリングで爽快感のある映像。現実にありそうな子ども部屋の中で、ミニチュア視点ならではの巨大な障害物と小さな隙間を活かした、没入感のあるアトラクションのような映像。

title: Seedance 2.0 Prompt for 'Twin Duel' Ink Style Video
description: A detailed, time-coded prompt for Seedance 2.0 to generate an action sequence video titled 'Twin Duel' using a dynamic ink wash painting style, focusing on the clash between red and blue figures and their resulting ink effects.
content:
【第1秒】红衣剪影反手持剑，剑尖拖出一道细长朱红，在地面划出半圆，电影风格式起手。

【第2秒】蓝衣从天而降，双掌下压，墨色如瀑布倾泻，红影侧闪，残影留在原地被击碎成雾，抽帧处理，顿挫感。

【第3-5秒】极速对剑，每秒镜头切换。每一次兵器相交，红蓝墨迹都以式喷溅炸开，墨珠溅向画面四角，如血如火。

【第6秒】两人贴身相持，剑锋抵在一起，红蓝墨色在接触点缓缓交融、旋转，张力瞬间，时间被拉长。

【第7秒】突然爆发，两人向后弹开，墨迹从交融点被撕裂成两股，在空中画出两道纠缠的弧线。

【第8-10秒】快切：红影旋身，甩出一串朱红墨点如暗器；蓝影凌空翻滚，每一次旋转都甩出靛蓝墨环，套向对手。

【第11秒】红影剑锋直刺，剑尖穿透蓝影胸口——蓝影却化作一滩墨迹散开，真身已绕至背后虚实转换。

【第12-13秒】背身对决，两人同时向后出招，两股墨色在空中碰撞、缠绕，如太极图般旋转。

【第14秒】镜头拉远，两道剪影在最后一击中交错而过，静止。

【第15秒】红蓝墨迹在空中缓缓交融、晕染，最终定格成一幅泼墨大写意——两个身影背对而立，墨色未干，意犹未尽。使用水墨画的画面风格生成素材

title: Shaw Brothers Style Cat Fight Video Prompt
description: A detailed, bilingual (Chinese and English dialogue) prompt for Seedance 2.0 to generate a dramatic, high-contrast video in the style of a Shaw Brothers film. It features an orange cat protagonist and a black cat antagonist, culminating in an absurd action sequence involving a Gatling gun.
content:
模仿邵氏電影風格，在荒野的雪山里，冷色調高對比光影與濃厚膠片顆粒。橘貓主角（穿粗布樵夫衣、肩背柴刀）踏雪而行，風雪呼嘯。牠蹲下身，將一隻灰老鼠輕輕放到雪地上一隻瀕死的白貓身旁，低頭用英文沉聲說：
“This gray mouse is for you… I hope you can survive this winter.”
白貓氣若游絲，雪花落在牠微微顫動的鬍鬚上。

鏡頭一轉——暖色調突變，農家院落，柴火劈啪作響。橘貓正在劈柴，神情輕鬆。院門被推開，一隻黑貓（穿紅色鑲鑽禮服，步伐優雅、氣場強烈）緩步走入。橘貓一愣，露出驚喜神情，用英文說：
“Are you… that white cat?”

黑貓停步，微微側頭，氣氛瞬間凝固。下一秒，她猛地從身後掏出一把誇張的加特林，槍管反射出冷光，怒視橘貓，用英文冷聲道：
“I am that gray mouse.”

緊接著——誇張武俠式慢動作＋爆裂音效，加特林瘋狂掃射，火光與子彈殼如雨傾瀉，橘貓驚慌閃避，整個院落被打得木屑飛濺、塵土四起，畫面在極致混亂與荒誕中定格。

title: Miniature Girl Skateboard Chase Video Prompt for Seedance 2.0
description: A detailed, action-packed prompt for Seedance 2.0 describing a miniature girl riding a small skateboard across a child's room floor, creating a giant-scale environment. The prompt specifies cinematic techniques (low-angle, ultra-wide lens, dynamic blur, depth of field) and outlines a three-stage chase sequence involving navigating obstacles like Lego canyons, dodging a giant ball, and narrowly escaping a closing picture book and toy box.
content: 在儿童房的地板上，一个迷你女孩骑着一块小滑板，贴着地面飞驰。画面比例如此巨大，以至于真人大小的玩具和家具都显得无比巨大。镜头从低角度紧随其后，以类似一镜到底的镜头不断向背景移动。影片运用了超广角镜头、动态模糊、景深和电影级光影效果。速度分三个阶段逐渐加快。第一阶段，她高速穿过狭窄的通道，如同乐高城市建筑间的峡谷，在积木间灵活穿梭。第二阶段，一个巨大的球从前方滚向她，她滑进球与墙壁之间的狭小缝隙，险险躲过掉落的积木，并从一辆行驶中的迷你汽车的轮胎间擦身而过。在第三阶段，她从即将被风合上的图画书书页缝隙中破空而出，从摇晃的毛绒玩具腋下钻过，最后跃入即将关闭的玩具箱盖上的小缝隙，以最快的速度消失在黑暗的远方。这是一段惊险刺激、扣人心弦的视频，充满了一系列惊险的逃脱场面。视频场景设定在一个逼真的儿童房内，运用微缩视角营造出身临其境、如同游乐设施般的体验，充分利用了巨大的障碍物和狭小的缝隙。

title: Cinematic CG Short Film of Guoman Character Duel (Seedance 2.0)
description: A detailed, multi-stage prompt for Seedance 2.0 to generate a 15-second cinematic CG short film depicting a duel between two Guoman (Chinese animation) characters in a snowy, ruined martial arts arena. The prompt uses placeholders for two reference images and specifies action choreography, camera work, and the final dramatic standoff.
content:
15秒的电影级CG短片，场景是覆雪的破败演武场，细雪纷飞。 
【@图1】手持双剑，面容清冷。 
【@图2】持伞，没有打开，神情阴郁。 
【@图2】与【@图1】在雪中对峙，下一刹那战斗爆发。
【@图1】化为残影突刺，剑分三点寒星；
【@图2】只用伞格挡，炸开红白火星。
紧接着把伞尖像枪般刺出，暗影突刺连绵不绝，而剑影灵动，在枪影中穿梭格挡，带起道道冰晶轨迹。
【@图1】踏碎地面，挥动双剑斩出新月般的巨大十字斩剑气，
【@图2】打开伞，高速旋转以伞面迎击 最终镜头慢动作定格：旋转的伞如同利刃与剑尖悍然对撞！
一半是暗色如潮，一半是冰霜汇聚，两股能量形成一个剧烈波动的能量球，将周围一切排开湮灭。
特写两人面孔：【@图1】眼神决绝，额前汗珠成霜；【@图2】战意沸腾，嘴角溢血。
画面在此永恒对峙。 电影级写实渲染，皮肤与布料细节，夸张的动态模糊与速度残影，粒子特效，体积光，史诗构图。

content: 九十年代初徐克武侠电影风格，胶片质感，暖黄复古色调，高对比度，24fps，画面连贯，轻微胶片颗粒，手持感，镜头轻微不稳定  +  运动模糊，增强紧张压迫感。深夜古代破败寺庙，巨大佛像下案台旁，中年武侠男子闭目养神，寺庙光线昏暗，案台烛火摇曳；男子衣衫破旧青蓝色，黑色披风，束发，三尺长髯，英俊冷峻，腰间配长剑。   蒙面刺客从房梁跃下行刺，男子翻身拔剑格挡，刀剑碰撞迸火星，转身一掌击飞刺客，撞毁案台尘土飞扬；切男子斗笠下犀利眼神特写。刺客再攻，男子剑挡反击，剑法凌厉如游龙，身法灵活，真实打击感，火星四溅，电影感动作长镜头，视觉冲击强，砖地尘土飞扬。   男子轻功跃至刺客身后，刺客惊恐流汗表情特写，一剑刺入刺客背部见血，停顿后腾空两脚飞踹，刺客惨叫撞破大门碎裂。男子帅气收剑入鞘，右手按斗笠，眼神冷峻犀利，甩开披风，轻蔑说：蝼蚁（加字幕），潇洒离去。武侠背景音乐

content: 16:9横屏，中国动画风格，银白冷冽色调。 0 - 3秒：深夜酒楼屋顶，黑衣刺客背负十字镖囊，长脸配深眼窝，薄唇紧抿，月光下身影如鬼魅，双手各夹三枚里剑，镜头从手里剑特写拉至全身。 4 - 8秒：对面灰衣侠客手持飞刀，瓜子脸配星目，眉间有淡淡疤痕，长发改用灰布带绑成低马尾，十指之间夹着把薄如蝉翼的飞刀，镜头环绕拍摄两人对峙。 9 - 12秒：两人同时出手，六枚手里剑与十把飞刀在空中交织碰撞，发出连绵不断的金属脆响，火花如银色烟花绽放，部分暗器擦过屋脊瓦片留下痕迹，慢镜头追踪一枚飞刀击碎手里剑后继续飞行的轨迹。 13 - 15秒：两人暗器耗尽后近身搏斗，匕首与短刀在屋脊上快速交锋，最后灰衣侠客一脚踢飞刺客手中匕首，同时飞刀抵住对方咽喉，月光照在两人脸上，刺客缓缓举手投降。 音效：暗器破空、金属碰撞、瓦片碎裂、衣袂飘动。 禁止：任何文字、字幕、LOGO或水印。

title: Seedance 2.0 Video Prompt: Absurd Hong Kong Style Comedy
description: A detailed, multi-scene video generation prompt for Seedance 2.0 creating an absurd comedy sequence in the style of a 90s Hong Kong urban film. The prompt specifies visual elements like neon, rain, film grain, and a dramatic atmosphere, culminating in a bizarre twist where a character transforms into a plastic stool.
content:
9秒，90年代港风都市怀旧电影质感，霓虹雨夜，强胶片噪点，冷蓝和暖红霓虹交错，人物表演极其认真，气氛像命运重逢。 
0-2秒：闪回，旧居民楼走廊里，年轻男主顺手把一张快散架的红色塑料凳重新卡稳，轻轻推回墙边，镜头近景； 
3-6秒：现实，雨夜便利店门口，一位穿深色风衣的女子从霓虹倒影中缓缓走来，替男主挡住飞来的雨伞和纸箱，镜头Slow Dolly In，气氛庄重得像多年后重逢； 
7-9秒：男主低声问“你是当年那位故人？”女子平静说“不，我是你卡稳的那把塑料凳。”下一秒她瞬间变回红色塑料凳，轻轻一绊，男主狼狈坐倒在地，形成一本正经的荒诞喜剧。 
人物均为原创虚构角色，非任何现实明星或公众人物，不模仿任何真人长相，不出现任何可识别名人特征；面部低辨识度、类型化、非写实处理，不过度强调五官细节。
禁止枪械、打斗、追逐、犯罪、警察元素、字幕、LOGO、水印。

title: 15-Second Live Action Rivalry Video Script
description: A detailed, multi-scene prompt for a 15-second live-action video, focusing on an escalating rivalry between two high school students, Haruki Aoyama and Renji Kurosawa. The prompt includes character descriptions, a plot summary, and specific scene breakdowns (The Opening Salvo, Assembly Confrontation, Hallway Aftermath) to guide the video generation.
content:
At Sakuragaoka High School, quiet and determined second-year student Haruki Aoyama is publicly humiliated by his nemesis Renji Kurosawa, the intimidating student council vice president, on the very first day of the new semester. What begins as a bitter rivalry fueled by hatred escalates through a high-stakes school competition where both students push each other to the breaking point. As the conflict intensifies, Haruki discovers a shocking truth. Renji's cruelty stems not from malice but from desperate resentment over a scholarship that Haruki unknowingly took, one that Renji's struggling family desperately needed. Forced to confront the gray areas between hero and villain, Haruki must decide whether to destroy his enemy or extend a hand to someone who might just need a friend. The choices he makes will determine whether their rivalry ends in friendship, mutual respect, or lasting regret.

Character:
Haruki Aoyama (Main Protagonist) - A quiet, determined second-year student at Sakuragaoka High School. He is hardworking and principled but struggles with anger and impulsiveness. His journey transforms him from a resentful victim into someone capable of empathy and forgiveness.

Renji Kurosawa (Supporting Character) - The charismatic and ruthless student council vice president who serves as Haruki's nemesis. Beneath his intimidating exterior, he hides deep pain from his family's financial struggles. He is fiercely proud and refuses to show weakness.

Miku Tachibana (Supporting Character) - Haruki's loyal childhood friend and emotional anchor. She is perceptive, strategic, and caring, often serving as the voice of reason. She knows more about the situation than she initially reveals.

Souta Himura (Supporting Character) - A laid-back classmate of Haruki who hides surprising talent beneath his carefree attitude. He becomes a key ally and is unafraid to speak hard truths when needed.

Scene 1:
The Opening 
SalvoIt is the first day of the new semester at Sakuragaoka High School. Haruki Aoyama, a quiet but determined second-year student, arrives hoping for a peaceful school year. However, his nemesis Renji Kurosawa, the charismatic and ruthless student council vice president, publicly humiliates Haruki during the opening assembly by exposing an embarrassing incident from last year. The entire school laughs, and Haruki's reputation is shattered before the year even begins. Haruki's childhood friend Miku Tachibana tries to comfort him, but Haruki is consumed by anger and a desire for payback. The seeds of an intense rivalry are sown as Renji makes it clear he intends to make Haruki's life miserable all year. Storylet: Assembly Confrontation: When Renji takes the stage during the opening ceremony, he publicly targets Haruki with a humiliating story, establishing dominance and triggering Haruki's deep resentment. Hallway Aftermath: After the assembly ends, Haruki retreats to the hallway where Miku finds him; she offers comfort but Haruki is too furious to listen, setting up his emotional state for the chapter. Rival's Warning: Renji corners Haruki near the shoe lockers and delivers a cold warning that this year will be hell for him, escalating the tension and making the conflict personal. Inner Resolve: Alone on the school rooftop after classes, Haruki clenches his fists and silently vows to fight back, establishing his motivation and determination for the story ahead.

Scene 2:
Battle Lines
The school announces a major inter-class competition — the Sakuragaoka Cultural Festival Challenge — where teams compete in academics, sports, and creative arts. Haruki and Renji end up as rival team captains. Haruki rallies his classmates, including the laid-back but surprisingly talented Souta Himura, while Renji uses his influence and intimidation to build an elite squad. As the competition heats up, both rivals push themselves to the limit. Miku serves as Haruki's strategist and emotional anchor. During the sports round, Haruki and Renji face off directly in a relay race that becomes deeply personal. Tensions reach a boiling point when Haruki notices suspicious behavior from Renji's team — possible cheating. The chapter ends at the climax of the competition, with the outcome uncertain. Storylet: Team Formation: When the competition is announced, Haruki must recruit classmates; Souta initially refuses but joins after witnessing Haruki's sincerity, forming the core team. Strategy Session: Miku organizes a late-night study and planning session at Haruki's house, where the team bonds and develops creative strategies, strengthening their resolve. The Relay Showdown: During the sports event, Haruki and Renji run the anchor leg of the relay; the crowd roars as they sprint neck-and-neck, and the raw hatred between them is visible to everyone. Suspicious Evidence: After the academic round, Haruki finds discarded answer sheets near the trash that suggest Renji's team had advance knowledge of the questions, creating a moral dilemma. Miku's Counsel: Miku pulls Haruki aside and warns him that acting on anger alone will make him no different from Renji, forcing him to reflect on his choices.

Scene 3:
Behind the Mask
After the intensity of the competition, a quiet shift begins. Haruki discovers the truth behind Renji's deep-seated hatred — last year, Haruki unknowingly took the scholarship spot that Renji desperately needed to stay in school due to his family's severe financial troubles. Renji's single mother works multiple jobs, and the scholarship was his only hope of easing her burden. The humiliation Renji inflicted on Haruki was born not from cruelty but from desperate resentment. Miku reveals she has known fragments of this story but kept silent to protect both of them. Haruki is shaken, realizing his rival's villain persona is a mask over deep pain. He visits Renji at a part-time job at a convenience store late at night and sees a completely different person — exhausted, vulnerable, and alone. The two share an uncomfortable but honest conversation under the fluorescent lights. Storylet: The Revelation: Miku finally tells Haruki the full story of Renji's family situation after the competition ends, shattering Haruki's simple view of good versus evil. Convenience Store Visit: Haruki tracks down Renji's part-time job and sees him stocking shelves alone late at night, tired and quiet, a stark contrast to his domineering school persona. The Honest Talk: Under harsh convenience store lights, Renji initially lashes out at Haruki for showing up, but eventually breaks down and admits the weight he carries, creating raw emotional vulnerability. Walking Home: The two walk home in silence through empty nighttime streets, neither fully reconciled but with a fragile new understanding forming between them.

Scene 4:
The Price of Exposure
Haruki chose to expose Renji's cheating, and the fallout is catastrophic. The school administration launches a formal investigation, and Renji faces potential expulsion. However, the investigation reveals that Renji was coerced into cheating by a third-year student who wanted to sabotage both teams for his own gain. Renji took the blame silently to protect his teammates. Haruki is horrified — his act of justice may destroy someone who was already a victim. The school is abuzz with gossip and judgment. Souta urges Haruki to fix what he started. Miku is torn between supporting Haruki and feeling that he acted too rashly. Renji, now isolated and facing the disciplinary committee, refuses to defend himself. Haruki must decide whether to step forward and tell the full truth, risking his own standing. Storylet: Investigation Fallout: The school principal announces the investigation results in a tense faculty meeting, and word spreads fast through the student body, turning Renji into a pariah overnight. Souta's Push: Souta confronts Haruki in the empty gym, telling him bluntly that exposing Re

title: Zootopia Comedic Donut Chase Short
description: A highly detailed, scene-by-scene Seedance 2.0 prompt for a 15-second comedic animated short in the style of Zootopia, focusing on Judy Hopps and Nick Wilde chasing and securing a single strawberry jelly donut as evidence, emphasizing visual comedy and precise camera language.
content:
15-second comedic animated short in the world and visual tone of Zootopia. High-quality stylized 3D animation, expressive facial acting, clean readable slapstick, bright police-station interior, polished reflective floor, warm indoor daylight. Visual comedy only, little or no dialogue.

Judy Hopps: small fast rabbit police officer, blue ZPD uniform, hyper-serious, explosive sprinting, precise slides, determined face, ears reacting sharply.
Nick Wilde: tall slim fox, green shirt and tie, relaxed posture, minimal movement, dry amused expression.
Background: one distant sloth clerk at a far desk only, never entering foreground.

Key object: one single strawberry jelly donut, same donut for the entire clip, falls from Nick’s small brown paper bag, rolls across the floor, gets stopped by Nick, then gets sealed into one clear evidence bag by Judy. No duplicate donuts, no extra props, no continuity errors.

Camera language: third-person cinematic comedy, medium shots, low-angle close tracking on the donut, one side tracking shot, one final tight two-shot. Smooth stabilized movement, tiny comedic whip corrections only when needed. Always keep donut, Judy, and Nick spatially readable.

0:00–0:03
Medium shot, light tracking in ZPD lobby. Judy and Nick walk side by side past the front desk. Judy carries a small clipboard, Nick carries a brown paper bag. One strawberry jelly donut slips out of the bag, drops to the floor, and starts rolling. Judy’s ears snap upright and she locks onto it like a fleeing suspect. Camera dips lower to keep the donut in the foreground.

0:03–0:06
Low close tracking shot on the same donut rolling fast over the shiny floor. Judy bursts into frame from behind, clipboard tucked under one arm, sprinting hard with both paws reaching forward. She almost grabs it but misses by centimeters. The donut keeps rolling. Quick readable camera adjustment, no chaotic motion.

0:06–0:09
Side medium-wide tracking shot. The donut curves around a fixed desk leg. Judy makes an exaggerated quick step and low slide to intercept, but it slips past her again. She pivots and chases immediately. In the background, Nick simply walks on a shorter diagonal path, calm and unhurried. Keep the same donut clearly visible.

0:09–0:12
Frontal medium-close shot. The donut rolls toward camera. Nick’s paw enters calmly from frame right and presses the same donut to a stop. Judy slides in from frame left and freezes with her nose just inches from it, still in full arrest pose. Hold the reaction beat clearly.

0:12–0:15
Tight two-shot. Nick lifts the same donut with two fingers and hands it over with a dry smug grin. Judy instantly switches back to formal police mode, pulls out one clear evidence bag, seals the same donut inside, and proudly presents it to camera like a major arrest. Nick stands beside her with an amused look. In deep background, the sloth clerk slowly raises a stamp. End on a clean comedic freeze frame: evidence bag with the donut

title: Apocalyptic Transformation Sequence
description: A highly detailed, multi-stage video generation prompt for Seedance 2.0, describing a protagonist's painful transformation into an armored state within an apocalyptic wasteland, focusing on cinematic style, camera movement, and specific actions across a 15-second timeline.
content:
Character & Setup
Full-body based on reference image (upper-body reference), with face, hairstyle, and features matched exactly. She wears a hat. Expression is tense and restrained, slightly painful, with a faint frown—carrying a strong sense of despair and intensity in his eyes.

Clothing: Dark grey coat, dark inner layer, no belt, wearing heavy black-tech gauntlets.

Environment: Apocalyptic wasteland, grey-blue sky, strong winds, smoke and debris in the air. Meteors streak across the sky with faint flames and trails of smoke.

⸻

Visual Style

IMAX film look with a 35mm Panavision lens.

Low-saturation grey tones, compressed shadows with preserved detail, subtle film grain and edge vignetting.

Heavy, oppressive atmosphere with realistic lighting and physical presence.

⸻

Camera Rules

One continuous handheld shot with subtle breathing motion.

Starts from a low-angle upward shot, focusing on the face and upper body, slowly circling to a frontal view during transformation. The weapon in his hand remains the visual anchor.

⸻

0–3s · Stare

The injured protagonist stands still, slightly lowering his head. Her body is tense.

She slowly raises his right arm forward, stiff and heavy.

A dim glow surrounds the gauntlet. Her breathing subtly moves her body.

Suddenly, her eyes ignite with purple-white light, creating strong lens flares.

⸻

3–6s · Activation

A deep whisper: “Transform!”

She snaps his right hand sharply.

Purple crystal-like electricity bursts from her arm. The air compresses inward, distorting space.

A circular shockwave expands around her. Strange glowing blue runic lines appear and orbit his body.

⸻

6–9s · Tearing

Dark gold cracks erupt from her chest. Thick golden liquid flows like blood.

Blue mist and fine electric arcs surge outward.

Her coat tears apart from the inside, edges burning into ash.

Fragments of organic armor burst outward, then unnaturally retract and reattach.

Her face tightens in pain as glowing blue markings spread symmetrically. A small tear opens on his cheek, revealing pulsing orange light beneath.

⸻

9–12s · Growth

New organic matter seeps from within, shimmering with iridescent light and moving toward the chest.

White armor plates collide and fuse, leaving scorched marks.

The chest core flickers like embers, not fully stabilized.

Her outer clothing is violently stripped away.

Purple-black metal spreads across her face, forming an uneven mask.

Compound eyes begin forming, flickering irregularly.

⸻

12–15s · Completion

The helmet seals fully. Horn-like structures grow upward, burning with purple-gold flames.

One eye glows steadily while the other flickers with electrical instability.

Armor is uneven and battle-damaged, with glowing cracks and leaking fluid.

The camera slowly circles to her right, then pulls back from above.

She shifts into a ready combat stance, standing against the harsh environment.

title: Cinematic Trailer Style Video Generation
description: A detailed, multi-shot prompt for Seedance 2.0 used to create a cinematic trailer-style video. The prompt specifies camera movements, scene transitions (from illustration to realism), and overall style parameters.
content:
[0s–3s]: （ image1 ）A continuous slow push-in that never stops — zooming toward the center of a 19th-century Grimm-style storybook illustration of a deep dark spruce forest, As the camera moves closer, the illustration begins to malfunction, The trees sway in a wind that should not be possible inside a drawing. 

[3s–5.5s]: ( image2 ) The zoom continues without interruption. The illustrated begins to soften and dissolve from the center outward, as if a mist is seeping through the paper and replacing the drawing from within. As the camera keeps pushing forward, this zone of realism expands outward in a controlled, organic spread. The warm cream-sepia illustration gradually drains away into cold desaturated blue-green. The drawn surface at the edges briefly wavers and thins like damp paper giving way to moisture, then quietly dissolves into the same realistic forest texture. No abrupt morphing, no multiple competing distortions — just a single eerie replacement, as if the illustration is being overtaken by a real forest through a veil of mist. By 5.5 seconds, the camera is moving fully inside the real forest, and the drawing has completely vanished. 

[5.5s–11s]: ( image3 ) The forward motion gently eases into a continuous upward drift without a cut, as if the camera is being lifted through the real forest in one smooth arc. It rises between the trunks and passes through the lower branches, gradually clearing the canopy — not soaring too high, but just enough to reveal the breadth of the dark Nordic forest under flat grey light. The motion remains calm and deliberate, with a subtle floating quality, allowing the forest to breathe onscreen. The camera then begins a slow, natural transition from vertical ascent into a shallow backward glide, as if searching for the road beyond the trees. 

[11s–15s]: ( image4 ) The same movement continues seamlessly. The camera glides forward and gently descends out of the forest edge toward the road, settling into a low eye-level perspective near the tarmac. In one unbroken motion, it arrives at an extreme wide shot with the horizon stable and the road stretching dead straight into a grey-white vanishing point. The same boxy vintage sedan is already in frame, driving steadily away, growing smaller in the mist. Fallen pine needles drift faintly across the wet surface. The mist thickens gradually ahead. 

Global style: 35mm tungsten film, anamorphic, fine grain, cinematic. Desaturated blue-green midtones, crushed blacks, flat overcast diffusion. Smooth continuous camera motion, sharp details, stable horizon, natural proportions. First two shots transition from antique illustration warmth to cold cinematic realism. No text, no typography, no digital effects.

title: Complex Action Sequence Video Prompt for Seedance 2.0
description: A highly detailed, multi-scene prompt for Seedance 2.0, describing a dramatic sequence involving orbiting objects, talismans, a character reveal, energy transformations, and a final cosmic explosion, designed for a dynamic video output.
content:
Dark navy background. A few small objects drift along a wide circular orbit — the rotation center sits in the upper right of the frame, the camera watches from the outer edge. A decorated box, a striped ball, and a couple of carnival items arc past one by one, curving leftward across the view. Sparse confetti strips and gold coins float through the air.

Three cream-colored rectangular talismans appear on the same orbital path, each bearing a different painted emblem. They approach one at a time, sweeping across the camera in a wide arc.

A glowing golden-framed card carrying a character illustration enters along the orbit. It drifts to center screen and the camera pushes in. The golden frame swells beyond the screen edges and vanishes — only the character remains. Gold sparkles and cross-shaped flares surround the reveal.

Red talismans orbit the character in irregular circular paths. Flame-colored ribbons weave through the hair. A fireball ignites near the outstretched hand, swelling until it fills nearly half the screen with white-hot light. The fireball contracts back toward the hands. Energy converts — flames dissolve into crackling purple arcs. The talismans transform into large glowing red rectangles covered in flame-crest patterns, fanning out in formation.

The character spins with the talismans fanning wider. Camera drives in — golden light ignites in both eyes, a held beat of charge. Pull back to full body. White-gold explosion erupts outward. The talismans launch toward the camera — one large talisman surges forward, dark surface swirling with magenta crests, growing until it covers the entire frame. Black.

New scene. No character visible. Red glowing rectangles streak across dark space in a wide circular arc, trailing fire. They converge on a single point at center screen. On impact, red flash fills the screen — hot pink wash expands, then fades.

Red-orange glowing core at the center with spiral energy arcs rotating around it. More red rectangles converge from all sides onto the central energy sphere. Everything compresses to a single bright point — total whiteout.

Fireball detonates outward with radial god rays. It expands to half the screen, then disperses. Red rectangle debris drifts through the flames. The color shifts — red bleeds to magenta, magenta to purple. In one frame, cold blue-purple replaces everything. New scene.

title: Childhood Imagination to Reality Car Race Video Prompt
description: A complex, multi-stage prompt detailing a seamless transition video from a child playing with a toy car (Macro Realism) to an adult driving a real Porsche 911 GT3 on a racetrack (Full-Scale Power). It specifies timing, camera angles (ultra-low-angle tracking), lighting, texture details, and an emotional peak focusing on the driver's eyes.
content:
0.0 – 4.0 sec — Childhood Imagination (Macro Realism)

Ultra-low-angle macro tracking shot, camera almost touching the ground.
Warm afternoon sunlight spills across a soft beige carpet, visible dust particles floating in air, subtle retro Kodak film warmth (natural, not stylized).

A small child’s hand (only hand visible, no face) pushes a red toy sports car forward.

Camera locks into a front-facing, low tracking perspective, moving with the toy car at increasing speed, mimicking a real race car POV.
Shallow depth of field, realistic motion blur, micro-texture detail on carpet fibers.

Emotion: curiosity → excitement building.

4.0 – 5.5 sec — Transition Through Darkness (Seamless Time Shift)

The toy car speeds into the dark shadow beneath a sofa.

As it enters darkness:

• Light collapses naturally (no artificial fade)
• Carpet texture stretches into subtle motion streaks
• Environment dissolves into full darkness

Seamless transition: the forward motion continues uninterrupted, creating a natural time-space shift (no jump cuts, no glitch effects).

5.5 – 9.0 sec — Reality Emerges (Full-Scale Power)

From darkness, the sound of a real engine ignites.

A real red Porsche 911 GT3 bursts out of shadow into a racetrack environment.

Lighting shifts to sharp, high-contrast daylight.
Cold gray asphalt, heat haze from tires, fine dust particles.

Camera remains low, tracking, and synchronized, maintaining the same motion direction and angle as the toy car shot—creating the illusion it's the same car, now full-scale.

Highly realistic physics:

• Tire grip and vibration
• Subtle suspension movement
• Natural reflections on glossy paint
• Emotion: awe → adrenaline → intensity.

9.0 – 12.0 sec — Human Connection (Emotional Peak)

Cut seamlessly into interior (motion-matched transition).
Close-up: adult driver’s hands gripping a suede racing wheel, wearing professional racing gloves.

Visible micro-details:

• Knuckle tension
• Slight sweat
• Gear shift impact vibration

Camera tilts upward smoothly to reveal the driver’s eyes inside helmet.

Eyes are sharp, focused, intense—mirroring childhood imagination now realized.
Sweat, breath, and subtle helmet reflections visible.

Final moment:
micro freeze-frame feeling (not a hard freeze) on the eyes, with slight camera vibration.

title: Transformers/Mission Impossible Hybrid Jet Transformation Prompt
description: An extremely detailed, multi-act prompt for Seedance 2.0 describing a 10-second continuous shot of a pilot climbing a transforming jet in Paris, the jet transforming into a colossal humanoid mech, firing a cannon, folding back into a jet, and rocketing to Shanghai.
content:
First Act

10 seconds single continuous shot | Paris to Shanghai | Transforming Jet | Pilot Close Up

Single continuous take, camera tightly tracking the subject at all times.

The scene opens on the banks of the Seine in Paris. Thick smoke fills the air. Mechanical turrets thunder in the distance. The Eiffel Tower looms faintly through the haze.

0 to 2 seconds
A male pilot in a white suit is climbing dangerously along the exterior of a rapidly transforming fighter jet. He grips wing hinges, steps on folding armor plates, his movements intense and precise. The fabric of his suit flutters violently in the airflow. Tight close up on his face. Cold, focused, determined.

2 to 5 seconds
The jet, front facing twin engine fighter reference, skims just above Paris streets. Metallic transmission sounds roar as the aircraft begins aggressive transformation. Wings fold and roll into massive mechanical shoulder armor and blade like structures. Twin engines reconfigure into the robotic arm power cores. The fuselage splits open, revealing a cold metallic skeleton and glowing energy conduits. The pilot moves across the shifting exterior, then leaps cleanly into the reforming cockpit.

5 to 7 seconds
Transformation complete. A colossal humanoid mech stands in the Paris street, retaining tail fins and propeller inspired elements. The camera stays tight as it strides between Haussmann style buildings. The mech tilts its head upward. Back armor panels deploy, revealing a massive cannon. Orange red energy gathers at the muzzle. A beam erupts. A distant landmark shatters in drifting smoke.

7 to 9 seconds
The mech folds back into jet form. Engines ignite at full power. Twin orange red exhaust plumes flare intensely. The aircraft rockets upward. The Paris skyline shrinks rapidly below. Cockpit close up. White suit, black tie, eyes forward, fearless.

9 to 10 seconds
The camera pierces through clouds and transitions into low altitude flight over Shanghai streets. The Shanghai World Financial Center rises between Haussmann style buildings. The jet skims the road, twin engines scorching the pavement. Freeze frame.

title: Seedance 2.0 Prompt Writing Guide and Templates
description: A comprehensive guide detailing the structure and techniques for writing high-quality Seedance 2.0 prompts, including a universal formula, action description tips, camera movement language, stability constraints, quality keywords, style/atmosphere terms, and three reusable templates for portrait, landscape, and image-to-video generation.
content:
一、最核心结构（万能公式）
主体+动作+场最+光影+镜头语言+风格+画质+约束
示例模板：
一位年轻女生在海边慢走，微风拂动头发，微笑看向镜头，黄昏暖光，4K高清，电影感，稳定运镜，画面流畅不抖动，细节清晰。
二、动作描述技巧 (Seedance 最吃这个）
• 不要只写「跳舞」「走路」，要连续、自然、慢动作                                                    • 优先用： 缓慢、轻柔、连贯、自然、流畅、不僵硬                                                         • 避免： 夸张、高速、复杂多人互动、大幅度扭曲 
好用动词组合： 
• 缓慢转身、轻轻抬手、脚步轻移、微微低头、隨风摆动
• 鏡头缓缓推进、轻微环绕、平稳構移/ 环绕半圈 
三、镜头＆运词 （直接提升电影感） 
Seedance 2.0 对运镜识别很强，直接写： 
• 近景 / 中景/伞景 / 特写                                                                                                               • 缓慢推镜 / 轻微拉远 / 平稳構移/ 环绕半圈                                                                        • 固定镜头、手持稳定、无抖动、丝滑流畅 
示例： 
中景，缓慢推镜，稳定跟拍，画面丝滑不卡顿 
四、角色/人物稳定 （防变脸、防变形）
必须加约束词。 非常关键：
• 五官清晰、面部稳定、不扭曲、不恋形                                                                               • 人 体结构正常、比例自然、动作不僵硬                                                                              • 同一角色、服装一致、发型不变
示例：
角色面部稳定不变形，人体结构正常，动作自然流畅 
五、画面质量 （必加、 提升清晰度）
通用画质词 （复制即可） :
• 4K、超高清、细节丰富、锐度清晰                                                                                      • 电影质感、色彩自然、光影柔和                                                                                            • 无模糊、无重影、无闪烁、画面稳定 
六、风格＆氛围 （快速出片）
• 治愈清新、唯美文艺、日系清新、韩系氛围感                                                                  • 赛博朋克、暗调高级、复古胶片、梦幻柔光                                                                      • 极简干净、高级质感、直实摂景
七、多镜头/分镜写法 (Seedance 2.0 强项） 
用时间/镜头顺序描述，不要大碎： 
开头近景特写脸部，慢慢拉远成全景，人物缓慢行走，镜头平稳跟随，结尾定格微笑
八、避雷 （千万别写） 
• 复杂多人互动、打架、跑跳剧烈、大幅度舞蹈                                                                      • 模糊词：好看、很美、很酷 （等于没描述）                                                                     • 矛盾要求：超高速 + 极度稳定                                                                                                • 色情、暴力、危險动作、版权人物 
九、直接可复制的万能模板 
模板1 （唯美人像短视频）
一位年轻女生在林间缓慢行走，微风轻拂头发，自然微笑，暖光光影，中景，缓慢推镜，画面流畅稳定，4K高清，电影感，面部清晰不变形，人体结构正常，动作自然流畅。
模板2 （氛围感风景）
海边日落，海浪轻拍沙滩，镜头缓慢横移，暖橙色调，治愈清新，画面丝滑，4K超高清，无闪烁无重影。
模板3（图生视频，首帧固定）
基于参考图保持人物样貌与服装一致，动作缓慢抬手转身，自然流畅，不僵硬不变形，稳定运镜，高清细节，电影质感

title: Futuristic Hovercraft on Savanna Hardpack
description: A highly detailed, long prompt for generating a 10-second continuous shot video of a futuristic hovercraft speeding across a savanna, including specific camera movements (aerial orbit, swoop, top-down lock, side chase, close spiral) and environmental details (dust devils, storm line, termite mounds). This prompt was used with Kling 2.6, not Seedance 2.0, but is included as context for advanced video generation prompts.
content: Futuristic hovercraft on savanna hardpack with dust devils (10 seconds, single continuous shot)Open high in the sky with a fast circling aerial orbit: the savanna sprawls below, tall grass rippling, hardpack track slicing a pale curve, a distant storm line brooding. A sleek, super-fast futuristic hovercraft (low, aerodynamic, red accent glow) skims the track as a needle of motion, throwing a razor-thin dust wake that peels into spirals while dust devils corkscrew nearby. The camera maintains a rapid orbit while dropping altitude, continuously shifting distance in one fluid move: wide orbit for scale, then a violent swoop closer, then back out—each pass revealing a different angle as the craft glides centimeters above the hardpack, suspensionless but alive with micro-stabilization and heat shimmer.On a tight pass, snap into a steep top-down lock for a beat, tracking the hovercraft like a guided camera drone, then whip the orbit lower into a fast diagonal chase skimming above the grass tips. Slingshot ahead for a brief head-on shot as the hovercraft screams toward camera, air pressure rippling the grass, then whip around into a close side chase where the hull slices the air and dust detonates in clean sheets. Dive even tighter to the rear skirt/vent flow: grit and pebbles ping and tumble, dust boiling into a tunnel as the camera’s orbit compresses into a near-craft spiral, fast and relentless.A herd crosses far in the distance; sudden decision: the pilot cuts off-line through a narrow gap between two termite mounds, a sharp lateral slide with a burst of vector thrust, then snaps back onto the track with a precise, aggressive correction. The camera spears through the dust tunnel in the craft’s wake, then rockets upward into the final, fastest orbit: climb hard and spiral out to an epic reveal as the storm front parts and a dramatic sun pillar drops onto the plains like a stage light, the hovercraft a glowing red dart below with dust devils and its wake curling in the spotlight.

title: Transformation Sequence: Tentacles and Alien Hiss
description: A detailed, multi-scene prompt for Seedance 2.0 describing a character's violent transformation sequence, starting with a handheld close-up, followed by tentacles wrapping around her, an alien voice, and a final shift into an alien form with a predatory expression and sharp teeth. The prompt specifies camera movements, timing, and emotional reactions across 15 seconds.
content:
0–2s

Handheld shaky tracking close-up, wind swirling hard, red tentacles floating around her, camera unstable and breathing.

2–4s

Tentacles suddenly snap and wrap tightly around her body from behind, pulling her upward slightly as she reacts instantly, her body jerking and resisting, movements sharp and uncontrolled.

4–6s

A deep alien voice echoes: “Serve us… conquer the Earth… and the power you seek will be yours.” Her body stiffens violently as energy surges through her, red glow spreading across her skin while she begins to struggle harder, shaking and twisting as if fighting the force.

6–8s

Camera circles her rapidly in handheld motion as transformation begins — her body convulses, movements erratic, she tries to pull away but fails. Her skin starts shifting unevenly, forming darker, thicker organic layers while she writhes in visible tension.

8–10s

Extreme close-up: her skin rapidly changes into layered, organic, slightly glossy textures, forming scale-like patterns. The transformation is unstable and reactive, surface moving like living tissue while she trembles and gasps.

10–11.5s

Cut to side/back shot: tall alien silhouettes move slowly around her, observing while she struggles violently, her body still twitching and resisting within the tentacles.

11.5–13s

Cut to front: tentacles suddenly retract sharply, releasing her mid-motion. She drops heavily to her knees, catching herself with unstable movement, breathing fast, body still twitching from the transformation.

13–15s

Handheld close-up pushes toward her face as the final transformation completes her facial structure shifts into an alien form with organic interconnected textures, surfaces stretching and reforming fluidly. She lifts her head slowly, then lets out a sharp hiss, revealing rows of sharp, unnatural teeth. Her eyes darken, expression turning predatory as the camera shakes subtly in front of her.

title: Cinematic Street Magic Video Prompt for Seedance 2.0
description: A detailed, cinematic prompt for Seedance 2.0 designed to generate a video of an anthropomorphic white rabbit magician performing a card trick on a wet, neon-lit city street at night. The prompt specifies the setting, character attire, action sequence (fanning cards, selecting the Ace of Hearts, disintegration into particles, particle stream following, formation of a giant Ace on a building facade, particle reversal, and card reformation), and camera movements (close-up, pull back), ensuring a smooth, professional performance.
content: A stylized cinematic 3D animation set on a nighttime city street with wet reflective pavement, soft street lights, and neon glow. An anthropomorphic white rabbit magician stands at the center, wearing a black tailcoat, white shirt, black bow tie, and a black top hat, surrounded by a loose semicircle of onlookers. The rabbit performs smooth, professional card handling with a standard 52-card deck. The deck is fanned evenly at chest height, all cards visible and unique. A hand from the camera selects one card from the fan — the Ace of Hearts. The rabbit takes the same card and holds it clearly facing the camera. The rabbit flicks the card lightly. The Ace of Hearts begins to glow at the edges, then disintegrates into fine red and gold particles. The particles form a controlled, continuous stream with motion trails, flowing forward across the street. The camera follows the particle stream as it travels toward a large glass building facade. Upon impact, a point of light appears and expands outward in a grid-like pattern across the glass surface. The entire building facade activates, and a massive glowing Ace of Hearts forms across it, bright and clearly defined, with subtle pulsing light. After a brief hold, the giant Ace of Hearts breaks apart into particles again. The particles reverse direction, streaming back through the air toward the rabbit. The rabbit steps forward and reaches into the air, catching the incoming particles. In close-up, the particles compress and reform into a single solid playing card in the rabbit’s hand — the Ace of Hearts, unchanged. The rabbit presents the card toward the camera. The camera slowly pulls back, revealing the crowd reacting and clapping, while the city lights and reflections remain vivid in the background.

title: Dimensional Entity Megacity Collision Prompt (Dreamina)
description: A highly detailed, complex prompt for generating a video of a towering humanoid entity made of shifting geometry appearing over a megacity, causing a dimensional tear that makes two versions of the city collide. This prompt was explicitly made using Dreamina AI, which incorporates Seedance 2.0 technology.
content:
A towering humanoid entity made of shifting translucent geometry appears above a megacity skyline, its body composed of overlapping dimensional planes reflecting alternate realities — hook at second two: the entity opens both hands and a vertical dimensional tear slices through the city.

Reality splits.

Two versions of the city begin occupying the same space.

Buildings phase through each other as competing timelines collide.

The destruction is dimensional and structural: streets fold into mirrored corridors, cars fall sideways into parallel gravity planes, and skyscrapers fragment into geometric shards as their alternate versions misalign.

Every movement of the entity widens the rift.

Entire districts slide into adjacent dimensions.

The gauntlet unfolds through a skyline progressively divided between worlds: street level where pedestrians phase between realities → mid-rise districts where buildings overlap in transparent duplicates → rooftop where entire towers rotate into perpendicular universes.

Aircraft vanish into dimensional folds.

Bridges twist into impossible angles.

Chase-cam flying through intersecting city layers as gravity shifts between realities.

Velocity ramp when the dimensional rift expands wide enough to swallow an entire city block.

Cut to aerial: the megacity now exists as two overlapping worlds drifting apart.

The dimensional entity stands between them.

Diegetic prismatic dimensional light reflecting through fractured architecture and overlapping skylines, cinematic multiverse distortion effects, particle fragments of shattered reality, 4K.

title: Colossal Ocean Leviathan Attack on a Megacity Harbor
description: A detailed, multi-shot narrative prompt for Seedance 2.0, focusing on a massive deep-sea creature rising from the ocean and causing a hydraulic disaster in a megacity harbor, featuring cinematic water physics and structural destruction.
content:
A colossal ocean leviathan, 300 meters long with armored whale-like plating and luminous bioluminescent currents flowing through translucent fins, rises from the deep ocean just offshore of a megacity harbor — hook at second two: the creature breaches vertically through the water, displacing millions of tons of ocean in a single eruption.

The harbor instantly becomes a hydraulic disaster.

A wall of water surges outward from the breach point.

The destruction is tidal and structural: container ships lift like toys in the surge, harbor cranes snap as their bases flood, and seawalls crumble under the sudden pressure of displaced ocean mass.

Each movement of the leviathan generates secondary tidal waves.

Entire docks tear free from their foundations.

The gauntlet progresses inland through a waterfront district consumed by the surge: port infrastructure ripped apart → cargo ships sliding through city streets → mid-rise buildings collapsing as floodwater erodes their foundations.

Oil storage tanks rupture.

Ferries crash into office towers.

Chase-cam skimming just above the floodwater as the leviathan swims through partially submerged streets.

Velocity ramp when the creature’s tail strike generates a secondary megawave that overtops the entire harbor barrier.

Cut to aerial: half the coastal district now underwater.

The leviathan circles within the newly formed inland sea.

Diegetic deep-ocean bioluminescence reflecting through floodwater and shattered glass, cinematic water displacement physics, massive volumetric spray and debris simulation, 4K.

title: Cyberpunk Motorcycle Chase Sequence in Seoul
description: A highly detailed, multi-stage cinematic prompt for Seedance 2.0 describing a high-speed cyberpunk motorcycle chase through downtown Seoul at night, including a jump, a landing on a moving truck, a spiral garage drift, and an exit onto a rain-soaked boulevard. The prompt specifies character appearance, gear, camera angles, and lighting effects.
content:
A man in his early 30s, tan skin, short windswept hair, wearing a matte-black armored riding jacket with reflective blue seams, carbon fiber riding pants, and reinforced boots, launches a high-powered sport motorbike off the edge of an elevated highway ramp in downtown Seoul at the 2-second mark — the bike suspended above dense night traffic as LED billboards and neon street signs illuminate the machine from below.

The motorcycle rotates sideways in a controlled whip, sparks trailing briefly from the rear frame as the rider corrects mid-air. Camera positioned from a nearby rooftop captures the full silhouette of rider and bike against the glowing city grid — skyscraper windows reflecting streaks of motion while the highway curves beneath.

He lands violently on the roof of a moving delivery truck, suspension compressing hard on impact, the metal roof buckling slightly. Without slowing, the rider accelerates forward, launching off the front of the truck toward a descending parking garage ramp.

Inside the spiral ramp he drifts along the concrete walls, tires screeching, the camera following in a tight circular chase shot as reflections from passing headlights sweep across the rider’s helmet.

Street level: the rider bursts out of the garage exit onto a rain-soaked boulevard, weaving through taxis and buses as neon reflections smear across the wet asphalt.

Seoul neon night, elevated highway stunt launch, moving truck rooftop landing, spiral garage descent drift, continuous high-speed motion, cinematic grain, 4K.

title: High-Speed Cinematic Action Scene with Web-Slinging
description: A highly detailed, multi-part prompt for Seedance 2.0 to generate an ultra-realistic, cinematic, high-speed action video. The scene features a male character using high-tension webs to swing and accelerate between skyscrapers during the golden hour, emphasizing realistic physics, dynamic movement sequences (acceleration, jump, fall, explosive ascent, re-acceleration), and a close, tracking camera perspective.
content:
リファレンス画像の<<<Image1>>>  を完全に維持したまま、超リアルで映画のような高速アクション動画を生成してください。

ゴールデンアワーの暖かい光に包まれた高層ビル群の中、男性がクモの糸のような高張力ウェブを使って、ビルの間を超高速で突き進むシネマティックアクション。すべての動きはビルとビルの間、外壁や窓のすぐ近く、屋上ラインより下〜ギリギリ付近で行うこと。開けた空に長時間出ないこと。

【アクション構成（重要）】

最初は“前方加速”から始まる。
<<<Image1>>>  は前方上方向の建物に向かってウェブを発射し、その張力で一気に前へ引き込まれ、ビルの隙間を一直線に超高速で突き進む。壁や窓のすぐ横をかすめながら進み、強いスピードと奥行きを見せる。

その後、勢いを乗せたまま大きくジャンプし、ビルの隙間を一気に「ボーン」と飛び越える。ここでは一瞬だけ開けた空間に出るが、すぐに次のアクションへ移行する。

ジャンプ後、キャラクターは一度バランスを崩し、落下し始める。重力に引かれて急激に下へ落ちるリアルな落下を描写すること。ここで一瞬のスリルを作る。

落下中、<<<Image1>>>  は即座に上方向の建物の縁や構造物に向かってウェブを発射し、空中で引っ掛ける。その瞬間、強烈な張力によって体が一気に上方向へ引き上げられ、爆発的に上昇する。

その後、再び前方に向かってウェブを発射し、前進加速へ戻る。

ウェブの使用回数は全体で2〜3回に抑え、1つ1つのアクションをしっかり見せること。

【動きの特徴】
すべての動きは慣性、重力、張力に基づいたリアルな物理挙動にすること。減速やホバリングは禁止。常にスピードの流れが途切れず、「加速 → 跳躍 → 落下 → 爆発的上昇 → 再加速」という明確な緩急を作る。

【身体表現】
ウェブを発射する瞬間、片腕を鋭く前方または上方に突き出す。加速中は体が引っ張られて伸び、脚は後方へ流れる。ジャンプ時は全身で勢いを乗せ、落下時は重力に従い自然に崩れる。引き上げ時は体が一気に上へ持ち上がるダイナミックな動きにする。

【カメラ】
カメラは基本的に前進方向の追従ショットを維持し、キャラクターの後方または近距離から追いかける。常に奥へ進む動きを強調し、スピードとパースの変化を最大化する。サイドアングルは使用しない。

【演出】
ガラス外壁の反射、流れる窓のライン、強いモーションブラー、風圧による服の揺れ、光のフレアを活用し、圧倒的なスピードと没入感を演出する。壁との距離は常に近く、衝突ギリギリのスリルを強調する。

【感情】
集中、興奮、アドレナリン、自信、そして一瞬の危機（落下）からのリカバリーによる高揚感を表現する。

全体として、超リアル、シネマティック、高速直進、強い奥行き、緩急のあるアクション、物理的リアリズムを重視すること。

0-3s: [Extreme high-speed follow] [@Image 1] carves down the steep asphalt. The camera mimics an FPV drone, flying inches from the ground at blinding speed. The red coat whips violently in the wind.
3-6s: [360-degree barrel roll] [@Image 1] hits a hairpin turn, leaning horizontally. The camera executes a dizzying, hyper-fluid 360-degree roll over his head, maintaining focus on his armor reflecting the bright sky.
6-10s: [Under-board swoop & launch] [@Image 1] hits a ramp, launching into the air. The camera aggressively swoops underneath the board, capturing the massive ocean drop, before tilting up as [@Image 1] backflips.
10-15s: [Impact & rapid pull-back] [@Image 1] lands flawlessly, wheels smoking. The camera snaps backward in a rapid reverse-dolly motion, showcasing the majestic landscape as [@Image 1] speeds away.

title: EC135 Helicopter Alpine Rescue Flight
description: A highly detailed, cinematic prompt for Seedance 2.0 describing an orange EC135 rescue helicopter performing an aggressive, high-speed flight through an alpine gauntlet, focusing on dynamic camera movement, lighting, and environmental effects.
content: Locked two meters behind the EC135's tail boom, the orange rescue bird banks hard left around a granite outcrop, rotor disc canting twenty degrees, main blades throwing a halo of dust. The cliff face streaks right in golden blur as the helo snaps back center, skimming ridgeline at 200 km/h, then immediately banks right to thread a notch between two peaks, fuselage rolling fifteen degrees starboard, tail rotor screaming to hold heading. Warm side light ignites the orange flanks in motion-streaked fire. Another left bank to follow the mountain's curve, g-force pressing the airframe into the turn, then blast straight through a valley gap, rotor wash churning pine tops into green chaos below. Sharp right to avoid a rock spire, then left again as the terrain dictates, weaving through the alpine gauntlet at locked combat speed, every bank aggressive and immediate, camera chasing through each tilting turn while the background becomes pure golden velocity.
